eng: God sent me to reveal the secret plan that had been hidden since the beginning of time by God, who created everything.
local: ki che uninfo biɛn n mann biɛ Uwonbɔr a bɔwoonkaarin a toon kaah ye man, wee Uwonbɔr, wan nan naan niwann biɛn nin, nan ŋmag ti liwoolin n-yonn man nan jon nin.

eng: Gods purpose is now to show the rulers and powers in the heavens the many different varieties of his wisdom through the church.
local: Uwonbɔr a boni nan ye le ke daandaan nan, biwonjiɛm a laguŋ bu, Uwonbɔr a lam a booli ye nin ta wɔɔn nnaam a pɔɔm nin tininkper a pɔɔm man be paabin.

eng: This was consistent with the plan he had from the beginning of time that he accomplished through Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Uwonbɔr nan ŋa ni niɛ nan ke waah gbeen u lolim man kaa jɔɔ diɛmin ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya nin.

eng: In Christ we have bold and confident access to God through faith in him.
local: Taah ŋa Yisa yada ki be u ni nbu, le ti jɔɔ lipoobil ki li foo Uwonbɔr ban, nin tidindann.

eng: So then, I ask you not to become discouraged by what Im suffering for you, which is your glory.
local: Ni ma bu, n balin ni le, ni laa che ni gbanann ngbɔɔ maah ji fala wan ni bu nni, ni ye kupag le sei ni.

eng: This is why I kneel before the Father.
local: Ni niɛ nan bu le n gbaa n dun bu n Baa Uwonbɔr a nintogil.

eng: Every ethnic group in heaven or on earth is recognized by him.
local: Uma ban le U niin yaab ban be papaab nin dulinya nan yaan biɛn a yin nyann.

eng: I ask that he will strengthen you in your inner selves from the riches of his glory through the Spirit.
local: N miɛ Uwonbɔr le ke Un ta U jɔɔm a pagim ki pɔɔg ni gbanann nmɔn U Naaŋ kan be ni nin bu.

eng: I ask that Christ will live in your hearts through faith. As a result of having strong roots in love.
local: wee Masiya li be ni sufu-n ni yada bu. Le n miɛ u ke un che ni fir ki sir nbamɔm ki baan inyaan njiɛmin.

eng: I ask that youll have the power to grasp loves width and length, height and depth, together with all believers.
local: wee ni li jɔɔ npɔɔn nin Uwonbɔr a ninfob gannkaab biɛn ki fir biɛ Masiya a jiɛm a yiyalim nin mi fufɔgim nin mi kpikperim nin mi nyunyɔɔm kaah ye man.

eng: I ask that youll know the love of Christ that is beyond knowledge so that you will be filled entirely with the fullness of God.
local: ki biɛ Masiya a jiɛm kaah jon nnyinyin biɛn man, wee nin gbeen nin Uwonbɔr a magim nin U binbenŋam ke naah gbeen Uwonbɔr ban man nin.

eng: Glory to God, who is able to do far beyond all that we could ask or imagine by his power at work within us.
local: Uwonbɔr a pɔɔm kaah tun nin ti nbu, u li fir ki tun niwann biɛn ki sei ti ke nin jo taah tiɛr nan bu ki miɛ win.

eng: glory to him in the church and in Christ Jesus for all generations, forever and always. Amen.
local: U ma Uwonbɔr ye kupag biwonjiɛm a laguŋ nin Masiya ni ki tan kpaa n-yonn man nan jon nin a ninfob biɛn, nin n-yonn man kaa jɔɔ diɛm nan! Ibamɔn.

eng: Therefore, as a prisoner for the Lord, I encourage you to live as people worthy of the call you received from God.
local: Min wan ye uloondiikɔɔr Uyudaan a toon yin bu-n, n balin ni le ke ni che ni binbem nkpaan ni yim man wee ni nan ga-n.

eng: Conduct yourselves with all humility, gentleness, and patience. Accept each other with love.
local: Ni jiin niba, ki li be soon, ki li jɔɔ limɔril nin njiɛm nin tab.

eng: and make an effort to preserve the unity of the Spirit with the peace that ties you together.
local: Ni pɔɔn niba ki li ŋmag Kinaaŋ a mɔkpaamin nin nposɔɔn.

eng: You are one body and one spirit, just as God also called you in one hope.
local: Tigbanann tiba nin Kinaaŋ kiba le be, ke baah nan yin ni tama kiba bu a yim man nin.

eng: There is one Lord, one faith, one baptism.
local: Uyudaan uba, yada kiba, Uwonbɔr a nyunful nba;.

eng: and one God and Father of all, who is over all, through all, and in all.
local: Uwonbɔr uba, nin ti biɛn a Baa, wan jon niwann biɛn, nin niwann biɛn bu, nin niwann biɛn nin.

eng: God has given his grace to each one of us measured out by the gift that is given by Christ.
local: Amaa ti biɛn nan Uwonbɔr ta U nyunyunbasanlin le sei ti uba ba uba ba ke Masiya kaah nan por man ki sei ti-n.

eng: Thats why scripture says, When he climbed up to the heights, he captured prisoners, and he gave gifts to people .
local: Ni ma bu le ni sɔb Uwonbɔr a gbɔŋin ke: Waah nan don papaab n-yonn man nin; u nan ŋmag biyom takpem ma, le ki sei bininfob ipiin.

eng: What does the phrase he climbed up mean if it doesnt mean that he had first gone down into the lower regions, the earth?.
local: U nan don papaab a taai ye nii wee naa wɔɔn ke u nan jiirin kutingbɔŋ nan yaan a tum tum lee?.

eng: The one who went down is the same one who climbed up above all the heavens so that he might fill everything.
local: Uma wan nan jiirin nin, le ye wan ji nan don papaab ki tan jon lagir kitilangbɔŋ bu naah li ŋa man wee un gbeen kutingbɔŋ nan biɛn.

eng: He gave some apostles, some prophets, some evangelists, and some pastors and teachers.
local: Uma nan ta ipiin ki sei bininfosaalib, u gann biba le ki ŋa bi u tooi, le biba mu ye bilinlem, le biba mu ye bimɔleenmɔɔnib, le biba mu ye ban ŋmag biwonjiɛm a laguŋ nin ban wɔɔnn.

eng: His purpose was to equip Gods people for the work of serving and building up the body of Christ.
local: U nan ŋa ni niɛ nan ke un mann Uwonbɔr a ninfob biɛn le wee bin fir tun Uwonbɔr a toon ki che Uma Masiya a gbanann n maa ki do.

eng: until we all reach the unity of faith and knowledge of Gods Son. Gods goal is for us to become mature adults—to be fully grown, measured by the standard of the fullness of Christ.
local: Nin ti biɛn nan n nan fir kpaag bimɔb ti yada-n wee ki chegir ki biɛ Uwonbɔr a bija-n, wee ti binbemin gbee ki foo Masiya a binbemin a magir.

eng: As a result, we arent supposed to be infants any longer who can be tossed and blown around by every wind that comes from teaching with deceitful scheming and the tricks people play to deliberately mislead others.
local: Taa ji yin ye nbuwaab tirimi, wee bilinlarib a wɔɔnimin li jɔɔ ti ki yeŋ ke kubulunkpoŋ kan wee kunyungbɔŋ daar ki yeŋ chaa kaah ban nan paami.

eng: Instead, by speaking the truth with love, lets grow in every way into Christ.
local: Amaa ibamɔn nin njiɛm a pagim bu, ti yin nɔb le ki kpiɛ Masiya wan ye liyulin nin niwann biɛn a poolin.

eng: who is the head. The whole body grows from him, as it is joined and held together by all the supporting ligaments. The body makes itself grow in that it builds itself up with love as each one does its part.
local: U ma bu le ti gbanann tug ki ŋmag tab, le tigbanann nmɔn tug tab ki maa tab kpiɛg nin njiɛm, le ligbanann bɔgil biɛn tun litoonl.

eng: So Im telling you this, and I insist on it in the Lord: you shouldnt live your life like the Gentiles anymore. They base their lives on pointless thinking.
local: Ni niɛ nan le n bei ni, Uyudaan bu le n si maah pag n bɔr tan nan bu, ki ke ni laa ji be ke ban kaa ye Juu yaabin kaah be man nin ni, wee bi potiɛl kaa jɔɔ nyɔɔrin ni.

eng: and they are in the dark in their reasoning. They are disconnected from Gods life because of their ignorance and their closed hearts.
local: Bi biɛm ye libunbɔnl le, le baa kpiɛ Uwonbɔr kaah sei limiɛfol lan nin yaan ni, nan bu-n baa nyi niba le ki sin ji ye tukangbirdam.

eng: They are people who lack all sense of right and wrong, and who have turned themselves over to doing whatever feels good and to practicing every sort of corruption along with greed.
local: Baa san niba a fai, le ki choon tun kɔlisa birug nin tijaginn a toon, ki la jɔɔ kɔlisa ke bin tun man ki kpiɛ.

eng: But you didnt learn that sort of thing from Christ.
local: Nim bu ke, naa ye man le ni nan tinn ki biɛ Masiya.

eng: Since you really listened to him and you were taught how the truth is in Jesus.
local: N nyi naah gbir u bu, le bi tinn ni u bɔr ki wɔɔn ni ibamɔn yan be Yisa ni nmɔn.

eng: change the former way of life that was part of the person you once were, corrupted by deceitful desires.
local: Bi nan wɔɔn ni, ki jiin ni binben kpegimin paam ke, ni nya ni binben kpegimin yaan na, mi ye kɔlisa birug kan lar ni le;.

eng: Instead, renew the thinking in your mind by the Spirit.
local: ki pɔŋ ni binbem nin ni potiɛl;.

eng: and clothe yourself with the new person created according to Gods image in justice and true holiness.
local: wee ki ta tigbanann pɔnn tan wee Uwonbɔr nan naan nin ki yee ki li nann Uwonbɔr nin ibamɔn a buchinn nin kasi a binbem.

eng: Therefore, after you have gotten rid of lying, Each of you must tell the truth to your neighbor because we are parts of each other in the same body.
local: Mambu ni laa ji por tibɔkar ki tenn tabi, uninfo biɛn li pag ibamɔn ki tenn u kunkɔɔn taba, ke ti biɛn ye tigbanann tiba a ninfob le.

eng: Be angry without sinning. Dont let the sun set on your anger.
local: Ni ye a ŋuul fii ke a laa tun tibiri: Ki laa che nween n nan lu wee a ŋuul kaa la sɔŋi.

eng: Dont provide an opportunity for the devil.
local: ki laa sei Sintani nsan ni.

eng: Thieves should no longer steal. Instead, they should go to work, using their hands to do good so that they will have something to share with whoever is in need.
local: Wan nan ti su ke, ni kpaa talar le un jiɛn nnaayigim, amaa wee ki li tun na, ki ta u tɔɔl a nɔɔi ki li ŋaan nan ŋan na, wee ki li fir kan niba ki por sei bilanjiim.

eng: Dont let any foul words come out of your mouth. Only say what is helpful when it is needed for building up the community so that it benefits those who hear what you say.
local: Ni laa che tibɔbir nyann ni mɔn ni, amaa ni li pag nan li fir ter ni kpiɛtiib, wee nin ŋa tinyɔɔr ki sei ban peligin.

eng: Dont make the Holy Spirit of God unhappy—you were sealed by him for the day of redemption.
local: Ni laa bii Uwonbɔr a Kasi a Naaŋ a sufu, wan wee Uwonbɔr taah daag ni nkpenim a manugin a daal.

eng: Put aside all bitterness, losing your temper, anger, shouting, and slander, along with every other evil.
local: Ni laa che ni pooi to tab bu, ni laa che ni ŋuui fii wee ni gaan tijar tab bu, ni laa kɔn ki sugir tabi, nima nmɔn nin kininaŋ biɛn ni.

eng: Be kind, compassionate, and forgiving to each other, in the same way God forgave you in Christ.
local: Ni li ŋaan tab tiŋanna, ki li san tab kunyunyunbaaga, ki li jiɛn tab a bir ki per ke Uwonbɔr kaah jiɛn per ti Masiya bu man nin.

eng: Therefore, imitate God like dearly loved children.
local: Mambu ni li toog Uwonbɔr a, naah ye U bijiɛkaamin.

eng: Live your life with love, following the example of Christ, who loved us and gave himself for us. He was a sacrificial offering that smelled sweet to God.
local: ki li be njiɛm a binbema, ke Masiya kaah jiɛ ti ki ta u ba ki mann kumanug kan jɔɔ nbaam mɔɔm ki sei Uwonbɔr ti bu man nin.

eng: Sexual immorality, and any kind of impurity or greed, shouldnt even be mentioned among you, which is right for holy persons.
local: Amaa ni laa che ti gbir iwanchɔgin toon lipiibanlin bee lijabanlin a wama ni sisiigin ni, bee ki laa tun tijaginn a toon iba, bee kujaŋuuŋ, nan bu-n naa ŋan nin Uwonbɔr a Kasi a ninfob li be man ni.

eng: Obscene language, silly talk, or vulgar jokes arent acceptable for believers. Instead, there should be thanksgiving.
local: Ki jiɛn ifa a geli nin ijɔr leen nin igel pɔɔr yan kaa kpaan ni, amaa nan kpaan nin ti li ŋaan ye liwonpagil le.

eng: Because you know for sure that persons who are sexually immoral, impure, or greedy—which happens when things become gods—those persons wont inherit the kingdom of Christ and God.
local: Ni nyi ni niɛ nan bu: Ke uninfo wan tun iwanchɔgin toon upiibanlin bee ujabanlin, bee tijaginn a toon, bee kujaŋuuŋ ke, u yaa daan ye utingban kɔɔr le, le kaa na yin kan niba Masiya nin Uwonbɔr a naamin ni.

eng: Nobody should deceive you with stupid ideas. Gods anger comes down on those who are disobedient because of this kind of thing.
local: Ni laa che uba n ta tibɔyɔɔr nan ki lar ni, ni ma che Uwonbɔr a ŋuul fii ban kaa jɔɔ limɔcheelin bu.

eng: So you shouldnt have anything to do with them.
local: Mambu ni laa jɔɔ nɔɔ nin tab nin bi.

eng: You were once darkness, but now you are light in the Lord, so live your life as children of light.
local: Ni gbaa tɔɔl la nan be libunbɔnlin le, amaa le ti Yudaau bu, ni nin kpann ban be nwonweenin le daandaan nan. Mambu ni li be ke nwonween a buwaaba.

eng: Therefore, test everything to see whats pleasing to the Lord.
local: ni baan ki biɛ nan gbee Uyudaan a num.

eng: and dont participate in the unfruitful actions of darkness. Instead, you should reveal the truth about them.
local: Ni laa che ni nɔɔ be libunbɔnl a toon yan kaa jɔɔ nyɔɔr nmɔn yaan ni, amaa wee ki nyan ti npaan ni na.

eng: Its embarrassing to even talk about what certain persons do in secret.
local: Ni ye ifa le nin uninfo n pag limɔyiildaan nmɔn kaah woog ki tun nan a bɔr.

eng: But everything exposed to the light is revealed by the light.
local: Amaa ni ye nwonween wonn niwann biɛn bu ke, ni nya npaan ni le ki ga.

eng: Everything that is revealed by the light is light. Therefore, it says, Wake up, sleeper! Get up from the dead, and Christ will shine on you. .
local: nwonween le wonn niwann biɛn bu le ti ga. Mambu le ni sɔb Uwonbɔr a gbɔŋin ke, Fin wan dɔ jiɛn nan, ligira, fii nkumin na, wee Masiya a wonweem nwonn a bu.

eng: So be careful to live your life wisely, not foolishly.
local: Mambu ni li nyi niba bu, naah li be man, ni laa be ke ban kaa jɔɔ nlamin ni, amaa ni li be ke bilandamin.

eng: Take advantage of every opportunity because these are evil times.
local: ni taah npɔɔn man wee ni jɔɔ nan ki tun naah kpaan ni tun man nin linunmanl, nan bu-n idaa yan wee ti be nan bir pam.

eng: Because of this, dont be ignorant, but understand the Lords will.
local: Mambu ni laa be ijɔrig a binbemi, amaa ni biɛm Uyudaan a bam kaah ye man.

eng: Dont get drunk on wine, which produces depravity. Instead, be filled with the Spirit in the following ways.
local: Ni laa nyu ndaam ki gbee, ke lidanyulin le nwanchɔgin binben nya, amaa wee ki che Uwonbɔr a Kasi a Naaŋin gbeen ni.

eng: speak to each other with psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs; sing and make music to the Lord in your hearts.
local: Ni li pag tenn tab nin ilan na, liwonpagil a lan, nin Kinaaŋ a lan. Ki li gaah ilan ki pagir Uyudaan ni sufu-n na.

eng: always give thanks to God the Father for everything in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: ni li pagir ti Baa Uwonbɔr iyoo biɛn nin niwann biɛn nin na ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya a yinl bu.

eng: and submit to each other out of respect for Christ.
local: Ni taam ni ba ki sei taba ke naah tenn Masiya jilima man nin.

eng: For example, wives should submit to their husbands as if to the Lord.
local: Biniinpiib, ni taam ni ba ki sei ni chiɛb ke naah ta ni ba ki sei Uyudaan man nin.

eng: A husband is the head of his wife like Christ is head of the church, that is, the savior of the body.
local: Nan bu-n uja le ye u poo a yudaau ke Masiya kaah ye biwonjiɛm a yudaau man nin, biwonjiɛm le ye Masiya a gbanann, le U mu ye bi feeru.

eng: So wives submit to their husbands in everything like the church submits to Christ.
local: Biwonjiɛm a laguŋ kaah ta bi ba sei Masiya man nin, man le ye biniinpiib mu n ta bi ba ki sei bi chiɛb nin niwann biɛn ni.

eng: As for husbands, love your wives just like Christ loved the church and gave himself for her.
local: Piidam, ni li jiɛ ni piiba, ke Masiya kaah jiɛ biwonjiɛm man wee ki kpo bi bu-n.

eng: He did this to make her holy by washing her in a bath of water with the word.
local: ki nan ban bi li be kasi, ki nan ta Uwonbɔr a mɔleen ki ŋunn bi nnyumin.

eng: He did this to present himself with a splendid church, one without any sort of stain or wrinkle on her clothes, but rather one that is holy and blameless.
local: naah li ŋa man wee un ta biwonjiɛm a laguŋ kan nyaginin ki sei u baa, wee tijaginn tiba laa sal bi ni bee bi laa jɔɔ tijaginn ni bee igalin iba, amaa wee ki li be kasi ki laa jɔɔ igalin ni.

eng: Thats how husbands ought to love their wives—in the same way as they do their own bodies. Anyone who loves his wife loves himself.
local: Ni ye man le, piidam ye bi li jiɛ bi piib le ke bi tɔɔl a gbanann nin. Uja wan jiɛ u poo ke u jiɛ u ba le.

eng: No one ever hates his own body, but feeds it and takes care of it just like Christ does for the church.
local: Nan bu-n, uba kaa be ki nan u tɔɔl a gbanann ni, amaa u jinn ti le ki mann ti, ke Masiya kaah mann biwonjiɛm man nin.

eng: because we are parts of his body.
local: nan bu-n tim li ye U gbanann nmɔn a bɔgi.

eng: This is why a man will leave his father and mother and be united with his wife, and the two of them will be one body .
local: Ni niɛ nan bu le uja ye un nya u baa nin u na ban le uma nin u poo nkpaag bimɔb, wee bi bilee nmɔn lagin ki ŋa gbanann tiba.

eng: Marriage is a significant allegory, and Im applying it to Christ and the church.
local: Ti ye tibɔr bamɔn tan woo le, amaa min pag Masiya nin biwonjiɛm a laguŋ a bɔr le.

eng: In any case, as for you individually, each one of you should love his wife as himself, and wives should respect their husbands.
local: Ni ma bu, ni biɛn nan li jiɛ ni piib ke naah jiɛ ni ba man nin, wee uniinpii mu li tenn u chal jilimau.

eng: As for children, obey your parents in the Lord, because it is right.
local: Nbuwaab, Uyudaan bu ni li cheel ni baam nin ni nam a mɔba, ke man le ŋan.

eng: The commandment Honor your father and mother is the first one with a promise attached.
local: Ni li tenn ni baa nin ni na jilimau, ke ni ma ye chinchinn a siim ki kpiɛ limɔsiinl.

eng: so that things will go well for you, and you will live for a long time in the land .
local: ke ni li ŋan ki sei ni wee ni li ji limiɛfol lan fɔg a mɔm dulinya nan yaan.

eng: As for parents, dont provoke your children to anger, but raise them with discipline and instruction about the Lord.
local: Bibaam, ni laa fiin ni buwaab a ŋuui; amaa ni tinn bi nbamɔma ki wɔɔn bi ti Yudaau a bɔr.

eng: As for slaves, obey your human masters with fear and trembling and with sincere devotion to Christ.
local: Biyom, ni li jɔɔ limɔcheel nin jilima ki tenn ni dulinya a yudam ki li san bi bijawaam, ki li tun itoon ki tenn bi nin ni sufu biɛn, ke naah bi li jɔɔ limɔcheel ki tenn Masiya man nin.

eng: Dont work to make yourself look good and try to flatter people, but act like slaves of Christ carrying out Gods will from the heart.
local: Ni laa jɔɔ limɔcheel ki tenn bi ke bi num ngbee ni n-yonn man wee bi be ni ban ni, amaa ni li jɔɔ limɔcheel nan li gbee Uwonbɔr a num nin ni sufu biɛn naah ye Masiya a yomin bu.

eng: Serve your owners enthusiastically, as though you were serving the Lord and not human beings.
local: Ni li tun biyom a toon kaah ye man nin ni sufu biɛn na wee ni li ye ke ni tun tenn Uyudaan le amaa naa ye bininfobi.

eng: You know that the Lord will reward every person who does what is right, whether that person is a slave or a free person.
local: Nan bu-n ni nyi ke Uyudaan na li yɔ uninfo biɛn u toon ŋan kaah ye man, ŋaah ye uyom bee ŋaah ye a ba.

eng: As for masters, treat your slaves in the same way. Stop threatening them, because you know that both you and your slaves have a master in heaven. He doesnt distinguish between people on the basis of status.
local: Le nim biyudam, ni mu li ŋaan ni yomi tiŋanna, ki laa kɔɔn bi bijawaami, ki li nyi ke nim nin bi ma a yudaau be papaab le, waa gann uba ki jiɛn u tɔ.

eng: Finally, be strengthened by the Lord and his powerful strength.
local: Nan joor ye nan le, ni li jɔɔ ngbananpɔɔn nin Uyudaan nin u pɔɔn takpemin bu.

eng: Put on Gods armor so that you can make a stand against the tricks of the devil.
local: Ni ta Uwonbɔr a gbaginu ki yeeu wee ki fir to ulinlaril nin u lol birimin.

eng: We arent fighting against human enemies but against rulers, authorities, forces of cosmic darkness, and spiritual powers of evil in the heavens.
local: Taa kɔnn nin bininfob ban ye tigbanann nin nchamin ni, amaa ti kɔnn nin nnaam a pɔɔm, nin tininkper a pɔɔm, nin dulinya nan a bunbɔnl a pɔɔm, nin nnaanbiim man be paabin a pɔɔm.

eng: Therefore, pick up the full armor of God so that you can stand your ground on the evil day and after you have done everything possible to still stand.
local: Mambu ni ta Uwonbɔr a gbaginu-n ki yeeu, wee ni ye lidabiril daal nmɔn nan foon ke, ni fir baan ki sir, wee ni bɔɔn bu ni ye ni fir ŋa niwann biɛn ki yin sir ke.

eng: So stand with the belt of truth around your waist, justice as your breastplate.
local: Ni mann ki baan sir nbamɔm, ki ta ibamɔn a changbam ki lol ni cham, ki li jɔɔ nbuchin binben man be ke tukur tan wee bi jɔɔ piig ligbingbanl bu-n.

eng: and put shoes on your feet so that you are ready to spread the good news of peace.
local: ki ŋaam sili ki ta tibɔŋann tan tenn nposɔɔn nin ki kpann inaatag ki tag.

eng: Above all, carry the shield of faith so that you can extinguish the flaming arrows of the evil one.
local: Nan kpiɛ ni niɛ nan biɛn bu ye, ni ta yada ki kpann nan li guu ni wee ni fir ki ŋmar ulinlaril a piin yan nyɔɔr nŋmi-n.

eng: Take the helmet of salvation and the sword of the Spirit, which is Gods word.
local: Ni ta feeja kpann utɔtogir a jabig ki chig, nin Uwonbɔr a bɔŋann tan ye Kasi a Naaŋ a takoobi ki li ŋmag.

eng: Offer prayers and petitions in the Spirit all the time. Stay alert by hanging in there and praying for all believers.
local: Ni li miɛ Uwonbɔr Kinaaŋin ki li miɛ U nan yaan biɛn wee ni be nin liwonmiɛl lan a booli biɛn wee ni ban. Ki che ni niɛ nan li be ni sufu ni, ni li guu ni ba wee ki li miɛ ki tenn Uwonbɔr a ninfogannkaabin biɛn na.

eng: As for me, pray that when I open my mouth, Ill get a message that confidently makes this secret plan of the gospel known.
local: Ki li miɛ ki tenn n mu ni, wee ni ye n-yonn man n nan yaar n mɔb ke, n fir kan tibɔr ki mɔɔn tibɔwoonkaar nan ki laa san bijawaami.

eng: Im an ambassador in chains for the sake of the gospel. Pray so that the Lord will give me the confidence to say what I have to say.
local: tibɔwoonkaar nmɔn bu le n ye ntoon le bi lolim tikulor nan, ni li miɛ Uwonbɔr ki tenn ma, wee n fir ki mɔɔn tibɔŋann nmɔn naah kpaan nin n mɔɔn ti man ki laa san bijawaami.

eng: Tychicus, my loved brother and faithful servant of the Lord, can inform you about my situation and what Im doing.
local: Ti nabig jiɛkaag Tachikusi wan ye ti Yudaau a toon tun bamɔndaau nan li wɔɔn ni n bɔr biɛn, wee ni mu nbiɛ maah ye wan nin maah tun nan.

eng: Ive sent him for this reason—so that you will know about us. He can reassure you.
local: Nan bu wee n nan tun u ni ban nin ye un nan wɔɔn ni taah be man, ki pɔɔg ni gbanann.

eng: May there be peace with the brothers and sisters as well as love with the faith that comes from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ti Baa Uwonbɔr nin ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya a posɔɔm, nin u jiɛm, nin yada li be ti nabumin biɛn bu.

eng: May grace be with all those who love our Lord Jesus Christ forever.
local: Uwonbɔr a nyunyunbasanl li be ban biɛn jiɛ ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya nin njiɛm man kaa jɔɔ diɛmin.

eng: Therefore, if there is any encouragement in Christ, any comfort in love, any sharing in the Spirit, any sympathy.
local: Ni ye ni jɔɔ ngbananpɔɔn man nyan ni mɔkpaam man wee ni jɔɔ nin Masiya n ke, wee u bamin che ni sufu sɔɔn, wee ni jɔɔ nɔɔnintab nin kinaaŋin ke, wee ki jɔɔ nbinben ŋan nin tab ki san tab a nyunyunbaag ke.

eng: complete my joy by thinking the same way, having the same love, being united, and agreeing with each other.
local: ni bi li mɔŋim pam ni ye ni potiɛl bi nann tab, wee ni jɔɔ njiɛm nba, ki jɔɔ kinaaŋ kiba nin ibonn iba.

eng: Dont do anything for selfish purposes, but with humility think of others as better than yourselves.
local: Ni laa jɔɔ npooton a bam bee ki far igbingban ni, amaa ni li jɔɔ jiininba ki li tenn ni kpiɛtiib jilima ki jo ni ba.

eng: Instead of each person watching out for their own good, watch out for what is better for others.
local: Uba n laa che u baga be u binba a ŋam bu amaa un che u baga li be u kpiɛtiib mu a bam bu.

eng: Adopt the attitude that was in Christ Jesus.
local: Ni che ni binbem li be ke Masiya a binbemin:.

eng: Though he was in the form of God, he did not consider being equal with God something to exploit.
local: U jɔɔ Uwonbɔr a nunaŋ le, amaa waa tiɛr ke un ta u ba kpaag nin Uwonbɔr bee niwann nan wee u li choo.

eng: But he emptied himself by taking the form of a slave and by becoming like human beings. When he found himself in the form of a human.
local: amaa u ŋa u baa le ke waa ye niba le-n, le ki jɔɔ uyom a binbem, le ki jɔɔ uninfosaal a nunaŋ.

eng: he humbled himself by becoming obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross.
local: Waah nan kpenn ki gaa uninfosaal a gbanann nin bu, le u nan jiin u ba tum, le ki chee nkum a mɔb, hali ki kpo lidapunpunl bu!.

eng: Therefore, God highly honored him and gave him a name above all names.
local: Ni ma bu le che Uwonbɔr don u papaab le ki sei u liyinl lan yab jon iyin biɛn.

eng: so that at the name of Jesus everyone in heaven, on earth, and under the earth might bow.
local: ke ni ye bi nan pur Yisa a yinl ke idun biɛn li gbaan tum, papaab nin tum nin kutingbɔŋ kan be tumtum nan.

eng: and every tongue confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
local: le lilanbil biɛn na li pag npaan ni ke Yisa Masiya le ye Uyudaan, wee Uwonbɔr wan ye ti Baa n kan kupag.

eng: Therefore, my loved ones, just as you always obey me, not just when I am present but now even more while I am away, carry out your own salvation with fear and trembling.
local: Ni ma bu n jɔtiib, naah jɔɔ limɔcheel n-yonn man wee n be ni ban nin, ni le li jɔɔ limɔcheel nmɔn n-yonn man wee maa nan be ni ban na, ni tugir ki li tun ke bininfob ban kan nŋmarimin ki li san bijawaam ki li jegila.

eng: God is the one who enables you both to want and to actually live out his good purposes.
local: Uwonbɔr le tun nin ni le ki che ni tun ni U bamin ke waah ban ni tun man.

eng: Do everything without grumbling and arguing.
local: Ni li tun niwann biɛn na ki laa ŋulin ni bee ki far limɔkpel nin tab bi.

eng: so that you may be blameless and pure, innocent children of God surrounded by people who are crooked and corrupt. Among these people you shine like stars in the world.
local: wee ki laa jɔɔ igalin ni ki li be kasi, ke Uwonbɔr a buwaab ban kaa jɔɔ igalin, naah be dulinya biig kan yaan nin titoonbirdam a sisiigin nin bu, wee ni li nyagin ke iŋmabil yan be kutingbɔŋ nan yaan nin.

eng: because you hold on to the word of life. This will allow me to say on the day of Christ that I havent run for nothing or worked for nothing.
local: ke naah ta limiɛfol a bɔr wɔɔn bi man nin, naah li ŋa man wee n li fir fa ligbingbanl Masiya a jirin daal ke n taguunl nin n baginn kaa gab yɔli.

eng: But even if I am poured out like a drink offering upon the altar of service for your faith, I am glad. Im glad with all of you.
local: Hali ni ye bi kpaarim le wur ke libawol a daam le bi ta mann kumanug ki jiin ni yada kan wee ni jɔɔ nin Uwonbɔr n bu ke, n pool peen le ni mɔm ni biɛn nan bu.

eng: You should be glad about this in the same way. Be glad with me!.
local: Ni ma bu ni li jɔɔ npopeen wee ni li mɔ nin ma.

eng: I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to see you soon so that I may be encouraged by hearing about you.
local: N jɔɔ tama ke ni ye Uyudaan Yisa chee ke n li tun Timoti wee un dan ni ban weem, n mu bi li kan ngbananpɔɔn ni ye n gbir ni bu ke.

eng: I have no one like him. He is a person who genuinely cares about your well-being.
local: Maa ji jɔɔ uba ki kpiɛ u bu, wee u baga sin be ni ni ibamɔn nin.

eng: All the others put their own business ahead of Jesus Christs business.
local: Ban gurin biɛn a baga be bi baantɔɔl a toon yin le, naa ye Yisa Masiya a toon yin ni.

eng: You know his character, how he labors with me for the gospel like a son works with his father.
local: Amaa ni tɔɔl nyi Timoti kaah pɔɔn u ba man, nan bu-n u be ke kibijag kaah be u baa a nintogil man nin le, u terim le tibɔŋann nmɔn a mɔɔnimin.

eng: So he is the one that I hope to send as soon as I find out how things turn out here for me.
local: N jɔɔ tama ke n tun u ni ban le weem ni ye n biɛ n bɔr a sam ke.

eng: I trust in the Lord that I also will visit you soon.
local: Le n jɔɔ tidindann Uyudaan bu ke min tɔɔl li dan daandaan nan.

eng: I think it is also necessary to send Epaphroditus to you. He is my brother, coworker, and fellow soldier; and he is your representative who serves my needs.
local: Amaa n tiɛr ke ni ŋan nin n che n na a big Ipaforɔditusi wan ye n toontunn kpiɛg nin n tɔtog kpiɛg wee ki ji ye ni toom wee ni nan tun u wee u nan terimin n jirin ni ban.

eng: He misses you all, and he was upset because you heard he was sick.
local: U bi ban un kan ni biɛn nan, u sufu kaa dɔ naah nan gbir ke u bu-n bu.

eng: In fact, he was so sick that he nearly died. But God had mercy on him—and not just on him but also on me, because his death would have caused me great sorrow.
local: Ni sin ye ibamɔn le, u nan buŋ ki yin kpo le, amaa le Uwonbɔr san u kunyunyunbaag, naa ye u binba bu, amaa u ji nan san n mu kunyunyunbaaga, le ki nyam npoobiin a booli yin.

eng: Therefore, I am sending him immediately so that when you see him again you can be glad and I wont worry.
local: Ni ma bu n jɔɔ inunman ki ban un jirin ni ban, wee ni ye ni ji kan u ke nin mɔŋ ni wee n mu n nya n potiɛri nin.

eng: So welcome him in the Lord with great joy and show great respect for people like him.
local: Ni gaam u nin nmɔn takpen uyudaan a yinl bu, ki sei bininfob ban be ke u ma nan jilimau.

eng: He risked his life and almost died for the work of Christ, and he did this to make up for the help you couldnt give me.
local: nan bu-n ni nan gur wama nin un kpo Masiya a toon yin bu, ki ta u miɛfol ki tun ki seim naah kaa bi li fir terim nan ni.

eng: From Paul and Timothy, slaves of Christ Jesus. To all those in Philippi who are Gods people in Christ Jesus, along with your supervisors and servants.
local: Min Pɔɔl nin Timoti, tim ban ye Masiya a yomi, Le sɔb kugbɔŋ nan ki tenn Uwonbɔr a ninfob gannkaab ban be Masiya nin ki be Filipi a tiŋin, ki kpiɛ ban ye biwonjiɛn sanliib nin bititeribin:.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Ti Baa Uwonbɔr nin ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya a nyunyunbasanl nin nposɔɔn li be nin ni.

eng: I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: N tenn Uwonbɔr kunɔɔpoog n-yonn man biɛn wee n tiɛr ni bu.

eng: Im thankful for all of you every time I pray, and its always a prayer full of joy.
local: Iyoo biɛn ni ye n miɛ Uwonbɔr ki tenn ni biɛn nan ke, n miɛ nin nmɔn le.

eng: Im glad because of the way you have been my partners in the ministry of the gospel from the time you first believed it until now.
local: nan bu-n naah terim man tibɔŋann nmɔn a toon yin npiinim ki nan kpaa daandaan nan.

eng: Im sure about this: the one who started a good work in you will stay with you to complete the job by the day of Christ Jesus.
local: n jɔɔ tidindann, ki nyi ke Uwonbɔr wan piin itoon ŋan nan nin ni-n, u yin ŋmag ni man le hali nin n-yonn man wee u na yin diɛ itoon ŋan nmɔn, Masiya a jirin daal.

eng: I have good reason to think this way about all of you because I keep you in my heart. You are all my partners in Gods grace, both during my time in prison and in the defense and support of the gospel.
local: Ni ŋan nin maah tiɛr ni biɛn nan bu, naah be n sufu-n nin bu; maah be libaalin bee maah pag ki wɔɔn ki mann tibɔŋannin, ni biɛn nan por Uwonbɔr a nyunyunbasanlin nin ma.

eng: God is my witness that I feel affection for all of you with the compassion of Christ Jesus.
local: Uwonbɔr le ye n siɛradaau, ki nyi maah ban n kan ni bu man nin Masiya a jiɛmin.

eng: This is my prayer: that your love might become even more and more rich with knowledge and all kinds of insight.
local: N miɛ Uwonbɔr le ke: Ni jiɛm nmɔn n mann ki kpiɛ ki ji kpiɛ ni nlamin nin nbiɛmin.

eng: I pray this so that you will be able to decide what really matters and so you will be sincere and blameless on the day of Christ.
local: wee nin che ni fir ki gann niwann nan ŋan ki be kasi kaa jɔɔ igalin ki nan kpaa Masiya a dan daal.

eng: I pray that you will then be filled with the fruit of righteousness, which comes from Jesus Christ, in order to give glory and praise to God.
local: ki gbee nin nbuchin binben man nyan Yisa Masiya ni, ki li ye kupag ki tenn Uwonbɔr.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I want you to know that the things that have happened to me have actually advanced the gospel.
local: N nabum, n ban ni biɛ ke niwann nan ŋaam nan bu le che tibɔŋann nmɔn fir mɔɔn.

eng: The whole Praetorian Guard and everyone else knows that Im in prison for Christ.
local: Ni ma nan che bitɔtogib ban guu ibɔr niin nin, nin ibɔrniin a ninfob biɛn nan biɛ ke Masiya bu le n be libaalin.

eng: Most of the brothers and sisters have had more confidence through the Lord to speak the word boldly and bravely because of my jail time.
local: N baal nan bu, ni che n nabum takpem ban nɔɔ Uyudaan a samin, pɔɔg bi gbanann ki pag Uwonbɔr a bɔrin nin lipoobil kaa san bijawaami.

eng: Some certainly preach Christ with jealous and competitive motives, but others preach with good motives.
local: Ni ye ibamɔn le ke, biba mɔɔn Masiya a bɔr nmɔn ki jɔɔ linunchɔril le nin lipiiponl, amaa le biba mu mɔɔn ti nin ti ŋam bu.

eng: They are motivated by love, because they know that Im put here to give a defense of the gospel.
local: Ban tun nin njiɛmin bi ma nyi ke Uwonbɔr le taam ŋa do ke n ji tibɔŋann nan a siɛra.

eng: the others preach Christ because of their selfish ambition. They are insincere, hoping to cause me more pain while Im in prison.
local: Ban tun nin linunchɔril nin lipiiponl mɔɔn ti nin kujaŋuuŋ le, naa nan ye lipotiɛŋanli, ki tiɛr ke bin ban tibɔr ki jaa min bu n-yonn man wee bi nan baanim tikulorin.

eng: What do I think about this? Just this: since Christ is proclaimed in every possible way, whether from dishonest or true motives, Im glad and Ill continue to be glad.
local: Ke ni niɛ nan yin ŋa baa? Nan kpaa talar le ye baah mɔɔn Masiya a bɔrin nsan man biɛn bu-n, naah ye tipotiɛbir bee ibamɔn a sam buu, Masiya a bɔrin pii mɔɔn na. Mambu ni mɔm le. Nn ni le yin gbaa mɔm le.

eng: Im glad because I know that this will result in my release through your prayers and the help of the Spirit of Jesus Christ.
local: ni ma bu le n nyi ke ni wonmiɛl nin Masiya a Naaŋin yaa terim bu, nan dan n bu nan biɛn li labir ki seim nŋmarim.

eng: It is my expectation and hope that I wont be put to shame in anything. Rather, I hope with daring courage that Christs greatness will be seen in my body, now as always, whether I live or die.
local: N nunman nin n tama ye le ke, n laa ji ifa, amaa wee ki li jɔɔ lipoobil daandaan nan nin iyoo biɛn, hali ni ye n kpo le bee n fo ke ni, n che Masiya a yinl nkan ndom n gbanann nin.

eng: Because for me, living serves Christ and dying is even better.
local: Min bu ke, ni ye n fo be ke, Masiya bu le n be, n mu ti ji kpo ke, ni ye tinyɔɔr le.

eng: If I continue to live in this world, I get results from my work.
local: Ni ye n be ki fo nin n gbanann ke, n toon yin li lo iloon. Nin ni ma biɛn ni n yin gann ni labaa? Maa nyi!.

eng: But I dont know what I prefer. Im torn between the two because I want to leave this life and be with Christ, which is far better.
local: N be niwann nilee nmɔn a sisiigin le: N sufu ban ke n nya dulinya nan yaan ki tan li be Masiya ban, ni ma ŋan takpem;.

eng: However, its more important for me to stay in this world for your sake.
local: Amaa nim bu le ni kpaa talar ke n li be nin tigbanann.

eng: Im sure of this: I will stay alive and remain with all of you to help your progress and the joy of your faith.
local: Ni niɛ bu ni che n biɛ ke n la li be, ki li gbaa be nin ni wee ni jo nintogil nin nmɔn nin yada.

eng: and to increase your pride in Christ Jesus through my presence when I visit you again.
local: wee n ji nan be ni ban ke, ni mɔm man wee ni jɔɔ nin Masiya nan n mann gbeen ni min bu.

eng: Most important, live together in a manner worthy of Christs gospel. Do this, whether I come and see you or Im absent and hear about you. Do this so that you stand firm, united in one spirit and mind as you struggle together to remain faithful to the gospel.
local: Nan biɛn ŋa ke, ni che ni binbem li be ke Masiya a bɔŋann nin kaah wɔɔn ni man ni. Wee ni ye n dan ni ban ki nan gɔnn ni bee maa dan ni wee ki sin gbir ni bu ke, n li nyi ke ni si nbamɔm nin kinaaŋ kiba, ki lagin jɔɔ lipotiɛl liba ki kɔn ni yada wan wee ni jɔɔ tibɔŋann nin bu.

eng: That way, you wont be afraid of anything your enemies do. Your faithfulness and courage are a sign of their coming destruction and your salvation, which is from God.
local: naah kaa san bininfob ban fann ni nan. Ni ma ye siɛra ki wɔɔn bi ke baa li kan nnyaŋim mi, amaa nim li kan n nŋmarim man nyan Uwonbɔr ban.

eng: God has generously granted you the privilege, not only of believing in Christ but also of suffering for Christs sake.
local: Uwonbɔr pii sei ni nsan ke ni li tun tenn Masiya wee ni laa pa ye naah ŋa u yada n yaa binba, amaa ke ni ji fala mu u bu.

eng: You are having the same struggle that you saw me face and now hear that Im still facing.
local: Ke ni tɔɔl kaah be ligbaal lan yaan wee ni kam wee n be-n, daandaan nan n le la be li ma yaan le nan.

eng: So then, my brothers and sisters, be glad in the Lord. Its no trouble for me to repeat the same things to you because they will help keep you on track.
local: Ni joorimin n nabum, ni che ni li mɔ ni Uyudaan buu! Naa ye tibɔr mugkaar ki seim nin n ji sɔb maah nan sɔb nan sei ni-n jigin ni, ni ma yin guu ni.

eng: Watch out for the dogs. Watch out for people who do evil things. Watch out for those who insist on circumcision, which is really mutilation.
local: Ni li nyi bininfob ban ye ibɔ nan, ki ye titoonbirdam wee ki jiil bi gbanann chɔr nan bu.

eng: We are the circumcision. We are the ones who serve by Gods Spirit and who boast in Christ Jesus. We dont put our confidence in rituals performed on the body.
local: Tim le ye ban gaa ibamɔn a pun jiil nmɔn, tim ban jiɛn Uwonbɔr kinaaŋin nin, le ki jɔɔ jilima taah be nin Masiya n bu, tim kaa jɔɔ tidindann tigbanann bu.

eng: though I have good reason to have this kind of confidence. If anyone else has reason to put their confidence in physical advantages, I have even more.
local: min tɔɔl jɔɔ nan bu che n jɔɔ ti ma a dindann. Ni ma bu ni ye uninfo uba len ke u jɔɔ tidindann tigbanann bu ke, min jɔɔ takpem ki jon wa:.

eng: I was circumcised on the eighth day. I am from the people of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a Hebrew of the Hebrews. With respect to observing the Law, Im a Pharisee.
local: Baah nan mam a ween iniin daal le bi nan jii n punl, n ye Iziral a ninfou le, ki nyan Bɛnjamɛnn a bolin, ki ye Hiiburu a ninfou tob tob; ki jiin nsiim mu paam ke, n ye Farasii le;.

eng: With respect to devotion to the faith, I harassed the church. With respect to righteousness under the Law, Im blameless.
local: ni ye nsiim nmɔn a ŋmagim a nunmanl bu ke, n nan mugir biwonjiɛm a laguŋ; ni ye nbuchin binben nin limɔcheel ki tenn nsiimin ke, maa jɔɔ igalin ni.

eng: These things were my assets, but I wrote them off as a loss for the sake of Christ.
local: Amaa nan biɛn nan ye tinyɔɔr ki seimin daandaan nan min lig ki miin ni ye yɔli le, Masiya bu.

eng: But even beyond that, I consider everything a loss in comparison with the superior value of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have lost everything for him, but what I lost I think of as sewer trash, so that I might gain Christ.
local: Ni la yab ki jon ni tɔɔ, maah ta niwann biɛn gab nin maah gaa Masiya n yudaau wan jɔɔ tinyɔɔr ki jon niwann biɛn nin, uma bu le n ta niwann biɛn gab. Min ban ke ni ye lifatanpol a mɔɔr le naah li ŋa man wee n fir ki gaa Masiya.

eng: and be found in him. In Christ I have a righteousness that is not my own and that does not come from the Law but rather from the faithfulness of Christ. It is the righteousness of God that is based on faith.
local: wee ki li be nin u, wee ki laa jɔɔ min tɔɔl a buchin binbem man nyan nsiimin yaan ni, amaa maah ŋa Masiya yada n bu le n jɔɔ nbuchin binben man nyan Uwonbɔr ban n yada n bu.

eng: The righteousness that I have comes from knowing Christ, the power of his resurrection, and the participation in his sufferings. It includes being conformed to his death.
local: N ban n li nyi Masiya le nin u kum a fiim a pɔɔmin ki li jɔɔ nɔɔnintab nin u, ki ji fala wan wee u nan jin nin, ki li be ke uma nin u kumin.

eng: so that I may perhaps reach the goal of the resurrection of the dead.
local: ni ye niwann biɛn ke, n na li kan nkum a fiim.

eng: Its not that I have already reached this goal or have already been perfected, but I pursue it, so that I may grab hold of it because Christ grabbed hold of me for just this purpose.
local: Naa wɔɔn ke min nyaŋ ni niɛ biɛn le, bee min yaa binbem ŋan ki tan diɛ, amaa n pɔɔn nba le ki gbaar n choo nan bu wee Masiya nan choo min.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I myself dont think Ive reached it, but I do this one thing: I forget about the things behind me and reach out for the things ahead of me.
local: N nabum, maa tiɛr ke n baan tɔɔl a nɔɔ la ŋub ni. Amaa maah ŋa man ye nan le: N tam nan pii tun jon nin bu le ki gbaar ban nan la be n nintogilin bu.

eng: The goal I pursue is the prize of Gods upward call in Christ Jesus.
local: n jɔɔ inunman le ki gu chaa n num kaah paa nan bu-n ban ke n tan pii tiyɔr tan bu wee Uwonbɔr yim papaab Masiya bu-n.

eng: So all of us who are spiritually mature should think this way, and if anyone thinks differently, God will reveal it to him or her.
local: Tim ban biɛn chegir Uwonbɔr a samin nin li jɔɔ potiɛl liba ti sufu ni. Ni ye ni potiɛi kaa nan chee nan bu ke, Uwonbɔr li che ni biɛ ni taai.

eng: Only lets live in a way that is consistent with whatever level we have reached.
local: Ni le yin che ti li be nin taah nan kan nan nin.

eng: Brothers and sisters, become imitators of me and watch those who live this way—you can use us as models.
local: N nabum, nim nin ni tabin biɛn li nɔɔ maah mag man ki wɔɔn ni nna, wee ki biɛ ban a binbem nɔɔ nsan man wee ti nan sei ni-n.

eng: As I have told you many times and now say with deep sadness, many people live as enemies of the cross.
local: A li ke maah pii gbaa bei ni man nin, hali ki nin bei ni nin tinyinyinn ke, bininfob biba a binbem ŋa Masiya a dapunpunlin a dataag le.

eng: Their lives end with destruction. Their god is their stomach, and they take pride in their disgrace because their thoughts focus on earthly things.
local: Bi na yin joor nŋmi-n le, bi weem le ye bi pooi, le bi pag ye bi fai. Bi potiɛl biɛn be dulinya nan a wan yɔɔrin le.

eng: Our citizenship is in heaven. We look forward to a savior that comes from there—the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Amaa tim ye papaab a tinbum le. Ti ŋa sili le ki guu ufeer wan yin nya niin ki dan nin, Uma ye Uyudaan Yisa Masiya.

eng: He will transform our humble bodies so that they are like his glorious body, by the power that also makes him able to subject all things to himself.
local: Uma wan ta u pɔɔm ki lagin niwann biɛn u nintogilin, u li kpenn ti gbanann tan kaa pɔɔ-n ki ŋa ti u jilima a gbanann.

eng: Therefore, my brothers and sisters whom I love and miss, who are my joy and crown, stand firm in the Lord. Loved ones.
local: Ni ma bu n nabum, nim ban wee n ban wee ki yuur ni kam nan, nim li ye n mɔm nin n naan yuchigirig, njɔtiib, ni ma bu le ni kpaan ni mann sir nbamɔm Uyudaan a samin!.

eng: I urge Euodia and I urge Syntyche to come to an agreement in the Lord.
local: N balin Yuwodiɛ le ki balin Sintiche ke, Uyudaan bu bin pɔɔn biba ki li jɔɔ nmɔkpaau.

eng: Yes, and Im also asking you, loyal friend, to help these women who have struggled together with me in the ministry of the gospel, along with Clement and the rest of my coworkers whose names are in the scroll of life.
local: Ni ye ibamɔn le n bei nim ban ye n naajadaag tug tab bamɔm nan, ni ter bipiib ban pɔɔn biba ki kpiɛ n bu wee ti mɔɔn tibɔŋann nan na, nin Kilɛmenn nin ban biɛn ye n toontunn tabin, wee bi yin be limiɛfol a gbɔŋin yaan nin.

eng: Be glad in the Lord always! Again I say, be glad!.
local: Ni che ni li mɔ ni naah be Uyudaan nin iyoo biɛn na. N ji yin mann bei ni le ke: Ni che ni li mɔ na!.

eng: Let your gentleness show in your treatment of all people. The Lord is near.
local: Ni ta ni binbenŋamin ki che ni li ye siɛra ki sei bininfob biɛn na. Ke Uyudaan malin na.

eng: Dont be anxious about anything; rather, bring up all of your requests to God in your prayers and petitions, along with giving thanks.
local: Ni laa jɔɔ npotiɛ bii-n ni niwann niba bu, amaa ki li miɛ Uwonbɔr naah ban nan bu, ki li tenn U kunɔɔpoog, ki bei U naah ban nan.

eng: Then the peace of God that exceeds all understanding will keep your hearts and minds safe in Christ Jesus.
local: Le Uwonbɔr a posɔɔm, man yab ki lagir uninfosaal a biɛm bu-n le che ni ŋmag Masiya ni sufu ni nin ni potiɛlin.

eng: From now on, brothers and sisters, if anything is excellent and if anything is admirable, focus your thoughts on these things: all that is true, all that is holy, all that is just, all that is pure, all that is lovely, and all that is worthy of praise.
local: Ni joorimin, n nabum, nan ye ibamɔn, nin nan ye jilima, nin nan ŋan, nin nan be kasi, nin nan ye njiɛm, nin linungbeel, ni ye niwann ŋan ki tan lagir bee ki be kasi ke, ni li tiɛr tiwann nmɔn buu.

eng: Practice these things: whatever you learned, received, heard, or saw in us. The God of peace will be with you.
local: Niwann nan wee ni tinn n ban bee ki gaa n ban bee ki gbir n ban nin ni li jɔɔ tun itoon na man. Wee nposɔɔn a Wonbɔr win li be nin ni.

eng: I was very glad in the Lord because now at last you have shown concern for me again.
local: Uyudaan bu ni mɔŋim pam nin n-yonn takpem man jon wee ni ji nan mann wɔɔn ni baga kaah be n ni man. Ni ye ibamɔn le, ni baga be n ni, amaa naa jɔɔ npaan man wee ni ta wɔɔn le.

eng: Im not saying this because I need anything, for I have learned how to be content in any circumstance.
local: Naa ye maah lann niba bu le n pag man nin, amaa n tinn le ki che n num gbee maah jɔɔ nan n-yonn biɛn nin.

eng: I know the experience of being in need and of having more than enough; I have learned the secret to being content in any and every circumstance, whether full or hungry or whether having plenty or being poor.
local: N nyi maah kaa nan jɔɔ niba ke ni ye man, ki ji nyi maah nan jɔɔ takpem mu ke ni ye man. N tinn le ki nyi liwool lan ye linungbeel naah ye man niwann biɛn nin, ni baga kaa be maah jin gbee bee maah choon nin nkomi, ni baga kaa be maah jɔɔ takpem bee maah kaa jɔɔ.

eng: I can endure all these things through the power of the one who gives me strength.
local: N li fir tun niwann biɛn Masiya kaah seim ngbananpɔɔn man nin bu.

eng: Still, you have done well to share my distress.
local: Amaa ni nan tun tiŋann pam nin naah nan terim n bɔr mugkaarin.

eng: You Philippians know from the time of my first mission work in Macedonia how no church shared in supporting my ministry except you.
local: Nan kpiɛ ni bu, nim Filipi yaab nyi, maah nan nyan Masedoniya, n-yonn man nan jon wee n nan chonn mɔɔn tibɔŋannin nin, biwonjiɛm a laguŋ kiba kaa la nyi ki terim niba nseimin nin ngamin ni, see nim a binba;.

eng: You sent contributions repeatedly to take care of my needs even while I was in Thessalonica.
local: hali maah la nan be Tesalonika n-yonn man wee ki nan ban literilin, ni le nan gbaa terim le.

eng: Im not hoping for a gift, but I am hoping for a profit that accumulates in your account.
local: Naa ye n ban ipiin le, amaa n ban ni kan tinyɔɔr tan yin kpiɛ naah jɔɔ nan nin le.

eng: I now have plenty and it is more than enough. I am full to overflowing because I received the gifts that you sent from Epaphroditus. Those gifts give off a fragrant aroma, an acceptable sacrifice that pleases God.
local: N gaa tiyɔr takpem ke ti yab tan lagira; n nin jɔɔ nan biɛn wee n ban, maah gaa ipiin yan biɛn wee ni nan ta sein Ipaforɔditusi n ni. Ki ye kumanug kan jɔɔ nbaam mɔɔm wee Uwonbɔr a num gbee le.

eng: My God will meet your every need out of his riches in the glory that is found in Christ Jesus.
local: Le n Wonbɔru li ta U jilima a jɔɔm man be Masiya nin ki sei ni.

eng: Let glory be given to God our Father forever and always. Amen.
local: Ti Baa Uwonbɔr n gaam kupag n-yonn nin n-yonn. Ibamɔn.

eng: Greet all Gods people in Christ Jesus. The brothers and sisters with me send you their greeting.
local: Ni poor Uwonbɔr a ninfogannkaabin biɛn Masiya a yinl buu. N nabum man be n ban nin poor ni.

eng: All Gods people here, especially those in Caesars household, send you their greeting.
local: Uwonbɔr a ninfogannkaab biɛn poor ni, naah tɔɔ ban bu ubɔr Siiza a niin yaab ke n poor ni nbamɔma.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirits.
local: Uyudaan Yisa Masiya a nyunyunbasanl li be ni naamin. Ibamɔn.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, and Timothy our brother.
local: Pɔɔl wan ye Masiya a toom Uwonbɔr a bam bu-n, nin ti na a big Timoti.

eng: To the holy and faithful brothers and sisters in Christ in Colossae. Grace and peace to you from God our Father.
local: Le sɔb kugbɔŋ nan ki tenn nim ban ye ti nabum ban be kasi ki si bogil liba Masiya ni Kolosiya a tiŋin ni. Ti Baa Uwonbɔr a nyunyunbasanl nin u posɔɔm li be nin ni.

eng: We always give thanks to God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you.
local: Ti tenn Uwonbɔr wan ye ti Yudaau Yisa a Baa-n kunɔɔpoog, iyoo yan biɛn wee ti miɛ Uwonbɔr ki tenn ni-n.

eng: Weve done this since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and your love for all Gods people.
local: nan bu-n ti gbir naah ŋa Yisa yada man, nin naah jiɛ Uwonbɔr a ninfo gannkaabin man na.

eng: You have this faith and love because of the hope reserved for you in heaven. You previously heard about this hope through the true message, the good news.
local: yada nin njiɛm man bun ki nya tama kan dɔ papaab ki guu ni, wee ni pii gbir ibamɔn a mɔleen yan ye tibɔŋann nin.

eng: which has come to you. This message has been bearing fruit and growing among you since the day you heard and truly understood Gods grace, in the same way that it is bearing fruit and growing in the whole world.
local: wee ki dan ni ban nin. Tibɔŋann nmɔn lo iloon le ki yabirig dulinya nan yaan biɛn, ke naah nan ti tun man ni sisiigin lidaal lan wee ni nan gbir ti, ki biɛ Uwonbɔr a nyunyunbasanlin nin libamɔn yan be ipoolin nin biɛn.

eng: You learned it from Epaphras, who is the fellow slave we love and Christs faithful minister for your sake.
local: Ni nan tinn Uwonbɔr a nyunyunbasanl nmɔn ti toontunn kpiɛg Epafarasi wan wee ti ban win ban le, wan sir ti taalin ki ye Yisa a toontunnu wan si bogil liba-n.

eng: He informed us of your love in the Spirit.
local: le uma ji bei ti naah jɔɔ njiɛm Kinaaŋin man.

eng: Because of this, since the day we heard about you, we havent stopped praying for you and asking for you to be filled with the knowledge of Gods will, with all wisdom and spiritual understanding.
local: Ni niɛ nan bu, lidaal lan wee ti gbir ni bu-n, taa ta Uwonbɔr a miɛm ni bu ki jiɛn ni, le ki le miɛ Uwonbɔr ke Un gbeen ni nnyinyin man ye u bam ki sei ni kinaaŋ a lam nin nbiɛm.

eng: Were praying this so that you can live lives that are worthy of the Lord and pleasing to him in every way: by producing fruit in every good work and growing in the knowledge of God.
local: Ti miɛ ni niɛ le ke ni fir be nbinben man kpaan ki gbee Uyudaan a num niwann biɛn nin: Ki lo iloon yan ye itoon ŋan biɛn a looi, ki yabirig nin Uwonbɔr a nyinyim.

eng: by being strengthened through his glorious might so that you endure everything and have patience.
local: Uma Uwonbɔr wan jɔɔ ipɔɔn biɛn nan n pɔɔg ni gbanann, U pag takpoŋin bu wee ni li jɔɔ pɔɔninba nin limɔril nin nmɔn.

eng: and by giving thanks with joy to the Father. He made it so you could take part in the inheritance, in light granted to Gods holy people.
local: wee ni li tenn ti Baa Uwonbɔr kunɔɔpoog, wan sei ni npaan ke nim nin uninfo gannkaabin nan por lifaal lan be nwonween a naam a yerin nin yaan nin.

eng: He rescued us from the control of darkness and transferred us into the kingdom of the Son he loves.
local: Nan bu-n U fee ti libunbɔnl a pɔɔmin na, le ki ta ti ki kɔɔn u bijiɛkaag a naam a yerin nin.

eng: He set us free through the Son and forgave our sins.
local: U big nmɔn le sei ti nkpenim a manug kan ye tibir a jiɛn per.

eng: The Son is the image of the invisible God, the one who is first over all creation.
local: Masiya le ye Uwonbɔr wan wee taa ga win a nunaŋ, uma ye kibininkpeeg kan yab jon kuwonaaŋ biɛn.

eng: Because all things were created by him: both in the heavens and on the earth, the things that are visible and the things that are invisible. Whether they are thrones or powers, or rulers or authorities, all things were created through him and for him.
local: Uma bu le niwann biɛn nan naan: Nan be papaab nin tum, nan wee ti ga nin nan wee taa ga, naah ye kunaangbɔŋ bee ipɔɔn bee nnaam a pɔɔm bee tininkper a pɔɔm; uma nan naan niwann biɛn le ki ye niwann biɛn.

eng: He existed before all things, and all things are held together in him.
local: U nan be ke niwann niba kaa la nan be, uma bu le niwann biɛn choo tab ki ŋmag.

eng: He is the head of the body, the church, who is the beginning, the one who is firstborn from among the dead so that he might occupy the first place in everything.
local: Uma ye tigbanann a yudaau, biwonjiɛm a laguŋ; ki ye npiinim nin kibininkpeeg kan nyan bitakpiib a sisiigin. Naah li ŋa man wee u li ye wan chinn niwann biɛn ni.

eng: Because all the fullness of God was pleased to live in him.
local: Nan bu-n, Uwonbɔr nan jɔɔ linungbeel le u bu, U binbemin biɛn kaah nan gbee u ni-n.

eng: and he reconciled all things to himself through him— whether things on earth or in the heavens. He brought peace through the blood of his cross.
local: Uma bu le Uwonbɔr nan che niwann biɛn jir mɔŋ nin tab, Yisa a cham man nan nyan lidapunpunl bu-n le che nposɔɔn dan.

eng: Once you were alienated from God and you were enemies with him in your minds, which was shown by your evil actions.
local: Iyoo iba naa nan kpiɛ Uwonbɔr a ninfobin ni, ki ye Uwonbɔr a dataam ni potiɛlin nin ni binben biimin bu.

eng: But now he has reconciled you by his physical body through death, to present you before God as a people who are holy, faultless, and without blame.
local: Amaa daandaan nan, Masiya a gbanann a kum nbu le Uwonbɔr jir ki mɔŋ nin ni, ke Un ta ni sei wee ni li be kasi u numin, ki laa jɔɔ tijaginn wee bin galin ni.

eng: But you need to remain well established and rooted in faith and not shift away from the hope given in the good news that you heard. This message has been preached throughout all creation under heaven. And I, Paul, became a servant of this good news.
local: ni ye ni yin gbaa be nin ni yada ke, ki si chib, kaa fɔɔr tama kan wee tibɔŋann nin ŋmagin ke, ti ma ye tibɔŋann tan wee ni gbirin, wee bi mɔɔn ti sei kuwonaaŋ biɛn dulinya nan yaan, tan bu wee min Pɔɔl kpann utoontunn.

eng: Now Im happy to be suffering for you. Im completing what is missing from Christs sufferings with my own body. Im doing this for the sake of his body, which is the church.
local: Daandaan nan ni mɔm, nin maah jin fala kan nim bu-n, le n la gbee nin fala nmɔn le n gbanann nin ki jin nan la paar Masiya a fala a jimin paam, u gbanann nmɔn le ye biwonjiɛm a laguŋ.

eng: I became a servant of the church by Gods commission, which was given to me for you, in order to complete Gods word.
local: N nin kpann biwonjiɛm a laguŋin a toontunnu le, litoonl lan wee Uwonbɔr ta seimin, ke n ta U mɔleen yin biɛn ki sei ni.

eng: Im completing it with a secret plan that has been hidden for ages and generations but which has now been revealed to his holy people.
local: tibɔwoonkaar tan wee Uwonbɔr nan woon ibin nin n-yonn man nan jon nin, amaa wee U nin kpiir ki wɔɔn U ninfogannkaabin daandaan nan.

eng: God wanted to make the glorious riches of this secret plan known among the Gentiles, which is Christ living in you, the hope of glory.
local: Bininfogannkaab nmɔn le Uwonbɔr nan gann ke bin kpiir liwool a bɔrin ki wɔɔn ban kaa ye Juu yaabin, liwool a pag kan yabin, ni ma ye Masiya wan be nin ni-n, ki ye kupag a tama-n.

eng: This is what we preach as we warn and teach every person with all wisdom so that we might present each one mature in Christ.
local: Yisa nmɔn le ti mɔɔn, ki kpaan bininfob ki wɔɔn bi nlam a booli biɛn, naah li ŋa man wee ti ŋa uninfob biɛn kasi ki sei Uwonbɔr, Masiya ni.

eng: I work hard and struggle for this goal with his energy, which works in me powerfully.
local: Ni niɛ nan bu le n tun ki gbaar nin u pɔɔm biɛn man pɔɔ lagir ki be nni ki tun nin.

eng: I want you to know how much I struggle for you, for those in Laodicea, and for all who havent known me personally.
local: Nan bu-n n ban ni biɛ maah gbaar nim nin Laodisiya yaab bu man le, nin ban kaa laa nyi kan min tɔɔlin.

eng: My goal is that their hearts would be encouraged and united together in love so that they might have all the riches of assurance that come with understanding, so that they might have the knowledge of the secret plan of God, namely Christ.
local: N lol ye n che bi sufu le npɔɔg, wee bi lagin tab nin njiɛm, wee bi li jɔɔ nbiɛm man yab, wee ki li fir biɛ Uwonbɔr a bɔwoonkaar ti ma ye Masiya.

eng: All the treasures of wisdom and knowledge are hidden in him.
local: uma ban le nlamgɔrikaam nin nnyinyin gbee le ki woo.

eng: Im telling you this so that no one deceives you with convincing arguments.
local: N bei ni ni niɛ le, ni laa che uba n ta limɔkpel lan nann ibamɔn nin ki lar ni.

eng: because even though I am absent physically, Im with you in spirit. Im happy to see the discipline and stability of your faith in Christ.
local: Nan bu-n, hali maah kaa be ni ban nin tigbanann ni, n be ni ban kinaaŋin le ni mɔm, le ban n kan naah si nbamɔm man nin naah ŋmag ni yada-n man kenken Masiya ni.

eng: So live in Christ Jesus the Lord in the same way as you received him.
local: Ni ma bu, naah pii nan gaa Masiya ke Uyudaan nan, ni li gbaa be u ban na.

eng: Be rooted and built up in him, be established in faith, and overflow with thanksgiving just as you were taught.
local: ki baan inyaan ki yabig nin uma, ki pɔɔg ni yada-n ke baah nan wɔɔn ni man nin, ki che ni nɔɔpoog li yaba ki tenn Uwonbɔr.

eng: See to it that nobody enslaves you with philosophy and foolish deception, which conform to human traditions and the way the world thinks and acts rather than Christ.
local: Ni laa che uba n ta uninfosaal a biɛm man kaa jɔɔ nyɔɔrin ki lar ni kɔɔn tiyomirin ni, ni ma nyan bininfob a kaalin le nin kutingbɔŋ nan a maabiyiɛrugin, naa nyan Yisa ban ni.

eng: All the fullness of deity lives in Christs body.
local: Ni ma bu Uwonbɔr a nunaŋ be Masiya a gbanann nin le waah nan ye uninfo-n.

eng: And you have been filled by him, who is the head of every ruler and authority.
local: le Uwonbɔr ta Masiya le ki gbeen ni, wan ye npɔɔn biɛn nin tininkper a pɔɔm a yudaau win.

eng: In him you were also circumcised with a circumcision not administered by human hands. The circumcision of Christ is realized in the stripping away of the whole self dominated by sin.
local: Masiya ni le ni kan lipunjiil, ki nyan tibir a binbemin, naa ye lipunjiil lan wee bininfosaalib ta bi nɔɔi ki jii amaa Masiya le jii ni.

eng: You were buried with him through baptism and raised with him through faith in the power of God, who raised him from the dead.
local: n-yonn man wee bi nan lagin pii ni nin Masiya Uwonbɔr a nyunfulin ni, wee ni ji fii nkumin nin Masiya ni yada-n Uwonbɔr a pɔɔm man nan fii-n u nkumin ni.

eng: When you were dead because of the things you had done wrong and because your body wasnt circumcised, God made you alive with Christ and forgave all the things you had done wrong.
local: Ni nan ye bitakpiib le ni birin n-yonn iba, le kaa jɔɔ lipunjiil a bir a binbemin, le Uwonbɔr che ni jɔɔ limiɛfol Masiya ni. Le ki jiɛn per ti biɛn nan a bir.

eng: He destroyed the record of the debt we owed, with its requirements that worked against us. He canceled it by nailing it to the cross.
local: Uwonbɔr nan pir nsiim nin mi sɔbim man kaa nan chee sei ti-n, wee ki kɔn nin ti nle ki choo mi nyan le ki kpaa mi lidapunpunl bu.

eng: When he disarmed the rulers and authorities, he exposed them to public disgrace by leading them in a triumphal parade.
local: Masiya kaah nan nyaŋ bitindam nin tininkper a pɔɔmin, u nan nyan bi npaan ni le ki che bininfob biɛn kan bi le ki ŋa bi tiyomirin waah nan nyaŋ bi lidapunpunl bu-n.

eng: So dont let anyone judge you about eating or drinking or about a festival, a new moon observance, or sabbaths.
local: Mambu, ni laa che uba n ji ni tibɔr naah ji tijiir tan bee naah nyu nan bu bee ki jiin liwonjiɛnl a chiig paam bee uŋmapɔɔn a chiig bee likpakɔɔl daal a chiig bu.

eng: These religious practices are only a shadow of what was coming—the body that cast the shadow is Christ.
local: Ti nan le ye tiwann tan yin dan nin a jinjiim amaa niwann bamɔn nin be Masiya ni le.

eng: Dont let anyone who wants to practice harsh self-denial and worship angels rob you of the prize. They go into detail about what they have seen in visions and have become unjustifiably arrogant by their selfish way of thinking.
local: Ni laa che uba n ta tibɔkar a jiininba nin malakam a jiɛnim ki lar ni wee ni lann ni yɔri. U yaa daan nɔɔ waah ga nan biɛn tininforin nin le, naa ye kinaaŋin ni, u donn uba u potiɛlin le naa jɔɔ bu.

eng: They dont stay connected to the head. The head nourishes and supports the whole body through the joints and ligaments, so the body grows with a growth that is from God.
local: Waa ji tug nin Masiya wan ye ni yulin ni, wan bu wee tigbanann biɛn tugin, uma ŋmag tigbanann le ti ŋmag tab nin tijiin, le ti yabirig ke Uwonbɔr kaah ban ti li yabirig man.

eng: If you died with Christ to the way the world thinks and acts, why do you submit to rules and regulations as though you were living in the world?.
local: Ni nan lagin ki kpo nin Yisa ki sei kutingbɔŋ a maabiyiɛrugaa, ba ŋaa wee ni la be ke ni ye kutingbɔŋ nan a ninfob lee, ni chee sei kutingbɔŋ nmɔn a siim man ke:.

eng: Dont handle! Dont taste! Dont touch.
local: Laa ŋmagi! Laa lenn ni! Laa maa n lee!?.

eng: All these things cease to exist when they are used. Such rules are human commandments and teachings.
local: Ni niɛ nan biɛn ye ti wonleen le ki yin boon nin taah jɔɔ nan tun, nan bu-n ni ye uninfosaal a siim nin nwɔɔm le.

eng: They look like they are wise with this self-made religion and their self-denial by the harsh treatment of the body, but they are no help against indulging in selfish immoral behavior.
local: Ibamɔn, nsiim nmɔn nann man jɔɔ nlamgɔrikaam le, nin bi tɔɔl a bam a wonjiɛnl, nin bi bɔkar a jiininba, nin baah mug ki ŋmag bi gbanann man, amaa baa ŋmag nsiim man jɔɔ tinyɔɔr ki li nyan bi tigbanann a kɔlisa nin ni.

eng: Therefore, if you were raised with Christ, look for the things that are above where Christ is sitting at Gods right side.
local: Mambu, ni nan fii nin Yisa nkumin na, ni ta ni sufu ki sei paab a naamin a wan yɔɔrin na, nan yaan wee Yisa ka Uwonbɔr a nɔɔjiim paamin.

eng: Think about the things above and not things on earth.
local: Ni ta ni potiɛl ki ŋa paab a naam a wann bu-u, ki laa ta ni potiɛl ki ŋa dulinya nan a wan yɔɔr bu.

eng: You died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
local: Nan bu-n ni kpou, le ni miɛfol woo Masiya ni le ki be Uwonbɔr ban.

eng: When Christ, who is your life, is revealed, then you also will be revealed with him in glory.
local: Masiya wan ye ni miɛfolin nan degirin ke, iyaayoo nim nin uma na li degirin nin kupag.

eng: So put to death the parts of your life that belong to the earth, such as sexual immorality, moral corruption, lust, evil desire, and greed .
local: Mambu ni ku nan ye dulinya nan a binbem man be nin ni na: Nan ye iwanchɔgin toon, nin ni piibanlin bee ni jabanlin, nin tijaginn a toon, nin nmɔsanyunsɔɔm, nin titoonbir nin kujaŋuuŋ ni ma ye libawol manil.

eng: The wrath of God is coming upon disobedient people because of these things.
local: Ni niɛ nan bu Uwonbɔr a ŋuufiiŋ chaan ban tun man nmɔn bu.

eng: You used to live this way, when you were alive to these things.
local: Ni nan ti jɔɔ man a binben n-yonn man wee ni nan be-n.

eng: But now set aside these things, such as anger, rage, malice, slander, and obscene language.
local: Amaa daandaan nan ni kpaa le nin ni choo ni ba nyan ni niɛ biɛn nin, ni ma ye liŋuul, nin kiŋuufiiŋ, nin kininaŋ, nin kutingbiig nin timɔleenbir tan nya ti mɔɔŋi yin.

eng: Dont lie to each other. Take off the old human nature with its practices.
local: Ni laa por tibɔkar ki tenn ni tabi, nan bu-n ni pii pir ni binben kpeg a ŋaarin ki gaba.

eng: and put on the new nature, which is renewed in knowledge by conforming to the image of the one who created it.
local: ki yee nbinben pɔɔn le, nbinbem nmɔn le Uwonbɔr pɔŋir mi nin nyinyimin le mi nann uma wan naan min.

eng: In this image there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcised nor uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave nor free, but Christ is all things and in all people.
local: Ni ma kaa jɔɔ nbɔgirim ban ye Juu yaab nin Girig yaabin, ban jii bi pun nin ban kaa jii bi pun, ban ye bicham nin bidindamin, nin ban jɔɔ kulɔŋ a binbem nin ban jɔɔ kufɔŋ a binbem, biyom nin ban ye bi ba, amaa Masiya le ye bi biɛn le ki be bi biɛn ni.

eng: Therefore, as Gods choice, holy and loved, put on compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience.
local: Mambu, naah ye Uwonbɔr a ninfogannkaabin wee u jiɛ ni ki ŋa ni kasi-n, ni ta linyunyunbasanl nin tiŋann, nin jiininba, nin nbinben ŋan nin limɔril ki kpann daala ki yee u.

eng: Be tolerant with each other and, if someone has a complaint against anyone, forgive each other. As the Lord forgave you, so also forgive each other.
local: Ni li jɔɔ limɔril nin taba, wee ki jiɛn per tab a galin, ki jiɛn per tab ke Uyudaan kaah jiɛn per ni man nin.

eng: And over all these things put on love, which is the perfect bond of unity.
local: Nin tiyeer nan biɛn, nan jon ni biɛn ni ye ni li jiɛ taba, njiɛm li lagin ni biɛn ki ŋmag nin nmɔkpaa man be kasi.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy. To the Thessalonians church that is in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ. Grace and peace to all of you.
local: Min Pɔɔl nin Silasi nin Timoti; Le sɔb kugbɔŋ nan ki tenn Tesalonika a wonjiɛm a laguŋ kan wee ti Baa Uwonbɔr nin ti yudaau Yisa Masiya ye-n; Uwonbɔr a kaar nin nposɔɔn li be nin ni.

eng: The peace of Christ must control your hearts—a peace into which you were called in one body. And be thankful people.
local: Ni che Masiya a posɔɔmin li ŋmag ni sufu, ke naah ye tigbanann tiba a ninfob wee u yin nposɔɔn ni. Ni li tenn Uwonbɔr kunɔɔpooga.

eng: We always thank God for all of you when we mention you constantly in our prayers.
local: Ti le poor Uwonbɔr le ni biɛn nan bu, ki tiɛr ni bu ti wonmiɛlin.

eng: The word of Christ must live in you richly. Teach and warn each other with all wisdom by singing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs. Sing to God with gratitude in your hearts.
local: Ni che Masiya a bɔŋann nin li be nin ni nbamɔma, wee ni li wɔɔn ni tab, ki gbeer tab nin nlamgɔrikaam, ki li gaah ilan, liwonpagil a lan, nin Kinaaŋ a lan nin linungbeel ni sufu ni ki sei Uwonbɔr.

eng: Masters, be just and fair to your slaves, knowing that you yourselves have a master in heaven.
local: Biyudam, ni li ŋaan ni yomi tiŋann nin nan kpaan na, nan bu-n, ni nyi ke ni tɔɔl jɔɔ Uyudaan wan be paab.

eng: This is because we remember your work that comes from faith, your effort that comes from love, and your perseverance that comes from hope in our Lord Jesus Christ in the presence of our God and Father.
local: Ti tiɛr ni bu ti Baa Uwonbɔr ban, ni yada a ŋaam nin ni jiɛm a toon nin ni tama kan wee ni jɔɔ nin ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya nbu le che ni si nbamɔm.

eng: Whatever you do, whether in speech or action, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus and give thanks to God the Father through him.
local: Mambu ni ŋaan nan biɛn ke, naah ye ni mɔleen bee ni toon ke, ni ŋa ni biɛn Uyudaan Yisa a yinl bu, ki li tenn Uwonbɔr wan ye Baa-n kunɔɔpoog u bu.

eng: Keep on praying and guard your prayers with thanksgiving.
local: Ni li ta ni ba ki sei liwonmiɛl, ki li guu ni ba ki tenn Uwonbɔr kunɔɔpooga.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you are loved by God, and we know that he has chosen you.
local: Ti nabum, ti nyi ke ni ye ban wee Uwonbɔr ban le, ki gann ni ki ta ni ŋa U ninfob.

eng: Wives, submit to your husbands in a way that is appropriate in the Lord.
local: Biniinpiib, ni chee sei ni chiɛba, man le kpaan Uyudaan ban.

eng: At the same time, pray for us also. Pray that God would open a door for the word so we can preach the secret plan of Christ—which is why Im in chains.
local: Ki ji li miɛ U ki tenn ti, wee Uwonbɔr n loor nsan ki sei ti mɔleen yin, wee ti fir mɔɔn Masiya a bɔwoonkaarin, nan bu-n, tan bu wee n be libaalin ni.

eng: We know this because our good news didnt come to you just in speech but also with power and the Holy Spirit and with deep conviction. You know as well as we do what kind of people we were when we were with you, which was for your sake.
local: nan bu-n tibɔŋann tan foon ni ban nin, kaa nan ye imɔleen a binba, amaa ti nan jɔɔ npɔɔn le nin Kasi a Naaŋ. Le ban nan mɔɔn ti-n chee ti nin yada. Taah nan be ni ban nin, ni nan nyi ti binbem kaah ye man nim bu.

eng: Husbands, love your wives and dont be harsh with them.
local: Bijab ni li jiɛ ni piiba, ki laa ŋmag bi nin titintann ni.

eng: You became imitators of us and of the Lord when you accepted the message that came from the Holy Spirit with joy in spite of great suffering.
local: Ni nan toog tim nin ti Yudaau a binbem le; nin naah nan ji fala kan nin biɛn yɔli, ni nan gaa tibɔŋann nmɔn le nin npopeen man wee Kasi a Naaŋ ta sei ni-n.

eng: Pray that I might be able to make it as clear as I ought to when I preach.
local: Ni li miɛ Uwonbɔr ki tenn ma wee n fir mɔɔn ti nbamɔm, ke naah kpaa n mɔɔn ti man nin.

eng: Children, obey your parents in everything, because this pleases the Lord.
local: Nbuwaab, ni li cheel ni baam nin ni nam a mɔɔŋi iyoo biɛn na, nan bu-n man le gbeeg Uyudaan a num.

eng: As a result you became an example to all the believers in Macedonia and Achaia.
local: Ni ma bu le che nim kpann limagil ki sei biwonjiɛm ban biɛn be Masedoniya nin Akaya a timin.

eng: Act wisely toward outsiders, making the most of the opportunity.
local: Ni chee ni num li ween nin naah be nin ban kaa nɔɔ Yisa nan, wee ki laa bii ni saŋi yan biɛn wee ni kan ni.

eng: Parents, dont provoke your children in a way that ends up discouraging them.
local: Baam, ni laa to ni buwaab bu, wee bi gbanann ngbɔɔ.

eng: The message about the Lord rang out from you, not only in Macedonia and Achaia but in every place. The news about your faithfulness to God has spread so that we dont even need to mention it.
local: Ti yudaau a bɔŋann nmɔn kaa nan nyan ni ban ki kɔɔ Masedoniya nin Akaya a binba le, amaa naah ŋa Uwonbɔr yada kan nin pii kɔɔ ilog nan biɛn na. Ni ma bu naa ji kpaan ti pag ni ki kpiɛ.

eng: Your speech should always be gracious and sprinkled with insight so that you may know how to respond to every person.
local: Ni che ni bɔr a pagim li gbee nin linyunyunbasanl ki mɔ ke n-yaamin, wee ni li nyi naah li jiin bininfob biɛn a binbaan yin man.

eng: Slaves, obey your masters on earth in everything. Dont just obey like people pleasers when they are watching. Instead, obey with the single motivation of fearing the Lord.
local: Biyom, ni li cheel ni dulinya nan a yudam a mɔɔŋi niwann biɛn na, ni li tun man wee ni laa ye iyoo yan a binba wee bi lig ni, ke bi num ngbee ni, amaa wee ki li tun man nin ni sufu biɛn nin jilima ki tenn Uyudaan na.

eng: People tell us about what sort of welcome we had from you and how you turned to God from idols. As a result, you are serving the living and true God.
local: bininfobin biɛn pag ki jiin naah nan gaa ti man, taah nan dan ni ban n-yonn man nin, nin naah nan jiɛn ni bawoli ki dan Uwonbɔr ban man, ke ni jiɛn Uma ibamɔn a Wonbɔru wan fo-n.

eng: Tychicus, our dearly loved brother, faithful minister, and fellow slave in the Lord, will inform you about everything that has happened to me.
local: Tachikusi li bei ni n bɔr biɛn, u ye ki na big jiɛkaag le wan si bogil liba u toon yin ki ye ti toontunn kpiɛg Uyudaan a toon yin.

eng: Whatever you do, do it from the heart for the Lord and not for people.
local: Ni tun nan biɛn ke, ni li tun nin ni sufu biɛn, ke ni tun tenn Uyudaan le, naa ye uninfosaali.

eng: and you are waiting for his Son from heaven. His Son is Jesus, who is the one he raised from the dead and who is the one who will rescue us from the coming wrath.
local: ki li guu U bija wan yin nyann papaab ki dan nin, wan wee U fiin nkumin nin, Uma ye Yisa wan nyan ti Uwonbɔr a ŋuufiiŋ kan chaan nin yaan.

eng: This is why I sent him to you, so that youll know all about us and so he can encourage your hearts.
local: nan bu wee n tun u ni ban ye ni biɛ ti binbem kaah ye man, wee un pɔɔg ni sufu.

eng: You know that you will receive an inheritance as a reward. You serve the Lord Christ.
local: naah nyi ke ni na li gaa lifaal Uyudaan ban nin wee ni ye tiyɔrin. Ni ma bu Uyudaan Masiya le ni tun ki tenn.

eng: I sent him with Onesimus, our faithful and dearly loved brother, who is one of you. They will let you know about everything here.
local: Uma nin Onesemosi le yin nɔɔ dan, wan ye ti na big jiɛkaag ki si bogil liba-n, ki ye ni ni uba-n. Bi li bei ni nan biɛn ŋaan do.

eng: But evildoers will receive their reward for their evil actions. There is no discrimination.
local: Wan tun titoonbir na li gaa u toonbir nmɔn a yɔr, le naa jɔɔ njiɛm a gannimi.

eng: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner, says hello to you. So does Mark, Barnabas cousin .
local: Arisitakusi, wan wee bi loon u ki kpiɛ n bu-n, u mu poor ni. Le Banabasi a pool a bija Mag mu poor ni.

eng: Jesus, called Justus, also says hello. These are my only fellow workers for Gods kingdom who are Jewish converts. They have been an encouragement to me.
local: Josuwa wan wee bi yi Jasitusi mu poor ni. Bijab bita nmɔn le ye Juu a ninfob ban kpiɛg n bu wee ti tun Uwonbɔr a naam a toon yin nmɔn. Bi sɔŋir n sufu pam.

eng: Epaphras, who is one of you, says hello. Hes a slave of Christ Jesus who always wrestles for you in prayers so that you will stand firm and be fully mature and complete in the entire will of God.
local: Epafarasi, wan ye ni ni uba wee ki ji ye ni toontunn kpiɛg Masiya a toon nin mu poor ni. U miɛ Uwonbɔr le nin linunmanl iyoo biɛn ki tenn ni, ke ni sir kenken ki li ye bininfob chegirikaab ban tun Uwonbɔr a bam.

eng: I can vouch for him that he has worked hard for you and for those in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
local: N jin siɛra ke u sin tun nin linunmanl ki sei nim nin Laodisiya a tiŋ a ninfob nin Herapolisi a tiŋ a ninfoba.

eng: Luke, the dearly loved physician, and Demas say hello.
local: Ti jɔ Lug, wan ye utebirin, uma nin Demasi mu poor ni.

eng: Say hello to the brothers and sisters in Laodicea, along with Nympha and the church that meets in her house.
local: Ni poor ti nabum ban be Laodisiya nna, ki ji poor ti ninsa Ninfa nin biwonjiɛm a laguŋ kan be u niin ni.

eng: After this letter has been read to you publicly, make sure that the church in Laodicea reads it and that you read the one from Laodicea.
local: Ni karin kugbɔŋ nan ki diɛ a bɔɔn ke, ni pɔɔn niba wee bin karin ki, ki sei biwonjiɛm a laguŋ kan be Laodisiya nna wee ni mu n karin kugbɔŋ kan be Laodisiya a wonjiɛm ban nin na.

eng: And tell Archippus, See to it that you complete the ministry that you received in the Lord.
local: Ni bei Achipusi ke Pɔɔn a ba ki diɛ litoonl lan wee Uyudaan nan ta seiŋ ke a tun nin na.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting personally. Remember that Im in prison. Grace be with you.
local: Min, Pɔɔl, n tɔɔl a nɔɔ le n ta ki sɔb ipoor nan. Ni laa tam n baalin bu. Uwonbɔr a nyunyunbasanl li be ni bu.

eng: As you yourselves know, brothers and sisters, our visit with you wasnt a waste of time.
local: Ti nabum, ni tɔɔl nyi ke ti dam ni ban kaa gab yɔli.

eng: On the contrary, we had the courage through God to speak Gods good news in spite of a lot of opposition, although we had already suffered and were publicly insulted in Philippi, as you know.
local: Ni nyi taah nan be Filipi a tiŋin wee bi sugir ti ki jin ti fala man, biba nan gbaar le ke bin gɔɔ ti wɔɔnimin, amaa Uwonbɔr a pɔɔmin le ti kan lipoobil ki mɔɔn U bɔŋann nan ki tenn ni.

eng: Our appeal isnt based on false information, the wrong motives, or deception.
local: Taah bei ni tibɔr tan nan kaa ye kuŋmaruŋi, kaa ji ye ti jɔɔ lipotiɛbiril liba le, kaa ye kularug mu.

eng: Rather, we have been examined and approved by God to be trusted with the good news, and thats exactly how we speak. We arent trying to please people, but we are trying to please God, who continues to examine our hearts.
local: Amaa ti pag le ke ban wee Uwonbɔr ke bi ŋan nin, Uma ta tibɔŋann nmɔn ki ŋa ti nɔɔn, ni ma bu taa ban ti pag ki penn bininfob a sufu amaa ti ban ti penn Uwonbɔr wan magir ti potiɛlin a sufu le.

eng: As you know, we never used flattery, and God is our witness that we didnt have greedy motives.
local: Ni nyi ke taa la nyi ki dan nan pag ni nmɔmɔmi, bee tibɔr tan degin kujaŋuuŋ a bɔri, Uwonbɔr le ye ti siɛra daau.

eng: We didnt ask for special treatment from people—not from you or from others.
local: Taa nan ban bininfob n pag ti, bee ni ni uba n pag ti bee uninfo uba n pag ti. Taah ye Yisa a toon yin ti bi yin ye litugil le ki sei ni.

eng: although we could have thrown our weight around as Christs apostles. Instead, we were gentle with you like a nursing mother caring for her own children.
local: amaa ti nan be le soon, ke upii kaah ŋmag u buwaab man nin.

eng: We were glad to share not only Gods good news with you but also our very lives because we cared for you so much.
local: Taah jiɛ nim takpemin bu le che ti nan mɔɔn Uwonbɔr a bɔŋann nin ki sei ni, naa ye tibɔŋann nin a binba amaa ki ban ti junn ti miɛfol ni bu taah ban nim takpem n bu.

eng: You remember, brothers and sisters, our efforts and hard work. We preached Gods good news to you, while we worked night and day so we wouldnt be a burden on any of you.
local: Ibamɔn buu, n nabum, ni li tiɛr ke taah mɔɔn Uwonbɔr a bɔŋann nin ki tenn nin, ti yaa baginn nin ti pɔɔninba-n; ti tun itoon nin le nween nin kunyiɛg naah li ŋa man wee ti laa ye litugil ki sei ni ni uba.

eng: You and God are witnesses of how holy, just, and blameless we were toward you believers.
local: Nim nin Uwonbɔr le ye ti siɛradam, taah nan be nin nim ban ŋa yada-n, ti nan be kasi le ki jɔɔ nbuchin binben, kaa jɔɔ igbarigi.

eng: Likewise, you know how we treated each of you like a father treats his own children.
local: Ni nyi ke ti le ŋmag nim le ke baa kaah ŋmag u baan tɔɔl a buwaab man nin.

eng: We appealed to you, encouraged you, and pleaded with you to live lives worthy of the God who is calling you into his own kingdom and glory.
local: ki pɔɔgir ni gbanann, ki sɔŋir ni sufu, ki balin ni ke ni li be nbinben ŋan man gbeeg Uwonbɔr wan yin ni ki ta ni kɔɔn U naam man jɔɔ jilima-n a num.

eng: We also thank God constantly for this: when you accepted Gods word that you heard from us, you welcomed it for what it truly is. Instead of accepting it as a human message, you accepted it as Gods message, and it continues to work in you who are believers.
local: Ti mu le poor Uwonbɔr le iyoo biɛn, nan bu-n, naah gaa Uwonbɔr a bɔr tan wee ni gbir ti ban nin, ni chee sei tibɔr nmɔn le ke taa ye bininfosaalib a bɔri, amaa ke ti sin ye Uwonbɔr a bɔr ibamɔn le, tan tun nin nim ban ŋa yada-n.
