eng: Brothers and sisters, you became imitators of the churches of God in Judea, which are in Christ Jesus. This was because you also suffered the same things from your own people as they did from the Jews.
local: Amaa nim ban ye ti nabum nan, ni toog biwonjiɛm a laginn ban be Judiya wee ki be Masiya ni nle. Ni jin fala ni tɔɔl a bol yaabin le ke biwonjiɛm a laginn nmɔn kaah nan jin fala Juu yaab a nɔɔn man nin.

eng: They killed both the Lord Jesus and the prophets and drove us out. They dont please God, and they are hostile to the entire human race.
local: bi ma nan ku Yisa nin bilinlemin ki mugir ti mu. Bi nan fiin Uwonbɔr a ŋuul pam. Le ki ji ŋa bininfob biɛn a dataag.

eng: when they try to stop us from speaking to the Gentiles so they can be saved. Their sins are constantly pushing the limit. Gods wrath has caught up with them in the end.
local: ki gbaar ban baah li ŋa man wee ti laa pag sei ban kaa ye Juu yaabin wee bin kan nŋmarimi. Man nmɔn le che bi bir lagin ki nan kpaa man. Le Uwonbɔr a ŋuul fii bi bu le u dar bi tul ni joorimin.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we were separated from you for a while physically but not in our hearts. We made every effort in our desire to see you again face-to-face.
local: N nabum, baah nan fee ki nyan ti wee ti nan fɔɔr sin jiɛn ni-n, ni nan ye tigbanann nin le amaa naa nan ye lipotiɛlin ni, ti gbaar le ke ni ye man biɛn ke ti le ji li kan ni.

eng: We wanted to come to you—I, Paul, tried over and over again—and Satan stopped us.
local: Ti bi ban ti dan ni ban le, min Pɔɔl baan tɔɔl le gbaar le ki le gbaar, amaa le sintani kaa sei ti nsan ni.

eng: What is our hope, joy, or crown that we can brag about in front of our Lord Jesus when he comes? Isnt it all of you?.
local: Ti tama nin ti mɔm ye baa, bee ti nyaŋim a yuchigirig kan wee ti na yin ta kan jilima u Yudaan Yisa ban u jirin daalin ye ki laa? Naa ye nimaa?.

eng: You are our glory and joy!.
local: Ibamɔn nim le ye ti pag nin ti mɔm.

eng: So when we couldnt stand it any longer, we thought it was a good idea to stay on in Athens by ourselves.
local: Taah kaa ji nan na li fir ŋmag tiba n-yonn man nin, le ti nan tiɛr ke ni ŋan nin ti laan paar Atensi ti binba.

eng: and we sent you Timothy, who is our brother and Gods coworker in the good news about Christ. We sent him to strengthen and encourage you in your faithfulness.
local: Ti tun Timoti wan ye ti toon tun kpiɛg Uwonbɔr a toon n-yaan wee ki mɔɔn Masiya a bɔŋann nle ni ban, ke un nan pɔɔg ni gbanann nin ni yada-n.

eng: We didnt want any of you to be shaken by these problems. You know very well that we were meant to go through this.
local: wee u ba n laa lu u yada-n limugil nan bu. Ni tɔɔl nyi ke ni ye Uwonbɔr a wiib le ke ti kan limugil nmɔn a booli.

eng: In fact, when we were with you, we kept on predicting that we were going to face problems exactly like what happened, as you know.
local: Ibamɔn, taah nan be ni ban nin, ti le nan gbaa bei ni ke ti li kan limugil. Le ni sin tun ke naah nyi ni bu nbamɔm man nin.

eng: Thats why I sent Timothy to find out about your faithfulness when I couldnt stand it anymore. I was worried that the tempter might have tempted you so that our work would have been a waste of time.
local: Ni ma bu ni che maah kaa ji nan na li fir ŋmag n ba-n, le n nan tun ke bin nan lig ni yada kaah si man. N nan san bijawaam le ke, nba ke ulinlaril n par lar ni wee ti yaa baginn n gab yɔli.

eng: Now Timothy has returned to us from you and has given us good news about your faithfulness and love! He says that you always have good memories about us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
local: Amaa Timoti le la nyan ni ban le ki foon ti ban ki ŋmagin tibɔŋann ki ta jiin ni yada nin ni jiɛm paam. U bei ti ke ni le la tiɛr ti bu le ki bi ban ni kan ti, ke ti mu kaah le ban ti kan ni man nin.

eng: Because of this, brothers and sisters, we were encouraged in all our distress and trouble through your faithfulness.
local: Mambu n nabum, nin ti mugil nin ti fala a jimin biɛn nin, ti jɔɔ ngbanann pɔɔn ki jiin ni yada kan wee ni jɔɔ n paam.

eng: For now we are alive if you are standing your ground in the Lord.
local: Daandaan nan, naah si nbamɔm Uyudaan a samin nan man, ti sin fo.

eng: How can we thank God enough for you, given all the joy we have because of you before our God?.
local: Ipoor takpen ilaba wee ti yin ta sei Uwonbɔr ni buu ki jiin nmɔn man biɛn wee ti jɔɔ Uwonbɔr a nintogil ni buu?.

eng: Night and day, we pray more than ever to see all of you in person and to complete whatever you still need for your faith.
local: Nween nin kunyiɛg ti le miɛ Uwonbɔr ki bi ban ti kan ni jigin wee ki ter ni nan par ni yada-n.

eng: Now may our God and Father himself and our Lord Jesus guide us on our way back to you.
local: Ti Baa Uwonbɔr baan tɔɔl nin ti Yudaau Yisa n mann nsan ki sei ti wee ti dan ni ban.

eng: May the Lord cause you to increase and enrich your love for each other and for everyone in the same way as we also love you.
local: Uyudaan n che njiɛm man wee ni jɔɔ ban ni tabin n mann tann ki pii uninfo biɛn, ke ti yaa bamin kaah be nin ni man nin.

eng: May the love cause your hearts to be strengthened, to be blameless in holiness before our God and Father when our Lord Jesus comes with all his people. Amen.
local: Un pɔɔg ni sufu wee ni laa jɔɔ igbarigi ki li be kasi ti Baa Uwonbɔr a nintogil n-yonn man wee ti Yudaau Yisa na li foon nin u kasi a ninfobin.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, we ask and encourage you in the Lord Jesus to keep living the way you already are and even do better in how you live and please God—just as you learned from us.
local: N nabum, ni joorimin, ti wɔɔn ni na li ŋa man wee ni binbem li gbeeg Uwonbɔr a num, ke naah pii be man nin. Daandaan nan ti balin ni le ki bei ni ke ni le li gbaa be man na Uyudaan Yisa a yinlin.

eng: You know the instructions we gave you through the Lord Jesus.
local: Ni nyi nwɔɔnim man wee ti ta sei ni Uyudaan Yisa a pɔɔmin.

eng: Gods will is that your lives are dedicated to him. This means that you stay away from sexual immorality.
local: Ni ye Uwonbɔr a bam le ke ni li be kasi wee ki nyan ni ba iwanchɔgin toon nin ni jabanlin bee ni piibanlin;.

eng: and learn how to control your own body in a pure and respectable way.
local: ke ni biɛn n tinn ki biɛ naah li ŋa man ki fir ŋmag ni baan tɔɔl a gbanann kasi nin jilima a binbemin.

eng: Dont be controlled by your sexual urges like the Gentiles who dont know God.
local: ki laa jɔɔ nmɔsanyunsɔɔm ke ban kaa ye Juu yaab wee kaa nyi Uwonbɔr n kaah be man n ni;.

eng: No one should mistreat or take advantage of their brother or sister in this issue. The Lord punishes people for all these things, as we told you before and sternly warned you.
local: ni ma bu tibɔr nan yaan uba laa tun ki bii u kpiɛg bee ki ji u kpiɛg dulimi. Uyudaan li dar bininfosaalib ban biɛn tun tibir nan a booli a tul, ke taah pii chinn bei ni ki kpaan ni man nin.

eng: God didnt call us to be immoral but to be dedicated to him.
local: Uwonbɔr kaa yin ti ke ti li jɔɔ tijaginn ni, amaa ke ti li jɔɔ kasi a binbem.

eng: Therefore, whoever rejects these instructions isnt rejecting a human authority. They are rejecting God, who gives his Holy Spirit to you.
local: Mambu uninfo wan yii kaa nɔɔ nwɔɔnim nan ke, naa ye uninfosaal le u yii amaa u yii Uwonbɔr wan sei ni U Kasi a Naaŋin le.

eng: You dont need us to write about loving your brothers and sisters because God has already taught you to love each other.
local: Daandaan nan ki jiin kunabitiig a jiɛmin paam, naa ji ye ti sɔb le ki sei ni, Uwonbɔr le wɔɔn ni tɔɔl naah li jiɛ tab man.

eng: In fact, you are doing loving deeds for all the brothers and sisters throughout Macedonia. Now we encourage you, brothers and sisters, to do so even more.
local: Le ni ye ibamɔn le, ni sin ban n nabum man biɛn be Masedoniya a tiŋin nin. Jigin ti balin ni le ke ni mann tun man takpema.

eng: Aim to live quietly, mind your own business, and earn your own living, just as I told you.
local: Ni che ni li ye ni toonl ke ni li be nbinben ŋan, ki che ni baga li be ni tɔɔl a toon yin ki li jɔɔ ni nɔɔi tun ki jiu, ke taah bei ni man nin.

eng: That way youll behave appropriately toward outsiders, and you wont be in need.
local: naah li ŋa man wee ni binbem li ye jilima ki sei ban kaa ye biwonjiɛmin, wee ni laa be uba bu.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we want you to know about people who have died so that you wont mourn like others who dont have any hope.
local: N nabum, taa ban ni li be ki laa nyi ban dɔɔn jiɛn nin bu, bee ki jɔɔ npoobiin ke bininfob ban gur kaa jɔɔ tama-n kaah be man nni.

eng: Since we believe that Jesus died and rose, so we also believe that God will bring with him those who have died in Jesus.
local: Ti ŋa yada ke Yisa kpo ki fii nkumin na, ni ma bu che ti jɔɔ yada ke Uwonbɔr le ŋmagin ban nan dɔɔn jiɛn Yisa nni ki dan.

eng: What we are saying is a message from the Lord: we who are alive and still around at the Lords coming definitely wont go ahead of those who have died.
local: Uyudaan baan tɔɔl a mɔbonl le ti bei ni ke, tim ban la be ti miɛfolin wee ki guu Uyudaan a damin, taa na yin chinn ban dɔɔn jiɛn nni.

eng: This is because the Lord himself will come down from heaven with the signal of a shout by the head angel and a blast on Gods trumpet. First, those who are dead in Christ will rise.
local: Uyudaan baan tɔɔl li nya papaab ki jiirin, ki nan sei bimɔb nin nkukɔ pɔɔn wee ti gbir malakam a ninkpelu a kukɔl nin Uwonbɔr a natun yinkaagin a mɔr, le bininfob ban nan gaa Yisa wee ki nin kpe-n li chinn fii nkumin.

eng: Then, we who are living and still around will be taken up together with them in the clouds to meet with the Lord in the air. That way we will always be with the Lord.
local: Le ni bɔɔn bu, le tim ban mu la fo wee ki gur be dulinya nan yaan nin mu li yug lagin nin bi ki too Uyudaan kitilangbɔŋin. Le ki nin gbaa be nin Uyudaan iyoo biɛn.

eng: So encourage each other with these words.
local: Mambu ni ta imɔbon nan ki pɔɔg tab a gbanann na man.

eng: We dont need to write to you about the timing and dates, brothers and sisters.
local: Daandaan nan, n nabum, naa kpaa talar nin ti sɔb ki wɔɔn ni n-yonn bee idaa.

eng: You know very well that the day of the Lord is going to come like a thief in the night.
local: nan bu-n ni nyi nbamɔm ke Uyudaan a dan daal na yin be le ke unaayig kaah chaan kunyiɛg man nin.

eng: When they are saying, There is peace and security, at that time sudden destruction will attack them, like labor pains start with a pregnant woman, and they definitely wont escape.
local: N-yonn man wee bininfob li len ke Nposɔɔn dan na bi gaa bi ba-n, libol nmɔn le tibɔbir li dan bi bu, ni na yin be le ke nmarwiɛn kaah choo upii ke ni be man nin, le baa li ŋmari.

eng: But you arent in darkness, brothers and sisters, so the day wont catch you by surprise like a thief.
local: Amaa nim, n nabum nan ma, naa be libunbɔnlin ni, mambu ni laa che lidaal nmɔn n nan lir ni ke unaayig a dan ni.

eng: All of you are children of light and children of the day. We dont belong to night or darkness.
local: Ni biɛn nan ye nwonween nin nweehn a buwaab le. Taa ye kunyiɛg bee libunbɔnl a ninfobi.

eng: So then, lets not sleep like the others, but lets stay awake and stay sober.
local: Ni ma bu, ni laa che ti be ke bitab kaah be man ki dɔ jiɛn ni ni, amaa ni che ti li lig ki li chor ti bau.

eng: People who sleep sleep at night, and people who get drunk get drunk at night.
local: Ban dɔ jiɛn nin jiɛn kunyiɛg le, ban mu nyu ndaam gbeegin mu nyugbeeg kunyiɛg le.

eng: Since we belong to the day, lets stay sober, wearing faithfulness and love as a piece of armor that protects our body and the hope of salvation as a helmet.
local: Amaa tim kaah ye nweehn a ninfobin, ni che ti li chor ti bau, ki li jɔɔ yada nin njiɛm man li guu ti gbanann, ki li jɔɔ nŋmarim a tama man wee ti li ta chig ti yul bu ke kijabig.

eng: God didnt intend for us to suffer his wrath but rather to possess salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Uwonbɔr kaa gann ti ke ti nan ji fala le U ŋuufiiŋin ni, amaa ke ti nan kan nŋmarim ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya bu.

eng: Jesus died for us so that, whether we are awake or asleep, we will live together with him.
local: U kpo tim bu le, a lig le bee a jiɛn le ke ni, ti na li lagin ki be nin U.

eng: So continue encouraging each other and building each other up, just like you are doing already.
local: Ni ma bu ni li pɔɔg tab a gbanann ki li kpiɛg tab bu ke naah pii ŋaan man nin na.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we ask you to respect those who are working with you, leading you, and instructing you.
local: N nabum, ti balin ni le, ni li tenn ban pɔɔn biba ni sisiigin ki ye ni sanliib Uyudaan a samin ki wɔɔn ni nwonjiɛn binben nin jilimau.

eng: Think of them highly with love because of their work. Live in peace with each other.
local: Ni li tenn bi jilima takpema, ki li jɔɔ njiɛm nin bi toon yin bu. Ni li be nin nposɔɔn nin taba.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we urge you to warn those who are disorderly. Comfort the discouraged. Help the weak. Be patient with everyone.
local: Ti balin ni le, n nabum, ni kpaan ban ye bigbanyagdamin na, ki pɔɔg ban san bijawaamin a sufuu, ki ter ban a yada kaa pɔɔ-n, ki li jɔɔ limɔril nin uninfo biɛn na.

eng: Make sure no one repays a wrong with a wrong, but always pursue the good for each other and everyone else.
local: Ni laa che uba nta tibir ki yɔ tibiri, amaa ni pɔɔn niba ki li jɔɔ nbinben ŋan nin tab nin uninfo biɛn.

eng: Rejoice always.
local: Ni che ni li mɔ ni iyoo biɛn na;.

eng: Pray continually.
local: Ni li miɛ Uwonbɔr iyoo biɛn na;.

eng: Give thanks in every situation because this is Gods will for you in Christ Jesus.
local: niwann biɛn a poolin ke ni li poor Uwonbɔr a, Uwonbɔr a bam le yen ki sei ni Masiya bu.

eng: Dont suppress the Spirit.
local: Ni laa junn Kinaaŋ a ŋmiimin ni;.

eng: Dont brush off Spirit-inspired messages.
local: ni laa yin ilinlen leen yɔli.

eng: but examine everything carefully and hang on to what is good.
local: Ni mag i biɛn liga, ki gann yan ŋan ki li ŋmaga.

eng: Avoid every kind of evil.
local: Ni nyan niba tibir biɛn a tumin na.

eng: Now, may the God of peace himself cause you to be completely dedicated to him; and may your spirit, soul, and body be kept intact and blameless at our Lord Jesus Christs coming.
local: Che Uwonbɔr tɔɔl, wan ye nposɔɔn a Uwonbɔr win n ŋa ni kasi niwann biɛn nin. Ki che ni naaŋ nin ni sufu nin ni gbanann biɛn n laa nan jɔɔ igbarig ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya a dan daali.

eng: The one who is calling you is faithful and will do this.
local: Uwonbɔr wan yin ni nan li tun man, U ye yada daan le.

eng: Brothers and sisters, pray for us.
local: N nabum, ni li miɛ Uwonbɔr tenn ta.

eng: Greet all the brothers and sisters with a holy kiss.
local: Ni poor ti nabumin biɛn nbamɔma.

eng: By the Lords authority, I order all of you to have this letter read aloud to all the brothers and sisters.
local: N bei ni le Uyudaan a nintogil ke ni karin kugbɔŋ nan ki sei n nabumin biɛn na.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: Ti yudaau Yisa Masiya a nyunyunbasanl li be ni bu.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy: To the church of the Thessalonians, which is in God our Father, and in the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Min Pɔɔl nin Silasi nin Timoti, Le sɔb kugbɔŋ nan ki tenn biwonjiɛm a laguŋ kan be Tesalonika ki be nin ti Baa Uwonbɔr nin ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya bu:.

eng: From Paul, who is an apostle of Jesus Christ by the command of God our savior and of Christ Jesus our hope.
local: Min Pɔɔl wan wee Uwonbɔr ŋaam Masiya a toomin, wan ye ti feeru nin Masiya wan bu wee ti jɔɔ tama-n.

eng: Grace and peace to all of you from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ti Baa Uwonbɔr nin ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya a nyunyunbasanl nin nposɔɔn li be ni bu.

eng: To Timothy, my true child in the faith. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and from Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: N sɔb tenn Timoti wan ye n big bamɔŋ yada bu nle: Ti Baa Uwonbɔr nin ti Yudaau Masiya a linyunyunbasanl nin nposɔɔn li be a bu.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we must always thank God for you. This is only right because your faithfulness is growing by leaps and bounds, and the love that all of you have for each other is increasing.
local: N nabum, ni ye ti poor Uwonbɔr le ni bu, ni ŋan nin ti ŋa man, nan bu-n ni yada-n le mann yabirig le takpem, le njiɛm man wee ni jiɛ tabin mann kpiɛg le.

eng: When I left for Macedonia, I asked you to stay behind in Ephesus so that you could instruct certain individuals not to spread wrong teaching.
local: Ke maah pii nan beiŋ man n-yonn man wee n nan jon Masedoniya-n, li be Efesusi wee ki che bininfob bibam nlaa ji wɔɔn tibɔkari.

eng: Thats why we ourselves are bragging about you in Gods churches. We tell about your endurance and faithfulness in all the harassments and trouble that you have put up with.
local: Ni ma bu Uwonbɔr a ninfob a laginn nan a sisiigin, ti far ligbingbanl le ni bu nin naah jɔɔ limɔril nin yada limugil nin libiginl biɛn a poolin wee ni la biɛ nin jɔɔ yada n bu.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to myths and endless genealogies. Their teaching only causes useless guessing games instead of faithfulness to Gods way of doing things.
local: ki che bin nyan biba bi yaajam a bɔkpegir tan ye tibɔkar a teeni ki nyan bi yaajam a yiin npaamin. Ni ma che limɔkpel forin kaa ye Uwonbɔr a niin a toonl lan ye yada nbu.

eng: This shows that Gods judgment is right, and that you will be considered worthy of Gods kingdom for which you are suffering.
local: Ni niɛ biɛn ye siɛra le ki wɔɔn ke Uwonbɔr a bɔjil ŋan, le ni joorimin bi li kan ni ki kpiɛ bininfob ŋamin Uwonbɔr a naam man bu wee ni ji fala nan.

eng: The goal of instruction is love from a pure heart, a good conscience, and a sincere faith.
local: Nwɔɔnim nan a num kaah paa nan bu ye njiɛm le, man nyan kasi a sufu-n nin ipotiɛ ŋan nin ibamɔn a yada-n.

eng: After all, its right for God to pay back the ones making trouble for you with trouble.
local: Uwonbɔr ye ubuchin le: Ban mugir ni-n, U li yɔ bi ki jiin.

eng: Because they missed this goal, some people have been distracted by talk that doesnt mean anything.
local: Bininfob bibam yii ni niɛ le, ki tur ki kɔɔ ileen yan kaa jɔɔ bu a pagimin.

eng: and to pay back you who are having trouble with relief along with us. This payback will come when the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven with his powerful angels.
local: ki sei nim ban wee bi mugir ni-n lifooril, nin ti biɛn. Ni na yin ŋa n-yonn man wee Uyudaan Yisa nan kpiir ki nyan papaab nin nŋmipeen nin u malakam ban jɔɔ npɔɔn nin.

eng: They want to be teachers of Law without understanding either what they are saying or what they are talking about with such confidence.
local: Bi ban bi li ye ban wɔɔnn nsiim le, amaa baa nyi baah pag nan nmɔn ni bee nan wee bi pag nin tidindann nmɔn ni.

eng: He will give justice with blazing fire to those who dont recognize God and dont obey the good news of our Lord Jesus.
local: U li dar ban kaa nyi Uwonbɔr a tuli nin ban kaa ŋa ti Yudaau Yisa a bɔŋann nin yada-n.

eng: Now we know that the Law is good if used appropriately.
local: Ti nyi nsiim nmɔn kaah ŋan, ni ye uninfo ŋmag mi nbamɔm ke.

eng: They will pay the penalty of eternal destruction away from the Lords presence and away from his mighty glory.
local: Bi li ji fala wan kaa jɔɔ ndiɛmi bi tudaril nmɔn a poolin. Uwonbɔr na li ŋɔɔr bi ki nyan Uyudaan ban ki che bin lann u pɔɔm man jɔɔ jilima-n.

eng: We understand this: the Law isnt established for a righteous person but for people who live without laws and without obeying any authority. They are the ungodly and the sinners. They are people who are not spiritual, and nothing is sacred to them. They kill their fathers and mothers, and murder others.
local: Ti ji nyi nsiimin kaah kaa siin sei ban ye bibuchimi, amaa ban ye tukangbirdam, nin ban kaa san Uwonbɔr, nin tibirdam, nin tijagindam nin ban galin Uwonbɔr, nin ban ku bi baam, nin ban ku bi nam nin bininfokub.

eng: This will happen when he comes on that day to receive honor from his holy people and to be admired by everyone who has believed—and our testimony to you was believed.
local: lidaal lan wee u nan dan un nan gaa u pag kasi a ninfob nin u jilima ban biɛn ŋa u yada-n ban nin. Ni tɔɔl kpiɛ niin na, ni ŋa tibɔr tan wee ti pag sei nin yadau.

eng: They are people who are sexually unfaithful, and people who have intercourse with the same sex. They are kidnappers, liars, individuals who give false testimonies in court, and those who do anything else that is opposed to sound teaching.
local: nin ban tun iwanjaab toon, nin ban yii bi piib wee ki dɔ nin bijab tabin, nin ban jɔɔ biyom kpeŋ nin ban ye tibɔkardam, nin ban ji tibɔkar a siɛra, nin ban biɛn kaa nɔɔ ibamɔn a wɔɔnimin.

eng: We are constantly praying for you for this: that our God will make you worthy of his calling and accomplish every good desire and faithful work by his power.
local: Naah be ti sufu-n nin bu, le ti miɛ Uwonbɔr ki tenn ni iyoo biɛn, ke ti Wonbɔru n ŋa ni bininfob ŋam ke waah yin ni ki ban ni li be man nin, ki che naah tiɛr nan biɛn n ŋa n ŋam ki sei ni u yaa pɔɔm bu, ki che ni gbaar ni yada a toonlin.

eng: Sound teaching agrees with the glorious gospel of the blessed God that has been trusted to me.
local: ni niɛ nan le ye jilima a bɔŋann tan nyan tikaar a Wonbɔru ban, le u ta ŋa n nɔɔn ke n li mɔɔn na.

eng: Then the name of our Lord Jesus will be honored by you, and you will be honored by him, consistent with the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ti miɛ Uwonbɔr le ke un che ti Yudaau Yisa a yinlin kan kupag ni ni, wee ni mu n kan kupag u ni, ti Wonbɔru nin Uyudaan Yisa Masiya a nyunyunbasanl bu.

eng: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me strength because he considered me faithful. So he appointed me to ministry.
local: N poor ti Yudaau Masiya, nin waah seim npɔɔn, ki ŋaam yada daan, ki taam ŋa u toon yin.

eng: even though I used to speak against him, attack his people, and I was proud. But I was shown mercy because I acted in ignorance and without faith.
local: Hali maah le nan sugir u, ki mugir u, ki pag tibɔbir ki tenn win, u nan sam kunyunyunbaaga, nan bu-n maa nan nyi maah tun nan ni, maah kaa nan jɔɔ yada-n bu.

eng: Our Lords favor poured all over me along with the faithfulness and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Ti yudaau nan kpaar u nyunyunbasanl takpem le ki jaa n bu, ki ji kpiɛ yada nin njiɛm man be Masiya nin.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves full acceptance: Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners—and Im the biggest sinner of all.
local: Ni niɛ nan ye ibamɔn le, ni kpaan nin bininfob n gaa ti nbamɔm: Masiya nan dan dulinya nan yaan ke u nan fee tibirdam le jaa, min le ye tibirdaan ki jon bi biɛn.

eng: But this is why I was shown mercy, so that Christ Jesus could show his endless patience to me first of all. So Im an example for those who are going to believe in him for eternal life.
local: Amaa ni niɛ bu le Uwonbɔr nan sam kunyunyunbaag, ke min wan ye chinchinn a birdaau win, wee Masiya n fir wɔɔn u mɔril lan kaa jɔɔ tarig wee ni li ye limagil ki sei ban li ŋa Yisa yada ki kan limiɛfol lan kaa jɔɔ ndiɛmi.

eng: Now to the king of the ages, to the immortal, invisible, and only God, may honor and glory be given to him forever and always! Amen.
local: Daandaan nan, Ubɔr wan kaa jɔɔ ndiɛm, wan kaa kpegi, wan wee baa ga, Uwonbɔr uba, Uma ŋan nin jilima nin kupag hali nin iyoo yan kaa jɔɔ ndiɛmi. Ibamɔn.

eng: Timothy, my child, Im giving you these instructions based on the prophecies that were once made about you. So if you follow them, you can wage a good war.
local: N bija, Timoti, n jɔɔ ikpaan nan ki ŋaan a nɔɔn, ikpaan nmɔn ye bilinlem kaah pii nan pag man ki jiin a paamin le. Ni ye a nɔɔn min nbamɔm ke a fir kɔn likɔnŋanl.

eng: because you have faith and a good conscience. Some people have ruined their faith because they refused to listen to their conscience.
local: Li ŋmag a yada nin a potiɛŋamin na. Biba nan yii mi le ki che bi yada bii.

eng: such as Hymenaeus and Alexander. Ive handed them over to Satan so that they can be taught not to speak against God.
local: Bi ma ye Hamenasi nin Alɛgzanda, ban wee n ta bi ŋubin Sintani a nɔɔn ke un dar bi tul wee bin jiɛn Uwonbɔr a sugir.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we have a request for you concerning our Lord Jesus Christs coming and when we are gathered together to be with him.
local: Ki jiin ti Yudaau Yisa a dam paam nin taah na yin lagin U ban man, le ti balin ni ke, n nabum.

eng: We dont want you to be easily confused in your mind or upset if you hear that the day of the Lord is already here, whether you hear it through some spirit, a message, or a letter supposedly from us.
local: ni laa che nin ŋmarin ni potiɛli, bee ki yugin ni lam ki ta jiin ilinlen leen yan wee bibam pag bee tibɔr beikaar bee kugbɔŋ kan nyan bi ban ki ke tim ban le ki nyan nin. Imɔleen yan forin nin kaah len ke ti Yudaau a dam a daa-n pii foon nin bu.

eng: Dont let anyone deceive you in any way. That day wont come unless the rebellion comes first and the person who is lawless is revealed, who is headed for destruction.
local: Ni laa che uba n ta niba lar ni, lidaal nmɔn kaa la yin foo see ke wan kɔnn nin bininkpeeb nin limɔyiildaan nin nyan npaan ni, wan a binbebol ye nŋmi-n nin.

eng: He is the opponent of every so-called god or object of worship and promotes himself over them. So he sits in Gods temple, displaying himself to show that he is God.
local: Waa yin chee sei iween yan wee bi jiɛn nni, le ki sin yuur uba paab ki jo iween nmɔn, le ki ta uba ki siin Uwonbɔr a binbebol ki ke u ye Uwonbɔr le.

eng: You remember that I used to tell you these things while I was with you, dont you?.
local: Naa tiɛr ke maah nan be ni ban nin, n nan gbaa bei ni ni niɛ nan biɛn naa?.

eng: Now you know what holds him back so that he can be revealed when his time comes.
local: Le ni nyi ni wan nan la ŋmag u daandaan nan, naah li ŋa man wee un nan kpiir uba n-yonn man kpaan nin un nyan.

eng: The hidden plan to live without any law is at work now, but it will be secret only until the one who is holding it back is out of the way.
local: Npɔɔn man woo limɔyiildaan nmɔn a bɔɔn nin pii piin itoon na; amaa wan la ŋmag mi wee maa tun nin, le la ŋmag man le, hali nin Uwonbɔr kaah na li nyan nan ŋmag mi nmɔn.

eng: Then the person who is lawless will be revealed. The Lord Jesus will destroy him with the breath from his mouth. When the Lord comes, his appearance will put an end to him.
local: Le limɔyiildaan nmɔn n nin kpiirin, wan wee Uyudaan Yisa na yin foor u mɔb a faam ki ku u, u dan daal nmɔn u na li bii limɔyiildaan nmɔn.

eng: When the person who is lawless comes, it will happen through Satans effort, with all kinds of fake power, signs, and wonders.
local: Limɔyiildaan nin na yin dan nin Sintani a pɔɔmin le, ki nan tun ligaril nin lijinjeel a toon ki ji tibɔkar a siɛra.

eng: It will happen with every sort of wicked deception of those who are heading toward destruction because they have refused to love the truth that would allow them to be saved.
local: u li ta u binben biim nmɔn ki lar bininfob ki bii bi, baah yii ibamɔn yan li sei bi nŋmarimin bu.

eng: This is why God will send them an influence that will mislead them so that they will believe the lie.
local: Ni ma bu le Uwonbɔr ta kuŋmaruŋ a pɔɔm ŋa bi sufu ni ke nin che bi li pag tibɔkar.

eng: The result will be that everyone will be judged who is not convinced by the truth but is happy with injustice.
local: wee ni joorimin Uwonbɔr na li bii ban biɛn kaa ŋa ibamɔn nin yada wee ki sin gann tibirin.

eng: But we always must thank God for you, brothers and sisters who are loved by God. This is because he chose you from the beginning to be the first crop of the harvest. This brought salvation, through your dedication to God by the Spirit and through your belief in the truth.
local: Ni ye ti le li poor Uwonbɔr le iyoo biɛn ni bu, n nabum, nim ban wee Uyudaan jiɛ, nan bu-n npiinimin Uwonbɔr nan gann ni le ke ni kan nŋmarim Kinaaŋin a pɔɔmin ki ŋa ni u kasi a ninfob nin naah ŋa ibamɔn nin yada-n.

eng: God called all of you through our good news so you could possess the honor of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Tibɔŋann tan wee ti pag tenn nin le Uwonbɔr ta yin ni, ke nim nin ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya n nan lagin kan u jilima-n.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, stand firm and hold on to the traditions we taught you, whether we taught you in person or through our letter.
local: Ni ma bu n nabum, ni mann sir nbamɔm ki li ŋmag taah wɔɔn ni man nin, naah ye imɔleen le ti pag bee kugbɔŋ le ti sɔb sei ni ke ni.

eng: Our Lord Jesus Christ himself and God our Father loved us and through grace gave us eternal comfort and a good hope.
local: Ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya nin ti Baa Uwonbɔr, wan jiɛ ti nin U nyunyunbasanlin bu n kɔɔn ti lipoobil ki sei ti tama ŋaŋ.

eng: May he encourage your hearts and give you strength in every good thing you do or say.
local: Un sei ni lipoobil ki pɔɔg ni gbanann nin itoon ŋan nin imɔleen ŋan.

eng: First of all, then, I ask that requests, prayers, petitions, and thanksgiving be made for all people.
local: Chinchinn, n bei ni le ke, ni li miɛ Uwonbɔr ki tenn ni ba, ki li miɛ u ki tenn ni kpiɛtiib, ki li tenn Uwonbɔr kunɔɔpoog bininfob biɛn buu.

eng: Pray for kings and everyone who is in authority so that we can live a quiet and peaceful life in complete godliness and dignity.
local: ki li miɛ ki tenn bibɔrtiib nin biyudam biɛn wee ti fir be soon nin nposɔɔn ki li jɔɔ nwonjiɛn binben ki li be kasi.

eng: This is right and it pleases God our savior.
local: Ni niɛ le ŋan, ki gbee Uwonbɔr wan fee ti gabin a num.

eng: who wants all people to be saved and to come to a knowledge of the truth.
local: wan ban bininfob biɛn n kan feegab wee ki biɛ nbamɔmin.

eng: There is one God and one mediator between God and humanity, the human Christ Jesus.
local: Nan bu-n, Uwonbɔr ye uba le, le usandanfaar mu ye uba ki be Uwonbɔr nin bininfob a sisiigin, uja nmɔn le ye Masiya .

eng: who gave himself as a payment to set all people free. This was a testimony that was given at the right time.
local: uma nan ta u miɛl ki daa bininfob biɛn, Uwonbɔr kaah nan pag siɛra kan ni a yoo dede.

eng: I was appointed to be a preacher and apostle of this testimony—Im telling the truth and Im not lying! Im a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth.
local: Ni niɛ nan bu le Uwonbɔr gannim ki ŋaam wan mɔɔn nin ntoon. N pag ibamɔn le, maa por tibɔkari, ki ye wan wɔɔn ban kaa ye Juu yaab yada a bamɔn.

eng: Therefore, I want men to pray everywhere by lifting up hands that are holy, without anger or argument.
local: N ban bijab kaah be nan yaan biɛn ndon bi kasi a nɔɔi ki miɛ Uwonbɔr, wee ni laa jɔɔ sufu fiiŋ bee limɔkpeli.

eng: In the same way, I want women to enhance their appearance with clothing that is modest and sensible, not with elaborate hairstyles, gold, pearls, or expensive clothes.
local: N mu ji ban bipiib n yee tiwann yɔɔr tan ŋan ki nɔɔn bi le, tan kaa jɔɔ igalin, bee ifa a yukper loli, bee salima bee nlanbim bee tiwann yɔɔr tan jɔɔ kudaapɔɔrugi.

eng: They should make themselves attractive by doing good, which is appropriate for women who claim to honor God.
local: amaa wee ki li tun nan ŋan na, ni ma ŋan ki sei bipiib ban ke bi jiɛn Uwonbɔr.

eng: A wife should learn quietly with complete submission.
local: Upii ye un tinn le ki li be soon nin limɔcheel.

eng: I dont allow a wife to teach or to control her husband. Instead, she should be a quiet listener.
local: Maa sei upii npaan ke un wɔɔn ni bee u li jɔɔ npɔɔn ki jon uja, u ye u li ŋmin le.

eng: Adam was formed first, and then Eve.
local: Adam le bi nan chinn naan, le ki nin naan Iif.

eng: Adam wasnt deceived, but rather his wife became the one who stepped over the line because she was completely deceived.
local: Naa ye Adam le Sintani nan lari, upii le Sintani nan lar le u labir tibirdaan.

eng: But a wife will be brought safely through childbirth, if they both continue in faith, love, and holiness, together with self-control.
local: Amaa bipiib li kan feegab, nin baah le maa nbuwaab nan biɛn na, ni ye bi le la si bi yada bu ki jɔɔ njiɛm nin kasi a binbem ke.

eng: Finally, brothers and sisters, pray for us so that the Lords message will spread quickly and be honored, just like it happened with you.
local: Ni joorimin, n nabum, ni li miɛ Uwonbɔr ki tenn ta wee Uyudaan a bɔrin fir mɔɔn weem wee bin gaa ti nin jilima, ke naah nan gaa ti man nin.

eng: Pray too that we will be rescued from inappropriate and evil people since everyone that we meet wont respond with faith.
local: Ki ji miɛ Uwonbɔr ke un nyan ti bipootondam nin tininfobir a nɔɔn, nan bu-n naa ye uninfo biɛn le jɔɔ yada.

eng: But the Lord is faithful and will give you strength and protect you from the evil one.
local: Amaa Uyudaan ye yada daan le, u li pɔɔg ni gbanann ki guur ni wee kininbɔŋ n laa kan ni.

eng: We are confident about you in the Lord—that you are doing and will keep doing what we tell you to do.
local: Uyudaan che ti jɔɔ tidindann ni bu ke ni tun, ki le mann tun ke taah bei ni man nin.

eng: May the Lord lead your hearts to express Gods love and Christs endurance.
local: Uyudaan n che ni biɛ Uwonbɔr a jiɛm nin limɔril lan nyan Masiya ban nin.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we command you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to stay away from every brother or sister who lives an undisciplined life that is not in line with the traditions that you received from us.
local: Uyudaan Yisa Masiya a yinl bu, le ti bei ni ke, n nabum, ni nyan ni num ki sin jiɛn n nabum man biɛn san ligbanyagil kaa be taah wɔɔn bi ke bi li be man nni.

eng: You yourselves know how you need to imitate us because we were not undisciplined when we were with you.
local: Ni baan tɔɔl nyi nbamɔm ke ni ni ye ni li tun le ke taah tun man ni. Taah nan be ni ban nin, taa nan san ligbanyagil.

eng: We didnt eat anyones food without paying for it. Instead, we worked night and day with effort and hard work so that we would not impose on you.
local: bee ki jin uba a jiir yɔli wee kaa yɔn ti bu. Amaa ti pɔɔn tiba le ki tun nween nin kunyiɛg, naah li ŋa man wee ti laa ye litugil ki sei ni ni uba.

eng: We did this to give you an example to imitate, not because we didnt have a right to insist on financial support.
local: Nan bu che ti tun nin kaa ye ke taa bi li fir ji ni wan yɔli amaa ti ŋa limagil le ki wɔɔn ni ke ni li nɔɔ.

eng: Even when we were with you we were giving you this command: If anyone doesnt want to work, they shouldnt eat.
local: Hali n-yonn man wee ti nan be ni ban ni, ti nan sei ni nsiim ke: Wan yii kaa tun ke, u mu laa ji.

eng: We hear that some of you are living an undisciplined life. They arent working, but they are meddling in other peoples business.
local: Ti gbir ke biba be ni sisiigin ki ye bigbanyagdam. Baa tun nin inunman ni; amaa le ki sin jɔɔ bi nɔɔi kɔɔn biba a bɔrin.

eng: By the Lord Jesus Christ, we command and encourage such people to work quietly and put their own food on the table.
local: Bininfob nmɔn a bol le ti jɔɔ Uyudaan Yisa Masiya a yinl ki kpaan bi ke bin pɔɔn biba wee ki tun ki kan bi tɔɔl a jiir ki ji.

eng: Brothers and sisters, dont get discouraged in doing what is right.
local: Amaa nim ma bu ke, n nabum, ni laa ke ni bagir itoon ŋan a tum bu.

eng: Take note of anyone who doesnt obey what we have said in this letter. Dont associate with them so they will be ashamed of themselves.
local: Ni ye uba kaa chee ti wɔɔnim man be kugbɔŋ nan yaan nan ke, ni li mann nyi u bu ki laa che ni baga be u ni, wee ifa n choo u.

eng: Dont treat them like enemies, but warn them like you would do for a brother or sister.
local: Nin ni ma biɛn ni, laa ta man a ninfobol kpann a dataagi, amaa kpaan mu ke a nabigin.

eng: May the Lord of peace himself give you peace always in every way. The Lord be with all of you.
local: Uyudaan wan ye nposɔɔndaan baan tɔɔl n sei ni nposɔɔn isaŋ biɛn nin niwann biɛn nin. Uyudaan li be nin ni biɛn.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting with my own hand. This verifies that the letter is from me, as in every letter of mine. This is how I write.
local: Min Pɔɔl le taa n tɔɔl a nɔɔ ki sɔb ipoor nan, maah sɔb n yinl man kugbɔŋ biɛn a diɛmin le yen. Man le n sɔb.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: Ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya a nyunyunbasanl li be ni biɛn bu.

eng: This saying is reliable: if anyone has a goal to be a supervisor in the church, they want a good thing.
local: Ni niɛ nan ye ibamɔn le: Ni ye uninfo tiɛr u sufu ni ke u ban un ŋa uwonjiɛn sanliir ke, ni kpaan nin un tun itoon ŋan.

eng: So the churchs supervisor must be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, sober, modest, and honest. They should show hospitality and be skilled at teaching.
local: Ni ma bu naa kpaan nin uwonjiɛn sanliir li jɔɔ igalin ni. Ni kpaan u li jɔɔ upii uba le kpeŋileŋ, ki laa jɔɔ kiŋuufiiŋi ki ye wan li fir ŋmag uba nbamɔm, ki li ye wan wee bininfob tenn u jilima, ki li ye wan gaan bicham, ki li ye wan li fir wɔɔnn.

eng: They shouldnt be addicted to alcohol or be a bully. Instead, they should be gentle, peaceable, and not greedy.
local: ki laa ye udanyugbeer, ki laa ye ukɔnban ni, amaa ki li ye wan be soon, ki laa ye umɔkpefari bee ulig ban ni.

eng: They should manage their own household well—they should see that their children are obedient with complete respect.
local: Ni kpaa talar le nin u li ye wan fir ŋmag u niin yaab nbamɔm, wee u buwaab mu li tenn u jilima.

eng: They shouldnt be new believers so that they wont become proud and fall under the devils spell.
local: U laa ye wan yɔɔn ta uba sei Yisa, ni ye man ke u na li kpann kalanbaanidaan ki nan kan litudaril ke ulinlarin.

eng: They should also have a good reputation with those outside the church so that they wont be embarrassed and fall into the devils trap.
local: Ni kpaa le nin u li ye wan jɔɔ jilima ban kaa ye biwonjiɛmin ban, wee ki laa ji ifa ki lu ulinlarin a kurug n-yaan ni.

eng: In the same way, servants in the church should be dignified, not two-faced, heavy drinkers, or greedy for money.
local: Ni li ye man ki sei bititerib mu, ni kpaa talar le nin bi li jɔɔ nbinben ŋan wee bininfob li tenn bi jilima, ki li ye bibamɔndam, ki laa nyuu ndaam takpemi, ki laa ban bin kan tiyɔr tibɔkar bu.

eng: They should hold on to the faith that has been revealed with a clear conscience.
local: Ni kpaa le nin bi li ŋmag yada a bɔwoonkaar tan ye ibamɔn nin, wee bi sufu li ween.

eng: They should also be tested and then serve if they are without fault.
local: Ni kpaa le nin bin mag bititerib nmɔn a binbem ki lig, ni ye baa jɔɔ igalin ke, bin jiɛn bi wee bin ŋa bititerib.

eng: In the same way, women who are servants in the church should be dignified and not gossip. They should be sober and faithful in everything they do.
local: Ni ye man le ki sei bititerib nmɔn a piib mu, bi li ye ban jɔɔ jilima, ki laa ye bibɔɔnsubi, amaa wee ki laa ye ban jɔɔ kiŋuufiiŋi ki li be soon ki ye ban wee bininfob ŋa bi yada.

eng: Servants must be faithful to their spouse and manage their children and their own households well.
local: Ni kpaa le nin utiter li jɔɔ upii uba kpeŋileŋ ki ji li ye wan li fir ŋmag u buwaab nin u niin yaab biɛn nbamɔm.

eng: Those who have served well gain a good standing and considerable confidence in the faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Ban tun nbamɔm kan sisibol ŋan na ki jɔɔ lipoobil takpem nin bi yada wan wee bi jɔɔ nin Masiya-n .

eng: I hope to come to you quickly. But Im writing these things to you so that.
local: Hali nin maah le jɔɔ tama ke n li dan ki nan gɔnniŋ daandaan nan nin, n sɔb kugbɔŋ nan le n seiŋ ikpaan.

eng: if Im delayed, youll know how you should behave in Gods household. It is the church of the living God and the backbone and support of the truth.
local: ni ye maa dan weem ke, kugbɔŋ nmɔn li che a biɛ bininfob a binbem kaah ye man Uwonbɔr a niin, ban ye Uwonbɔr wan fo a wonjiɛmin, ki ye kijaantelig nin ibamɔn a fiɛl.

eng: Without question, the mystery of godliness is great: he was revealed as a human, declared righteous by the Spirit, seen by angels, preached throughout the nations, believed in around the world, and taken up in glory.
local: Ti biɛn chee tibɔwoonkaarin kaah polig man ti wonjiɛnlin na: U nan degirin nin tigbanann na, Kinaaŋ nan wɔɔn waah kan nnyaŋim man na, Malakam nan kan wa, Bi nan mɔɔn u bɔr ki sei ibol biɛn na, Bi nan ŋa u yada dulinya nan yaan na, U nan ta u don paab nin jilimau.

eng: The Spirit clearly says that in latter times some people will turn away from the faith. They will pay attention to spirits that deceive and to the teaching of demons.
local: Kinaaŋ len na, ke idajoorikaa-n, bininfob bibam na li ta bi yada gab, ki nin nɔɔ nnaanbiim man ye bilinlarib nin npɔniim kaah wɔɔn nan.

eng: They will be controlled by the pretense of lying, and their own consciences will be seared.
local: Nwɔɔm nmɔn nya bitingbiib ban larin ban le, ban a potiɛl denn ke bi ta kukurug toŋ le tabin nin.

eng: They will prohibit marriage and eating foods that God created—and he intended them to be accepted with thanksgiving by those who are faithful and have come to know the truth.
local: Bi kɔɔg bininfob le lipiikɔɔnl nin lijakunl, nin tijiir tibam a jim, tan wee Uwonbɔr naan ki ta sei tim ban ŋa u yada ki nyi ibamɔn nin, ke ti ga wee ki sei U kunɔɔpoogin.

eng: Everything that has been created by God is good, and nothing that is received with thanksgiving should be rejected.
local: Nan wee Uwonbɔr naan nin biɛn ŋan, ti laa yii niba ni ye ti gaa ni nin kunɔɔpoog ke.

eng: These things are made holy by Gods word and prayer.
local: nan bu-n Uwonbɔr a bɔr nin liwonmiɛl le che tijiir nmɔn be kasi.

eng: If you point these things out to the believers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus who has been trained by the words of faith and the good teaching that youve carefully followed.
local: A ta ni niɛ nan ki wɔɔn a nabum ke, a li ŋa usanliiŋan Masiya a toontumin, ŋaah nɔɔ ibamɔn a yada nin nwɔɔn ŋam man wugiriŋin.

eng: But stay away from the godless myths that are passed down from the older women. Train yourself for a holy life!.
local: Laa nɔɔ ban kaa ye biwonjiɛmin a teeni nin tinaakpabɔri, pɔɔn a ba ki li jɔɔ nwonjiɛn binben.

eng: While physical training has some value, training in holy living is useful for everything. It has promise for this life now and the life to come.
local: Tigbanann a tunim jɔɔ tinyɔɔr ti ba ti ni, amaa nwonjiɛn binben jɔɔ tinyɔɔr niwann biɛn ni, ki ŋmag limɔsiinl lan tun daandaan nan nin iyoo yan la chaan nin.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves complete acceptance.
local: Ni niɛ nan ye ibamɔn le, ni kpaan nin bininfob n gaa ti nbamɔm.

eng: We work and struggle for this: Our hope is set on the living God, who is the savior of all people, especially those who believe.
local: nan bu-n ti jɔɔ tama Uwonbɔr wan fo-n ban, wan ye bininfob biɛn a feeru win, naah jann tɔɔ ban bu ye ban ŋa u yada n le.

eng: Command these things. Teach them.
local: Siin nsiim wee ki wɔɔn ni niɛ nan.

eng: Dont let anyone look down on you because you are young. Instead, set an example for the believers through your speech, behavior, love, faith, and by being sexually pure.
local: Laa che bin lig ki ziɛŋ ŋaah ye kibipɔliŋ nbu, amaa ŋa limagil ki wɔɔn yadadam a pipagirin, a miɛfolin, a bamin, a yada-n nin a kasi a toon yin.

eng: Until I arrive, pay attention to public reading, preaching, and teaching.
local: Hali nin maah na li dan n-yonn man, a li jɔɔ isaŋ ki karin Uwonbɔr a bɔr nmɔn ki tenn bininfoba, wee ki li mɔɔn ti ki li jɔɔ ti wɔɔn ba.

eng: Dont neglect the spiritual gift in you that was given through prophecy when the elders laid hands on you.
local: Laa che a piin yin ŋa yɔli, nan ye ilinlen leen ki seiŋ n-yonn man wee bininkpeeb nan ta bi nɔɔ-i paan a bu-n.

eng: Practice these things, and live by them so that your progress will be visible to all.
local: Li jɔɔ inunman tibɔr nan yaan man, ki ta a gbanann biɛn ki sei ba, ni ma yin che bininfob biɛn n kan a kpaarim.

eng: Focus on working on your own development and on what you teach. If you do this, you will save yourself and those who hear you.
local: Li nyi a ba bu, ki li ŋmag a wɔɔmin nbamɔm. Li jɔɔ inunman bi bu, nan bu-n ni ye a ŋaan man ke, a li fee a ba nin ban pelig a wɔɔm nmɔn ki jaa.

eng: Dont correct an older man, but encourage him like hes your father; treat younger men like your brothers.
local: Laa fuun wan joŋ bu, amaa pag u nin nniɛn diin ke a baa-n. Li ŋmag nnachipɔnbum ke a na bumin.

eng: treat older women like your mother, and treat younger women like your sisters with appropriate respect.
local: ki li ŋmag bipiininkpeeb ke a namin, ki ji li ŋmag nbisiɛm ke a ninsiɛbin nin kasi a binbem.

eng: Take care of widows who are truly needy.
local: Li lig ipukɔɔ yan sin ban literilin nbamɔm nin jilima.

eng: But if a particular widow has children or grandchildren, they should first learn to respect their own family and repay their parents, because this pleases God.
local: Amaa lipukɔɔl lan jɔɔ nbuwaab bee iyaabil ke, nbuwaab nin iyaabili nmɔn le ye bin chinn tinn biwonjiɛnl a sam ki li jɔɔ tun ki lig bi niin yaab, bi ŋa man ke bi li yɔ ki jiin bi baam nin bi yaajam kaah nan tun nan ki sei bin, Uwonbɔr a num kaah gbeeg nan le yen.

eng: A widow who is truly needy and all alone puts her hope in God and keeps on going with requests and prayers, night and day.
local: Lipukɔɔl lan sin ban nterimin wee kaa jɔɔ wan li ter win, u tama be Uwonbɔr ban le, le u miɛ Uwonbɔr ki ban nterim nween nin kunyiɛg.

eng: But a widow who tries to live a life of luxury is dead even while she is alive.
local: Amaa lipukɔɔl lan ta liba ki sei tigbanann a bam ma pii kpou, hali nin waah le la fo-n nan biɛn yɔli.

eng: Teach these things so that the families will be without fault.
local: Ta nwɔɔm nan ki wɔɔn bininfob nmɔn na, wee bi laa jɔɔ igalin ni.

eng: But if someone doesnt provide for their own family, and especially for a member of their household, they have denied the faith. They are worse than those who have no faith.
local: Ni ye wan kaa ter u maali, nin naah jann tɔɔ ban bu u tɔɔl a niin yaab ke, u yaa daan kaa ji ŋa yada le nmɔn, ni bu u bir ki jon wan kaa ye uwonjiɛn na.

eng: Put a widow on the list who is older than years old and who was faithful to her husband.
local: Lipukɔɔl lan kaa la foo ibin piloob kaa kpiɛ ipukɔɔ a kanlin ni, see wan jon ibin piloob, ki ye wan wee u chal ŋa u yada.

eng: She should have a reputation for doing good: raising children, providing hospitality to strangers, washing the feet of the saints, helping those in distress, and dedicating herself to every kind of good thing.
local: wee bininfob nyi u nbamɔm u toon ŋan bu, ki ta jiin waah wubiri u buwaab man, nin waah tun jiininba a toon ki tenn biwonjiɛm man, nin waah gaan bicham u niin man, nin waah li tenn ban be limugilin literil lan, nin waah ta u ba ki sei itoon ŋan nin biɛn man.

eng: But dont accept younger widows for the list. When their physical desires distract them from Christ, they will want to get married.
local: Amaa bipiisapɔm ban ye ipukɔɔ n ma, laa ta bi yin ki kpiɛ nin yaan ni. Nan bu-n ni ye bi kɔlisa nan jir tigbanann a bam paam ke, bi yiin Yisa le ki ban bin kun tichar.

eng: Then they will be judged for setting aside their earlier commitment.
local: Ni ye man ke bi ban tibɔr a jim ki sei biba le nmɔn, nan bu-n bi bii bi chinchinn a mɔsiinlin na.

eng: Also, they learn to be lazy by going from house to house. They are not only lazy, but they also become gossips and busybodies, talking about things they shouldnt.
local: Nan kpiɛ, ni che bi bii bi saŋi le, ki jin kɔɔ bininfob a niin yin ki chaa, naa ye bi bii bi saŋ a binba le, amaa bi su libɔɔnsul le ki jɔɔ linunmanl lan kaa jɔɔ nyɔɔri, ki kɔɔ tibɔr tan kaa nyan bi-n.

eng: So I want younger widows to marry, have children, and manage their homes so that they wont give the enemy any reason to slander us. .
local: Ni bu n kpaan bipiisapɔm ban ye ipukɔɔ nbiɛn le ke bin kum bijab, ki maa nbuwaab, ki li lig bi niin nbamɔm wee ki laa che kidataagin n kan npaan ki ŋa kutingbiigin.

eng: Some have already turned away to follow Satan.
local: Biba pii fɔra ki labir bi bɔɔn kpaa ki nin nɔɔ Sintani le.

eng: If any woman who is a believer has widows in her family, she should take care of them and not burden the church, so that it can help other widows who are truly needy.
local: Ni ye upii wan ye uwonjiɛn wee ki jɔɔ ipukɔɔ u niin ke, ni ŋan nin un lig bi, ki laa che ipukɔɔ nmɔn a bɔmugkaar li tu biwonjiɛm bu, wee biwonjiɛmin nmɔn nfir lig ban le sin jɔɔ tibɔmugkaarin.

eng: Elders who lead well should be paid double, especially those who work with public speaking and teaching.
local: Bininkpeeb ban wɔɔnn biwonjiɛm a toon nbamɔmin kpaan nin bin kan jilima nkerim milee, naah jann tɔɔ ban bu le ye ban a toonl ye bi li mɔɔn ti ki wɔɔn nin.

eng: The scripture says, Dont put a muzzle on an ox while it treads grain , and Workers deserve their pay .
local: Nan bu-n Uwonbɔr a gbɔŋ len ke, Laa lol kinaajag a mɔb n-yonn man wee u be kuur idi, le Ni ŋan nin u toontunn biɛn n gaa u toon a yɔr.

eng: Dont accept an accusation made against an elder unless it is confirmed by two or three witnesses.
local: Laa chee ki ke uninkpel galin ni, see ke bininfob bilee bee bita le lagin tab ki jin siɛra.

eng: Discipline those who are sinning in front of everyone so that all the others will be afraid.
local: Ban tun tibir ke, a fuun bi bu kubabugin na, wee ban gurin n kan ikpaan.

eng: I charge you before God and Christ Jesus and the elect angels to follow these practices without bias, and without playing favorites.
local: Uwonbɔr a nintogil, nin Masiya a nintogil nin Malaka gannkaabin a nintogil le n kpaaniŋ ke, a chee nwɔɔm nan wee ki laa jɔɔ nbɔgirim bee ki gann ki ban uba ki jiɛn utɔ ŋaah tun nan biɛn nin ni.

eng: Dont rush to commission anyone to leadership, and dont participate in the sins of others. Keep yourself morally pure.
local: Laa jegil ki ta a nɔɔi ki paag bininfob bu, ki laa kpiɛ ban tun tibir bu wee ni tun ni. Li ŋmag a ba kasi.

eng: Dont drink water anymore, but use a little wine because of your stomach problems and your frequent illnesses.
local: Laa nyu nnyum a binba, amaa ki li nyu ndaam wama wamau a powiɛn nin ŋaah buŋir iyoo biɛn nbu.

eng: The sins of some people are obvious, and the sins are judged before the people must face judgment, but the sins of other people show up later.
local: Bininfob bibam a bir pii dɔ npaan ni le, ki pii chinn dɔ ki ye bin ji bi tibɔr le; le bi ba mu a bir na li nya npaan ni ni bɔɔn bu.

eng: In the same way, the good that people do is also obvious and cant be hidden.
local: Man mu le ji ye ni, itoon ŋan mu be npaan ni le, hali itoon ŋan yan kaa be npaan ni nin kaa li fir woon ni.

eng: Those who are under the bondage of slavery should consider their own masters as worthy of full respect so that Gods name and our teaching wont get a bad reputation.
local: Ban biɛn wee tiyomir a naajadaag paa bi bu nan, n chee sei biyudam nin linungbeel nin jilima takpem wee Uwonbɔr a yinl nin taah wɔɔn nan nin nlaa ye kutingbiig.

eng: And those who have masters who are believers shouldnt look down on them because they are brothers. Instead, they should serve them more faithfully, because the people who benefit from your good service are believers who are loved. Teach and encourage these things.
local: Biyom ban a yudam ye biwonjiɛmin n laa ziɛn bi, nan bu-n bi ye nnabum le nin tab. Amaa ni ye bin mann ter bi le nbamɔm, nan bu-n ban ji bi toon nmɔn a nyɔɔr ye biwonjiɛm le, ban wee biyudamin jiɛ. Ni niɛ le ye nan wee ni li jɔɔ wɔɔn ki pɔɔgir bi gbanann.

eng: If anyone teaches anything different and doesnt agree with sound teaching about our Lord Jesus Christ and teaching that is consistent with godliness.
local: Wan wɔɔn tibɔkar a wɔɔm wee kaa chee nwɔɔm bamɔm man wee ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya wɔɔn nin liwonjiɛnl a wɔɔmin ke.

eng: that person is conceited. They dont understand anything but have a sick obsession with debates and arguments. This creates jealousy, conflict, verbal abuse, and evil suspicions.
local: u ye kalanbaanidaan wan donn uba le kaa sin nyi niba. Ki ji ye wan a mɔsanyum sɔɔn, nin wan a sufu be limɔkpel a famin nin tibɔyɔɔr a pagimin, nin lipiiponl lan jɔɔ nbɔgirim chaan ki che taa nyi ki biɛn tab.

eng: There is constant bickering between people whose minds are ruined and who have been robbed of the truth. They think that godliness is a way to make money!.
local: ki far limɔkpel nin bininfob ban tiɛr tipotiɛbir bi sufu-n nin, bi lann bibamɔn le ki nyi ke liwonjiɛnl ye njɔɔm a wan le.

eng: Actually, godliness is a great source of profit when it is combined with being happy with what you already have.
local: Amaa uninfo a num gbee nan wee u jɔɔ liwonjiɛnlin nin ke, ni ye tinyɔɔr le takpem ki sei u.

eng: We didnt bring anything into the world and so we cant take anything out of it.
local: Taa ŋmag niba ki dan dulinya nan yaan ni, ti mu kaa li fir ta niba ki nya dulinya nan yaan ni.

eng: well be happy with food and clothing.
local: Amaa ni ye ti jɔɔ tijiir nin tiwann yeewann ke, ti num li gbee taah jɔɔ nan nmɔn.

eng: But people who are trying to get rich fall into temptation. They are trapped by many stupid and harmful passions that plunge people into ruin and destruction.
local: Bininfob ban ban bin ŋa bijɔɔndamin, bi ma kɔɔ nbigimin, nin kupeŋin nin ijɔrig takpem a wann nin kɔlisa kan ye kidaŋ ki bii bininfob wee bi lurin.

eng: The love of money is the root of all kinds of evil. Some have wandered away from the faith and have impaled themselves with a lot of pain because they made money their goal.
local: Lilig banl ye titoonbir biɛn a sibonl le. Bininfob ban ban ilig ki tan lagir nmɔn a yada bora, le bi sufu nin gbee nin npoobiin takpem.

eng: But as for you, man of God, run away from all these things. Instead, pursue righteousness, holy living, faithfulness, love, endurance, and gentleness.
local: Amaa fin, wan ye Uwonbɔr a ninfo nan, guun ki nya ni niɛ nan yaan biɛn na, pɔɔn a ba ki li jɔɔ nbuchin binben, nin nwonjiɛn binben, nin yada, nin njiɛm, ki li jɔɔ lipoobil ki li be soon.

eng: Compete in the good fight of faith. Grab hold of eternal life—you were called to it, and you made a good confession of it in the presence of many witnesses.
local: Kɔm likɔnŋanl nin yada. Li ŋmag limiɛfol lan kaa jɔɔ diɛmin, lan bu wee Uwonbɔr nan yiŋin, wee a ŋa siɛra ŋaŋ ki kpiir ki wɔɔn siɛradam takpemin.

eng: I command you in the presence of God, who gives life to all things, and Christ Jesus, who made the good confession when testifying before Pontius Pilate.
local: Uwonbɔr a nintogil, wan tenn niwann biɛn limiɛfol nin Masiya , wan nan sir Pontiɛ Palati a nintogil ki ŋa siɛra ŋaŋ n bu, n kpaaniŋ le.

eng: Obey this order without fault or failure until the appearance of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: ke a li ŋmag nsiim nan ki laa jɔɔ igalin ni, hali nin ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya kaah na li degirin.

eng: The timing of this appearance is revealed by God alone, who is the blessed and only master, the King of kings and Lord of lords.
local: N-yonn man wee ni na yin ŋa Uma Uwonbɔr a saŋi, tikaardaan wan le ŋmag, ki ye bibɔrtiib biɛn a bɔru nin biyudam biɛn a yudaau.

eng: He alone has immortality and lives in light that no one can come near. No human being has ever seen or is able to see him. Honor and eternal power belong to him. Amen.
local: U yaa binba ni le limiɛfol lan kaa jɔɔ ndiɛmin be, ki be nween man yaan wee uba kaa li fir foon niin ni, uba kaa la nyi kan wi, bee ki li fir kan wi. Uma kpaan nin jilima ki ye npɔɔn takpendaan hali nin iyoo yan kaa jɔɔ diɛmi. Ibamɔn.

eng: Tell people who are rich at this time not to become egotistical and not to place their hope on their finances, which are uncertain. Instead, they need to hope in God, who richly provides everything for our enjoyment.
local: Kpaan ban ye bijɔɔndam dulinya kan yaan wee ti be nan ke bi laa jɔɔ kalanbaani bee ki ta bi tama ki ŋa njɔɔm man kaa si bogiliba nan yaan ni, amaa bin che bi tama li be Uwonbɔr ban, wan tenn ti njɔɔm man biɛn wee ti jɔɔ ter tiba-n.

eng: Tell them to do good, to be rich in the good things they do, to be generous, and to share with others.
local: Bei bi wee bi li tun nan ŋan na, ki li ye bijɔɔndam itoon ŋan nin, ki li por baah jɔɔ nan ki tenn taba ki laa jɔɔ woog tabi.

eng: When they do these things, they will save a treasure for themselves that is a good foundation for the future. That way they can take hold of what is truly life.
local: Bi ŋa man ke, bi li bil lifaal ki sei biba lan ye lifiɛl lan pɔɔ ki guu n-yonn man chaan nan, wee bin nan fir kan limiɛfol lan ye ibamɔn a miɛfol.

eng: Timothy, protect what has been given to you in trust. Avoid godless and pointless discussions and the contradictory claims of so-called knowledge.
local: Timoti, li mann ŋmag nan wee Uwonbɔr ta ŋa a nɔɔn ke a li ŋmagin nbamɔma. Jiɛn tijɔrbɔr tan ye limɔkpel wee kaa jɔɔ nyɔɔr kaa biɛ ji ye Uwonbɔr yaar wee bibam yin ni nlamin na.

eng: When some people adopted this false knowledge, they missed the goal of faith. May grace be with you all.
local: nan bu-n bininfob ban ke bi jɔɔ man a biɛm nmɔn bor bi yada-n na. Uwonbɔr a nyunyunbasanl li be ni biɛn bu.

eng: So, my child, draw your strength from the grace that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Mambu, n bija, fin che a gbanann li pɔɔu Masiya a nyunyunbasanlin bu.

eng: Take the things you heard me say in front of many other witnesses and pass them on to faithful people who are also capable of teaching others.
local: Ta tibɔr tan wee a gbir n pag kuninfogbaluŋ a numin nin, ki wɔɔn bininfob ban si nbamɔm wee ki mu ye ban li fir wɔɔn bi kpiɛtiibin.

eng: Accept your share of suffering like a good soldier of Christ Jesus.
local: Kpiɛ ti bu ki ji fala ŋaah ye Masiya a tɔtogir wan ŋan nin bu.

eng: Understand that the last days will be dangerous times.
local: Amaa ni li nyi man: Idaa yan na yin joorin na li bir takpem.

eng: Nobody who serves in the military gets tied up with civilian matters, so that they can please the one who recruited them.
local: Utɔtogir kaa jɔɔ u nɔɔ kɔɔn ban kaa ye bitɔtogib a bɔrin ni, nan bu-n u ban un tun nan li gbee bitɔtogib a yudaau a num le.

eng: People will be selfish and love money. They will be the kind of people who brag and who are proud. They will slander others, and they will be disobedient to their parents. They will be ungrateful, unholy.
local: Bininfob na yin jiɛ bi ba le, ki ye ban ban ilig, nin ligbingbanfaal, nin kalanbaani, ki sugir bininfob, kaa ji li gbir sei bi baam nin bi nami, ki li ye ban kaa jɔɔ linungbeeli nin ban kaa jɔɔ kasi a binbem.

eng: Also in the same way, athletes dont win unless they follow the rules.
local: Man mu le ni ye ki sei utaaguun, waa li fir kan nnyaŋim a yuchigirigi see ke u nɔɔ litaguunl a siim kaah ye man.

eng: unloving, contrary, and critical. They will be without self-control and brutal, and they wont love what is good.
local: kaa li jɔɔ njiɛm nin tabi, kaa li jiɛn tab a bir per bi, nin kutingbiig, kaa li fir ŋmag biba, ki ye ban jɔɔ npooton nin ban kaa jiɛ nan ŋan ni.

eng: A hardworking farmer should get the first share of the crop.
local: Ukpaar wan a num man le ye wan yin chinn kan u tol tikpajiirin.

eng: They will be people who are disloyal, reckless, and conceited. They will love pleasure instead of loving God.
local: bi na li nya tab a bɔɔn, ki ye ban kaa tiɛri, ki donn biba, bi na yin ban dulinya nan a wann ŋann le ki jon Uwonbɔr.

eng: Think about what Im saying; the Lord will give you understanding about everything.
local: Li tiɛr nan wee n len nan bu, Uyudaan li che a biɛ ni biɛn.

eng: They will look like they are religious but deny Gods power. Avoid people like this.
local: bi na yin jɔɔ nwonjiɛn binben le tigbanann nin, amaa le ki sin yii liwonjiɛnl a pɔɔm. Ni laa che nim nin bi ma jɔɔ nɔɔ nin tabi.

eng: Remember Jesus Christ, who was raised from the dead and descended from David. This is my good news.
local: Li tiɛr Yisa Masiya wan nan fii nkumin ki ye Defid a yaabilin bu. N bɔŋann nin sɔ.

eng: Some will slither into households and control immature women who are burdened with sins and driven by all kinds of desires.
local: Bi yaa ni bibam le woog kɔɔ bininfob a niin yin ki lar tipiijɔri ban a sufu gbee nin titoonbir wee ki nɔɔ bi sufu a bamin biɛn nin.

eng: This is the reason Im suffering to the point that Im in prison like a common criminal. But Gods word cannot be imprisoned.
local: tan bu wee n ji fala hali ke bi nan lolim tikulor a li ke tukangbirdaan nin. Amaa uba kaa li fir lol Uwonbɔr a bɔri.

eng: These women are always learning, but they can never arrive at an understanding of the truth.
local: bipiib nmɔn le tinn le iyoo biɛn, amaa le kaa biɛr ibamɔn nni.

eng: This is why I endure everything for the sake of those who are chosen by God so that they too may experience salvation in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.
local: Mambu le n pɔɔn nba niwann biɛn nin Uwonbɔr a ninfob gannkaab nbu, ke bi mu n kan nŋmarim man be Masiya nin, nin jilima kan kaa jɔɔ ndiɛmin.

eng: These people oppose the truth in the same way that Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses. Their minds are corrupt and their faith is counterfeit.
local: A li ke Janesi nin Jambiresi kaah kaa nan chee sei Moziz man ni, man le bininfob nan mu kaa chee sei ibamɔn nni, bi tiɛr nan bir le, kaa jɔɔ yada.

eng: This saying is reliable: If we have died together, we will also live together.
local: Tibɔr nan ye ibamɔn le; Ni ye ti kpo nin u ke, ti mu ji na li jɔɔ limiɛfol nin u;.

eng: But they wont get very far. Their foolishness will become obvious to everyone like those others.
local: Amaa baa li fir lar bininfob ki chaari, nan bu-n bininfob nmɔn biɛn li biɛ ke bi ye tijɔri le, ke baah nan biɛ Janesi nin Jambiresi bu man ni.

eng: If we endure, we will also rule together. If we deny him, he will also deny us.
local: ni ye ti pɔɔn tiba ke, ti mu wo li ji u nnaamin. Ni ye ti yii u ke, u mu wo li yii ti.

eng: But you have paid attention to my teaching, conduct, purpose, faithfulness, patience, love, and endurance.
local: Amaa fin Timoti, a nyi n wɔɔnimin kaah ye man, nin n binbem, nin n lol, nin n yada, nin n mɔril, nin n bam nin maah pɔɔn nba man.

eng: If we are disloyal, he stays faithful because he cant be anything else than what he is.
local: ni ye taa si bogiliba ke, uma le yin si bogiliba le, nan bu-n waa li fir yii u baantɔɔl a binbemi.

eng: You have seen me experience physical abuse and ordeals in places such as Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. I put up with all sorts of abuse, and the Lord rescued me from it all!.
local: nin baah mugirim man, nin n fala a jim, nin tiwann tan biɛn nan kam Antiɛg, nin Ikoniɛm nin Lisitira, nin maah nan pɔɔn nba ki kan limugil lan. Nin ni ma biɛn Uyudaan nan nyan ma.

eng: Remind them of these things and warn them in the sight of God not to engage in battles over words that arent helpful and only destroy those who hear them.
local: Li gbaa tiɛri bi tiwann nan biɛn na, kpaan bi Uwonbɔr buu, ke bin nyam tibɔyɔɔr a pagimin, taa jɔɔ nyɔɔri, amaa ni bii ban pelig nle.

eng: In fact, anyone who wants to live a holy life in Christ Jesus will be harassed.
local: Ibamɔn, uninfo wan biɛn ban un be Uwonbɔr a bam Masiya a yinl bu li kan limugil.

eng: Make an effort to present yourself to God as a tried-and-true worker, who doesnt need to be ashamed but is one who interprets the message of truth correctly.
local: Pɔɔn a ba ki ta a ba sei Uwonbɔr ke wan wee U ganniŋ, ke utoontunn wan kaa san ifa wee ki ŋmag Uwonbɔr a bɔr tan ye ibamɔn nin nbamɔm.

eng: But evil people and swindlers will grow even worse, as they deceive others while being deceived themselves.
local: le tininfobir nin bilinlarib a toonbir li mann kpiɛ, le bin lar bitab le bi tab mu nlar bi.

eng: Avoid their godless discussions, because they will lead many people into ungodly behavior.
local: Nyam a ba tibɔr tan kaa kpaan nin uwonjiɛn li pag n-yaan, nan bu-n bininfob ban be man nmɔn a bol mann fɔbig le nin Uwonbɔr.

eng: But you must continue with the things you have learned and found convincing. You know who taught you.
local: Amaa fin ma, le li ŋmag nan wee a tinn ki ŋa ni yada-n na, nan bu-n a nyi ban tinniŋ tibɔŋann nmɔn.

eng: and their ideas will spread like an infection. This includes Hymenaeus and Philetus.
local: Bi wɔɔm nmɔn li yann ke libiɛl kaah pɔr tigbanann nin man nin. Bi ni bibam le ye Hamenasi nin Filetusi.

eng: Since childhood you have known the holy scriptures that help you to be wise in a way that leads to salvation through faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: naah nyan a buwaan nin na, a pii nyi Uwonbɔr a kasi a bɔrin, nan che a jɔɔ nlam ki kan nŋmarim man nyan a yada kan wee a jɔɔ nin Masiya-n.

eng: who have deviated from the truth by claiming that the resurrection has already happened. This has undermined some peoples faith.
local: ban bor kaa nɔɔ ibamɔn a samin. Bi ke nkum a fiim pii jon na, mambu che bi bii bibam a yadau.

eng: Every scripture is inspired by God and is useful for teaching, for showing mistakes, for correcting, and for training character.
local: Tibɔr tan biɛn be Uwonbɔr a gbɔŋin ni ye Uwonbɔr a mɔleen le, tibɔr nmɔn jɔɔ tinyɔɔr ki jiin nwɔɔnim nin ikpaan, nin nbuchin binben paam.

eng: Gods solid foundation is still standing with this sign: The Lord knows the people who belong to him, and Everyone who confesses the Lords name must avoid wickedness. .
local: Nin ni ma biɛn yɔli, Uwonbɔr kaah pii bil lifiɛl lan nin sir nbamɔma, le u daagim a sɔbim paa li bu: Uyudaan nyi ban ye u yaab, le Wan biɛn mu ban un nɔɔ Uyudaan ke, un kpenn u binbema ki nya titoonbir a tumin na.

eng: so that the person who belongs to God can be equipped to do everything that is good.
local: wee nin che Uwonbɔr a ninfou a binbem li ŋan, wee un fir tun itoon ŋan biɛn.

eng: In a mansion, there arent just gold and silver bowls but also some bowls that are made of wood and clay. Some are meant for special uses, some for garbage.
local: Iniin takpen a poolin jɔɔ tiwann tan bi jɔɔ ŋaan tijiir a booli, naa ye salima nin tikur ninann a binba le bi ta naan ti, amaa tidaar nin tiyɔgir mu yaar be niin; bi jɔɔ tibam ki tun kuchiig daal le, le ki jɔɔ titɔ mu tun idaa biɛn a toon.

eng: So if anyone washes filth off themselves, they will be set apart as a special bowl. They will be useful to the owner of the mansion for every sort of good work.
local: Ni ye uninfo ŋmag uba nin tibuchinn kaa tun tibir ke, bi li ta u ki tun ibuchin toon, yan ye kasi, ki ŋan sei Uyudaan wee ki ŋa sili nin un tun itoon ŋan nin ke.

eng: Run away from adolescent cravings. Instead, pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace together with those who confess the Lord with a clean heart.
local: Guun nya kuninfopɔŋ a kɔlisa birug n-yaan na, ki li jɔɔ nbuchin binben na, nin njiɛm, nin limɔril nin nposɔɔn, amaa wee ki li lig fin nin ban a sufu ween wee bi yi ti Yudaau ki ban literilin.

eng: Avoid foolish and thoughtless discussions, since you know that they produce conflicts.
local: Nyam a nɔɔ ijɔrig nin nlinliim a mɔkpel faalin na, nan bu-n a nyi ke ni jɔɔ ikɔn le chaan.

eng: Gods slave shouldnt be argumentative but should be kind toward all people, able to teach, patient.
local: Naa ŋan nin Uyudaan a toontunnu li ban ikɔn ni, amaa u li jɔɔ nbinben ŋan nin bininfob biɛn, ki li ye wan li fir wɔɔn, ki li jɔɔ limɔril.

eng: and should correct opponents with gentleness. Perhaps God will change their mind and give them a knowledge of the truth.
local: Ni kpaa le nin u li be soon ki fir wɔɔn ban yii u bɔrin, ki li jɔɔ tama ke Uwonbɔr li sei bi nkpenim man li wɔɔn bi ibamɔn nin.

eng: They may come to their senses and escape from the devils trap that holds them captive to do his will.
local: wee bi lam n jirin, wee bin ŋmar ki nya ulinlaril a peŋ kan wee u ta pen choo bi wee bi tun u bamin.

eng: But you should talk in a way that is consistent with sound teaching.
local: Ni kpaa le nin fin Tatusi n wɔɔn bi ibamɔn a wɔɔm.

eng: Tell the older men to be sober, dignified, sensible, and healthy in respect to their faith, love, and patience.
local: Wɔɔn bininkpeebin wee bin fir ki ŋmag biba wee ki laa fiin bi ŋu yi, ki li jɔɔ nbinben ŋan nin jilima, ki li fir chor bi ba, ki li nɔɔ ibamɔn a wɔɔm, ki li jɔɔ njiɛm, ki li pɔɔn biba bi fala a jimin.

eng: Likewise, tell the older women to be reverent in their behavior, teaching what is good, rather than being gossips or addicted to heavy drinking.
local: Man mu jigin, wɔɔn bipiininkpeeb wee bi li jɔɔ jilima bi binbemin, ki laa ye bitingbiibi, ki laa ye bidanyubi, amaa wee ki li wɔɔn nan ŋan.

eng: That way they can mentor young women to love their husbands and children.
local: Ni ye man ke, bi li tinn bipiisapɔm wee bi li ban bichiɛb nin bi buwaab.

eng: and to be sensible, morally pure, working at home, kind and submissive to their own husbands, so that Gods word wont be ridiculed.
local: ki li chor biba, ki li be kasi, ki li jɔɔ inunman bi niin yin, ki li be nbamɔm, ki li ye ban cheel bi chiɛb a mɔɔŋi, ni ma li che uba kaa li fir pag ki bii Uwonbɔr a bɔri.

eng: Likewise, encourage the younger men to be sensible.
local: Man mu jigin, pɔɔg binaachipɔm mu a gbanann wee bi li chor bi ba.

eng: in every way. Offer yourself as a role model of good actions. Show integrity, seriousness.
local: Nin niwann biɛn ni ŋaam limagil ki sei bi ki li tun nan ŋan na. A wɔɔm a poolin ke, a wɔɔn bi tininforin nin inunman na.

eng: and a sound message that is above criticism when you teach, so that any opponent will be ashamed because they wont find anything bad to say about us.
local: Ki li pag ibamɔn yan wee uba kaa li fir pag bii ti, wee ban kaa chee a wɔɔm nmɔn n ji ifa, nan bu-n baa jɔɔ niba a bɔbir ki li fir pag sei ti.

eng: Tell slaves to submit to their own masters and please them in everything they do. They shouldnt talk back.
local: Wɔɔn ban ye biyom wee bi li cheel bi yudam a mɔɔŋi niwann biɛn nin, ki li pɔɔn bi ba ki li be nbinben man li gbee bi yudam a num, ki laa far bi imɔkpeli.

eng: or steal. Instead, they should show that they are completely reliable in everything so that they might make the teaching about God our savior attractive in every way.
local: ki laa su bi wan yɔɔri, amaa wee ki wɔɔn ke bi sin ye ban wee bi li ŋa bi yada le, wee niwann biɛn nin bin che Uwonbɔr wan ye ti feeru win a wɔɔmin li jɔɔ kɔlisa.

eng: The grace of God has appeared, bringing salvation to all people.
local: Uwonbɔr a nyunyunbasanl lan ta feegab dan ni, kpiir uninfo biɛn bu-u.

eng: It educates us so that we can live sensible, ethical, and godly lives right now by rejecting ungodly lives and the desires of this world.
local: U nyunyunbasanl nmɔn wɔɔn ti ke ti yiim nan kaa ye nwonjiɛn binben nin dulinya nan a kɔlisa birug biɛn, wee ki li chor ti ba ki li ye ban jɔɔ lasaab, ki li jɔɔ nwonjiɛn binben n-yonn man wee ti be nan yaan.

eng: At the same time we wait for the blessed hope and the glorious appearance of our great God and savior Jesus Christ.
local: A li ke taah le jɔɔ tama ki guu ti kaar a daalin, le ti lig lidaal lan wee ti Wonbɔr gbingbemilin nin ti feegabdaan Yisa Masiya kaah na yin degirin nin kupag man.

eng: He gave himself for us in order to rescue us from every kind of lawless behavior, and cleanse a special people for himself who are eager to do good actions.
local: wan ta uba ki ŋa nkpenim a manug ki sei ti, ki nyan ti titoonbir biɛn a yomirin, le ki ŋa ti u baantɔɔl a ninfob ban be kasi ki jɔɔ linunmanl nin itoon ŋan a tum.

eng: Talk about these things. Encourage and correct with complete authority. Dont let anyone disrespect you.
local: Ni niɛ nan le ye nan wee a li wɔɔn bi. Ki li jɔɔ npɔɔn man wee bi ta seiŋin biɛn ki pɔɔg bi gbanann ki li kpaan bi. Ki laa che uba nlig ziɛŋi.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, to promote the promise of life that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Min Pɔɔl wan ye Masiya a toom Uwonbɔr a bam bu-n, le u ke n mɔɔn limiɛfol a bɔr tan wee Uwonbɔr nan siin limɔsiinl Masiya bu-n.

eng: To Timothy, my dear child. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: le n sɔb ki tenn Timoti wan ye n bibankaagin: Ti Baa Uwonbɔr nin ti Yudaau Masiya a nyunyunbasanl nin nposɔɔn li be a bu.

eng: Im grateful to God, whom I serve with a good conscience as my ancestors did. I constantly remember you in my prayers day and night.
local: N poor Uwonbɔr wan wee n jiɛn u nan, ke n yaajam kaah nan ŋaan man nin, nin lipotiɛŋanl, n wonmiɛlin n tiɛr nibu n sufu ni, nween nin kunyiɛg.

eng: When I remember your tears, I long to see you so that I can be filled with happiness.
local: N nan tiɛr a nyinyinn mɔɔŋin bu ke, ni ban n kaŋ le wee nin mɔŋim.

eng: Im reminded of your authentic faith, which first lived in your grandmother Lois and your mother Eunice. Im sure that this faith is also inside you.
local: N tiɛr yada bamɔŋ kan wee a jɔɔ-n bu, ki ye yada kan wee a yaa Lɔsi nin a na Yunisi nan jɔɔ n-yaa booli le, le n nyi ke a tɔɔl jɔɔ yada nmɔn.

eng: Because of this, Im reminding you to revive Gods gift that is in you through the laying on of my hands.
local: Ni niɛ nan bu le n tiɛriŋ ke a figir Uwonbɔr a piin yan be a ni-n, maah nan ta n nɔɔi ki paan a bu n-yonn man ni.

eng: God didnt give us a spirit that is timid but one that is powerful, loving, and self-controlled.
local: Uwonbɔr kaa ta Kinaaŋ kan li che ti san bijawaam le sei ti, amaa U sei ti Kinaaŋ kan li che ti jɔɔ npɔɔn le, nin njiɛm nin taah li dar tiba a tul man.

eng: So dont be ashamed of the testimony about the Lord or of me, his prisoner. Instead, share the suffering for the good news, depending on Gods power.
local: Mambu laa san ifa nin a ji ti Yudaau a siɛra bee min wan ye u loondikɔɔru win a siɛra, amaa Uwonbɔr a pɔɔm bu che min nin fin nlagin ki ji fala tibɔŋann nan bu.

eng: God is the one who saved and called us with a holy calling. This wasnt based on what we have done, but it was based on his own purpose and grace that he gave us in Christ Jesus before time began.
local: Uma nan fee ti gab ki yin ti ke ti li be kasi a miɛfolin na, naa ye taah tun nan bu, amaa ni ye u baantɔɔl kaah lol man le nin u nyunyunbasanlin bu. U nan san ti kunyunyunbaag Masiya bu hali n-yonn man nan jon nin.

eng: Now his grace is revealed through the appearance of our savior, Christ Jesus. He destroyed death and brought life and immortality into clear focus through the good news.
local: amaa daandaan nan ni kpiir ki wɔɔn ta, ti feegab daan Masiya wan degirin ti bu-n bu, wan nyaŋ nkum wee ki che limiɛfol nin tigbanann tan kaa kpegin nɔɔ tibɔŋann bu ki dan nin.

eng: I was appointed a messenger, apostle, and teacher of this good news.
local: Tibɔŋann nan bu, le Uwonbɔr nan gannim ki ŋaam umɔleenmɔɔn, nin ntoon nin wan wɔɔnn.

eng: This is also why Im suffering the way I do, but Im not ashamed. I know the one in whom Ive placed my trust. Im convinced that God is powerful enough to protect what he has placed in my trust until that day.
local: Ni ma che n ji fala ke maah ji man nan. Nin ni ma biɛn ni, ifa kaa jɔɔmi, nan bu-n n nyi wan wee n ŋa u yada-n, le n nyi ke u sin li guurim ki nan kpaa u jirin daal.

eng: Hold on to the pattern of sound teaching that you heard from me with the faith and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Ŋaah gbir man n ban nin, li ŋmag nwɔɔm bamɔm man wee n ta wɔɔn niŋ nbamɔm, nin yada nin njiɛm Masiya bu.

eng: Protect this good thing that has been placed in your trust through the Holy Spirit who lives in us.
local: Li ŋmag tinyɔɔŋann tan wee bi nan ta wɔɔniŋ nna, Kasi a Naaŋ kan be ti ni-n li teriŋ wee a fir ŋmag ti nbamɔm.

eng: You know that everyone in Asia has turned away from me, including Phygelus and Hermogenes.
local: A nyi ke ban biɛn nan be Asiya a yerin n nan labir bi bɔɔn kpaa ma, bi ni bibam le ye Faajɛlusi nin Hɛrimojɛnesi.

eng: May the Lord show mercy to Onesiphorus household, because he supported me many times and he wasnt ashamed of my imprisonment.
local: N miɛ Uwonbɔr le ke un san Onesiforusi a niin yaab kunyunyunbaag, nan bu-n u ye wan nan pɔɔgir n sufu le, le ifa kaa nan jɔɔ wi nin tikulor tan nan lolim nbu.

eng: After I arrived in Rome, he quickly looked for me and found me.
local: Waah nan foon Rom a tiŋin nin, u nan bam le linunmanl hali ki nan kan n bol.

eng: May the Lord allow him to find his mercy on that day .
local: Ti yudaau n san u kunyunyunbaag u jirin daal! A baantɔɔl nyi waah nan terim Efesusi a tiŋin man.

eng: Remind them to submit to rulers and authorities. They should be obedient and ready to do every good thing.
local: Tiɛr bininfob nmɔn ke bi li nɔɔ biyudam nin bibɔrtiib a siim kaah wɔɔn man nin, ki li cheel bi mɔɔŋi, ki ŋa sili nin bin tun niwann nan ŋan biɛn.

eng: They shouldnt speak disrespectfully about anyone, but they should be peaceful, kind, and show complete courtesy toward everyone.
local: bi laa jɔɔ kutingbiig u ba bu, ki li be nin nposɔɔn, ki li jɔɔ nbinben ŋan, ki li tenn bininfob biɛn ibamɔn a jilima.

eng: We were once foolish, disobedient, deceived, and slaves to our desires and various pleasures too. We were spending our lives in evil behavior and jealousy. We were disgusting, and we hated other people.
local: Isaŋ iba ti mu nan ye tijɔri le nin tukangbirdam, le ni lar ti ki ta ti ŋa tiyomir, ki jɔɔ kɔlisa birug nin dulinya nan a wan ŋan. Le ti jɔɔ kininaŋ nin linunchɔril, le bi nan ti le ti mu nan bitab.

eng: But when God our saviors kindness and love appeared.
local: Amaa Uwonbɔr wan ye ti feeru nan a ŋam nin U bam kaah nan degirin nin.

eng: he saved us because of his mercy, not because of righteous things we had done. He did it through the washing of new birth and the renewing by the Holy Spirit.
local: le U fee ti gab, naa ye ibuchin toon le ti tun ni, amaa U nyunyunbasanl bu. U fee ti gab waah nan fun ti nnyum ki sei ti nmaal pɔɔn nin kinaaŋ pɔŋ Kasi a Naaŋ a pɔɔm bu.

eng: which God poured out upon us generously through Jesus Christ our savior.
local: Kasi a Naaŋ nmɔn le U nan kpaar takpem ki jaa uninfo biɛn bu Yisa Masiya wan ye ti feegabdaan nin bu.

eng: So, since we have been made righteous by his grace, we can inherit the hope for eternal life.
local: U nyunyunbasanl bu le U ke tibɔr ŋan, ti na li ŋa Uwonbɔr a faajib ki jɔɔ limiɛfol lan kaa jɔɔ diɛmin a tama.

eng: This saying is reliable. And I want you to insist on these things, so that those who have come to believe in God might give careful attention to doing good. These things are good and useful for everyone.
local: Tibɔr nan ye ibamɔn le. Le n ban ni li jɔɔ ti ki wɔɔn bi iyoo biɛn wee nin che ban ŋa Uwonbɔr yada-n n choo biba ki ta bi saŋi ki tun itoon ŋan. Ni ma ye nan ŋan ki jɔɔ tinyɔɔr ki sei uninfo biɛn.

eng: Avoid stupid controversies, genealogies, and fights about the Law, because they are useless and worthless.
local: Amaa ni nyam ijɔrig nin nmaal a ninkpeeb a yin a bɔrin nin imɔkpel a famin nin ikɔn ki ta jiin Uwonbɔr a siim paam, nan bu-n ni ye yɔli le kaa jɔɔ tinyɔɔri.

eng: After a first and second warning, have nothing more to do with a person who causes conflict.
local: A kpaan kumabiyiɛrugdaan taaliba bee itaa ilee wee waa kpenn ke, a nyam udaan a bɔrin ki laa ji kan u ki kpiɛ ni kanlin ni.

eng: because you know that someone like this is twisted and sinful—so they condemn themselves.
local: A nyi ke man a ninfou ye kuŋmaruŋ le nin tibirdaan, u bii u bau.

eng: When I send Artemas or Tychicus to you, try to come to me in Nicopolis, because Ive decided to spend the winter there.
local: N tun Atemasi bee Tachikusi a ban ke, a pɔɔn a ba ki dan n ban Nikopolisi, nan bu-n n bon ke n be niin le kufaag a yoo.

eng: Help Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their journey with enthusiasm so that they wont need anything.
local: Pɔɔn a ba ki ter Zenasi wan ye Rom yaab a bɔjiru win nin Apolosi bi sanchonlin ki laa che baah ban nan npar bi.
