local: Tibɔkardam a jaŋuuŋ nbu, bi na li teen iteen baah li ŋa man ki ji ni dulim, nan na yin bii bin a sili pii beera, le nan yin bii bin kaa dɔ jiɛn ni.

eng: God didnt spare the angels when they sinned but cast them into the lowest level of the underworld and committed them to chains of darkness, keeping them there until the judgment.
local: Ni ma bu Uwonbɔr kaa nan jiɛn malakam ban nan tun tibirin nni, amaa le ki nan ta bi jaa nŋmi-n, nan yaan wee ntuton be-n wee bi nan kan tibɔr a jim.

eng: And he didnt spare the ancient world when he brought a flood on the world of ungodly people, even though he protected Noah, a preacher of righteousness, along with seven others.
local: Waa nan jiɛn yaaja yoo a ninfob a bir ki per bi wee ki nan che nnyum jin ban kaa jɔɔ ween nin, le ki nyan Nowa, wan nan mɔɔn tibuchinn a binbem, nin bininfob bilile.

eng: God condemned the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah to total destruction, reducing them to ashes as a warning to ungodly people.
local: Le U nan bii Sodom nin Gomoriya ki nan che bi gaa nŋmi ki nan kpann nfatam, ki ŋa bi limagil ke ban kaa jɔɔ nween nin kaah na li kan man.

eng: And he rescued righteous Lot, who was made miserable by the unrestrained immorality of unruly people. .
local: Le U nan fee Lɔɔr wan nan ye ubuchin wee ban bii nsiimin nan mugir win gab.

eng: These things show that the Lord knows how to rescue the godly from their trials, and how to keep the unrighteous for punishment on the Judgment Day.
local: Ni ye Uyudaan ŋa man biɛn ke, U nyi waah li ŋa man ki fee ban ye biwonjiɛmin ki jaa bi mugilin, amaa le ki guu ban kaa ye bibuchimin tibɔr a ji daal, nin waah na tugir ki dar bi tuli man.

eng: This is especially true for those who follow after the corrupt cravings of the sinful nature and defy the Lords authority. These reckless, brash people arent afraid to insult the glorious ones.
local: Ni niɛ nan sin ye ibamɔn le ki jann tɔɔ ban nɔɔ kuŋmaruŋ kan ye bi gbanann a bamin ziɛn tininkper a pɔɔma. Bi ye ban jɔɔ ipoobil le nin ban jɔɔ kalanbaani, baa san bijawaam nin bin ŋa kutingbiig nin paab a wann naan wann tan fo;.

eng: yet angels, who are stronger and more powerful, dont use insults when pronouncing the Lords judgment on them.
local: hali malakam, kaah le jɔɔ tigbanann a pɔɔn takpemin gbaa, baa jɔɔ kutingbiig a galin ki tenn ban be papaabin Uyudaan a nintogili.

eng: These false teachers are like irrational animals, mere creatures of instinct, born to be captured and destroyed. They slander what they dont understand and, like animals, they will be destroyed.
local: Amaa bilinlarib nan, bi wɔɔn biba le ki sugir tibɔr tan biɛn wee baa nyi ti taai. Bi nann kulɔŋ a wankor le, tiwann naan wann tan kaa nyi niba, tan be wee bi nan chor tan kɔr, bi na li kpo ke tiwankorin.

eng: In this way, they will receive payment for their wrongdoing. They even enjoy unruly parties in broad daylight. They are blots and blemishes, taking delight in their seductive pleasures while feasting with you.
local: Bi na li yɔ bi ki jiin baah jin bininfob fala nbu. Bi ye ban a num gbee tigbanann a kɔlisa a toon yan wee bi tun nwonween nin le. Bi ji ye bifadam ban kaa san igalin le, hali bi le lagin ki ji nin ni tijiir ke, bi nyann bi mɔm bilig npaan nin le.

eng: They are always looking for someone with whom to commit adultery. They are always on the lookout for opportunities to sin. They ensnare people whose faith is weak. They have hearts trained in greed. They are under Gods curse.
local: Bi num gbee iwanchɔgin toon le, baa jiɛn tibir a tumi; le ki lar ban kaa si bogiliba-n; ki ye ban nyi kujaŋuuŋ a toon, limɔpool be bi bu!.

eng: Leaving the straight path, they have gone off course, following the way of Balaam son of Bosor, who loved the payment of doing wrong.
local: Bi ta nsan man telin le gab ki bor ki nɔɔ Balaam Bɔɔr a bija, wan ban npooton a yɔrin.

eng: But Balaam was rebuked for his wrongdoing. A donkey, which has no voice, spoke with a human voice and put a stop to the prophets madness.
local: Amaa Uwonbɔr nan che kiboŋ kan kaa pag tibɔr ta usaal a kukɔl ki fuun ulinlenn nmɔn bu ki ŋɔɔr u waarug a toon yin.

eng: These false teachers are springs without water, mists driven by the wind. The underworld has been reserved for them.
local: Bininfob nmɔn nann kinyunbuŋ kan kaa jɔɔ nyum le nin liŋunl lan wee nfaam daar li chaa-n le. Libunbɔnjal le siin ki guu bi.

eng: With empty, self-important speech, they use sinful cravings and unrestrained immorality to ensnare people who have only just escaped life with those who have wandered from the truth.
local: Bi mɔɔŋi kaa jɔɔ nyɔɔri, kalanbaani a mɔleen le bi jɔɔ, ki lar ban ban bin nya tigbanann a kɔlisa a toon yin ni, le bi jir kuŋmaruŋ a toon yin.

eng: These false teachers promise freedom, but they themselves are slaves of immorality; whatever overpowers you, enslaves you.
local: Bi bei bininfob le ke bi na li kan yemba amaa le bi baantɔɔl ye tibir a yomi, nan bu-n nan nyaŋir uninfo ŋaan u tiyomir le.

eng: If people escape the moral filth of this world through the knowledge of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ, then get tangled up in it again and are overcome by it, they are worse off than they were before.
local: Ni ye baah nyan dulinya nan a ŋmaruŋin, baah nyi ti Yudaau nin ti feeru Yisa Masiya-n, wee ni ye kuŋmaruŋ nmɔn ji choo bi ki nyaŋ bi ke, bi joorim na li bir ki jo bi piinim.

eng: It would be better for them never to have known the way of righteousness than, having come to know it, to turn back from the holy commandment entrusted to them.
local: Ni ye baa bi nyi tibuchinn a samin ke, ni bi li ŋan ki sei bi ki jon nin baah nyi mi wee ki labir bi bɔɔn ki kpaa kasi a siim man wee bi nan ta sei bi nna.

eng: They demonstrate the truth of the proverb: A dog returns to its own vomit, and a washed sow wallows in the mud.
local: Le bi ŋaar nmɔn wɔɔn ke ibɔŋal yan bi gaa-n ye ibamɔn le: Yan len ke, Kibɔg wul ke ki jir tan ji ki wulin nin le, le Udool mu fun nnyum ke, u ji jir le ki tan fu nnyunbunyiɛm.

eng: Therefore, I have a request for the elders among you. I urge the elders.
local: Nim ban ye bininkpeeb ni sisiigin ni, n balin ni le maah ye ni ninkpekpiɛgin, wan jin siɛra Masiya a fala a jim nin min wan na li kan n tol u pag a kpiirimin nin:.

eng: Like shepherds, tend the flock of God among you. Watch over it. Dont shepherd because you must, but do it voluntarily for God. Dont shepherd greedily, but do it eagerly.
local: Ni li kpaa Uwonbɔr a peei yan wee u taa ŋa ni nɔɔn nin na, ki li tun ke uwonjiɛn sanliira wee ni laa ye bi mug ni le amaa ni tɔɔl a bam bu, ke Uwonbɔr kaah ban ni li be man nin; kaa ye ilig a bam bu, amaa ki li ye ban ŋa sili nin ni tun;.

eng: Dont shepherd by ruling over those entrusted to your care, but become examples to the flock.
local: ki laa ta ni mug ban wee Uwonbɔr ta bi ŋa a nɔɔn nin ni, amaa che fin le li ye limagil ki sei ipee nmɔn.

eng: And when the chief shepherd appears, you will receive an unfading crown of glory.
local: Wee upeekpaabɔr nan degirin ke, a kan kupag a yuchigirig kan kaa wiirin.

eng: In the same way, I urge you who are younger: accept the authority of the elders. And everyone, clothe yourselves with humility toward each other. God stands against the proud, but he gives favor to the humble.
local: Binaachipɔm, man mu li ye ni, ni li jɔɔ limɔcheel ki tenn ban jon ni. Ni biɛn, ni ta jiininba ke tiwann yɔɔr tan wɔɔn ke ni jɔɔ jiininba ki sei tab, nan bu-n, Uwonbɔr yiin kalanbaanidam le, amaa le ki san jiininbadam kunyunyunbaag.

eng: Therefore, humble yourselves under Gods power so that he may raise you up in the last day.
local: Mambu, ni jiin niba, Uwonbɔr a nɔɔ man jɔɔ npɔɔn nin ban na, wee iyoo nmɔn nan foo ke, u nan don ni paab.

eng: Throw all your anxiety onto him, because he cares about you.
local: Ni taa ni bɔmugkaar biɛn ki sei wa nan bu-n u baga be nin ni.

eng: Be clearheaded. Keep alert. Your accuser, the devil, is on the prowl like a roaring lion, seeking someone to devour.
local: Ni choom niba ki li nyi niba bu. Ni dataag ulinlaril le choon le jin ke ugbegin wan ŋuun ki ban uninfo un choo niɛ-n.

eng: Resist him, standing firm in the faith. Do so in the knowledge that your fellow believers are enduring the same suffering throughout the world.
local: Ni laa chee, ki li ŋmag ni yada kenken na, nan bu-n ni nyi ni nabum ban be dulinya munl nan biɛn be man a fala ni le.

eng: After you have suffered for a little while, the God of all grace, the one who called you into his eternal glory in Christ Jesus, will himself restore, empower, strengthen, and establish you.
local: Le Uwonbɔr wan ye linyunyunbasanl biɛn daan ni, wan yin ni ke ni kan u pag kan kaa jɔɔ diɛm Masiya nin, naah jin fala wama a bɔɔn nin, Uma tɔɔl le ji li jiin ni siin ni yada-n ki che ni pɔɔg, le ni sir kenken.

eng: To him be power forever and always. Amen.
local: Uma kpaan nin npɔɔn n-yonn yan kaa jɔɔ diɛmi. Ibamɔn.

eng: I have written and sent these few lines to you by Silvanus. I consider him to be a faithful brother. In these lines I have urged and affirmed that this is the genuine grace of God. Stand firm in it.
local: Silasi wan wee n nyi ke u ye uwonjiɛn ibamɔn nin, li terim le n sɔb kugbɔŋ nan wama, ke n pɔɔg ni gbanann wee nin jin siɛra ke nan be nan ye Uwonbɔr a nyunyunbasanl le ibamɔn. Mambu ni li ŋmag ni nin nbamɔma.

eng: The fellow-elect church in Babylon greets you, and so does my son Mark.
local: Ni nabum ban be Babilɔnn ki ye ban wee Uwonbɔr nan lagin gann nin nimin, poor ni, le n bija Mag mu poor ni.

eng: Greet each other with the kiss of love. Peace to you all who are in Christ.
local: Ni li poor tab nin njiɛma. Nposɔɔn li be nim ban biɛn be Masiya ni-n.

eng: We announce to you what existed from the beginning, what we have heard, what we have seen with our eyes, what we have seen and our hands handled, about the word of life.
local: Wan nan be npiinimin, wee ti gbir u bu-n, wee ti num kan win, le ti lig u, hali ki ta ti nɔɔi maa win, uma le ti mɔɔn ki jiin u paam ke u ye limiɛfol a mɔbonl le.

eng: The life was revealed, and we have seen, and we testify and announce to you the eternal life that was with the Father and was revealed to us.
local: Limiɛfol nmɔn degirin na; ti kan limiɛfol nmɔn ki jin li siɛrau, limiɛfol lan kaa jɔɔ diɛm nmɔn a bɔr le ti pag ki tenn ni nan, lan nan be Baa-n ban nin, li degirin ti buu.

eng: What we have seen and heard, we also announce it to you so that you can have fellowship with us. Our fellowship is with the Father and with his Son, Jesus Christ.
local: Ti bei ni nan wee ti kan ki sin gbir le, ke nin che ni mu li jɔɔ nɔɔ nin tab nin tim. Le ti nɔɔ nin tab nmɔn be ti Baa Uwonbɔr nin U big Yisa Masiya ban le.

eng: We are writing these things so that our joy can be complete.
local: Ti sɔb ni niɛ nan ki tenn ni, ke nin che ti li jɔɔ nmɔn biɛn.

eng: This is the message that we have heard from him and announce to you: God is light and there is no darkness in him at all.
local: Tibɔr tan wee ti gbir u ban sɔ, le ti bei ni nan: Uwonbɔr ween le; libunbɔnl kaa be U ban kolibi.

eng: If we claim, We have fellowship with him, and live in the darkness, we are lying and do not act truthfully.
local: Ni ye ti ke ti jɔɔ nɔɔnintab nin Uma le amaa le ki la choon libunbɔnlin ke, tibɔkar le ti por nmɔn taa be nin ibamɔn ni.

eng: But if we live in the light in the same way as he is in the light, we have fellowship with each other, and the blood of Jesus, his Son, cleanses us from every sin.
local: Amaa ni ye ti choon nwonween nin, a li ke waah be nwonween nin man nin ke, tim nin nim jɔɔ nɔɔnintab, le Yisa wan ye U Bija-n a cham li ŋunn ti biɛn nan a bir.

eng: If we claim, We dont have any sin, we deceive ourselves and the truth is not in us.
local: Ni ye ti ke taa jɔɔ tibir ke, ti lar ti ba le, le ibamɔn kaa be ti ban ni.

eng: But if we confess our sins, he is faithful and just to forgive us our sins and cleanse us from everything weve done wrong.
local: Ni ye ti nyan ti bir ki bei u ke, u ye yada daan le ki tun nan ŋan, u li jiɛn ti bir biɛn ki per ti, ki ŋa ti kasi ki nyan ti ta kaa jɔɔ buchin binben biɛn nin.

eng: If we claim, We have never sinned, we make him a liar and his word is not in us.
local: Ni ye ti ke taa jɔɔ tibir ke, man ke ti ta Uwonbɔr le ki ŋa tibɔkardaan le U mɔleen yin kaa be ti ban ni.

eng: My little children, Im writing these things to you so that you dont sin. But if you do sin, we have an advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ the righteous one.
local: N bijiɛkaam, n sɔb kugbɔŋ nan le ki tenn ni, ke nin laa che ni tun tibiri. Amaa ni ye ke uba tun tibir ke, ti jɔɔ wan gaa pag tenn ti Baa-n ki kpiɛ ti bu, Yisa Masiya, Ubuchin daan nin.

eng: He is Gods way of dealing with our sins, not only ours but the sins of the whole world.
local: Uma ye tibir a manug kan ŋunn ti bir, le naa ye tim a binba a bir bu amaa nin dulinya munl nan biɛn a bir.

eng: This is how we know that we know him: if we keep his commandments.
local: Ti nyi ni ye ti chee Uwonbɔr a siimin ke, ni ma li che ti biɛ U.

eng: The one who claims, I know him, while not keeping his commandments, is a liar, and the truth is not in this person.
local: Wan len ke, N nyi u, amaa wee kaa tun Uwonbɔr kaah siin man nin ke, udaan por tibɔkar le, le ibamɔn nin kaa be u ban ni.

eng: But the love of God is truly perfected in whoever keeps his word. This is how we know we are in him.
local: Amaa wan biɛn chee u mɔbonlin ke, Uwonbɔr a jiɛm ŋa ibamɔn udaan ban na. Ni niɛ nan le che ti biɛr taah be nin Uwonbɔr man:.

eng: The one who claims to remain in him ought to live in the same way as he lived.
local: Wan ke u be nin Uwonbɔr ke, ni kpaa le nin u li be ke Masiya kaah nan be man nin.

eng: Dear friends, Im not writing a new commandment to you, but an old commandment that you had from the beginning. The old commandment is the message you heard.
local: N jɔtiib, naa ye nsiim pɔm le n sɔb ki tenn ni, amaa nsiim kpegim, man wee ni nan jɔɔ npiinimin nin. Nsiim kpegim le ye tibɔr tan wee ni gbirin.

eng: On the other hand, I am writing a new commandment to you, which is true in him and in you, because the darkness is passing away and the true light already shines.
local: Nin ni ma biɛn nin, nsiim pɔm le n sɔb ki tenn ni, le ti kan ni bamɔn u ni nin ni ni, nan bu-n libunbɔnl fɔɔr le chaa le ibamɔn a wonweem pii nyagin le.

eng: The one who claims to be in the light while hating a brother or sister is in the darkness even now.
local: Wan ke uma be nwonween nin amaa wee ki sin nan u nabig ke, udaan la be libunbɔnlin le.

eng: The person loving a brother and sister stays in the light, and there is nothing in the light that causes a person to stumble.
local: Wan jiɛ u nabig ke, udaan be nwonween nin le, le niba kaa be u ban ki li che un gbiɛri.

eng: But the person who hates a brother or sister is in the darkness and lives in the darkness, and doesnt know where to go because the darkness blinds the eyes.
local: Amaa wan nan u nabig ke, udaan be libunbɔnlin le ki choon jin; kaa nyi waah chaa nan paami, nan bu-n libunbɔnl nmɔn che u jɔɔn na.

eng: Little children, Im writing to you because your sins have been forgiven through Jesus name.
local: N buwaab, n sɔb kugbɔŋ nan le ki tenn ni, nan bu-n Masiya a yinl bu ni kan tibir a jiɛn pera.

eng: Parents, Im writing to you because you have known the one who has existed from the beginning. Young people, Im writing to you because you have conquered the evil one.
local: N sɔb kugbɔŋ nan le ki tenn nim ban ye baam, nan bu-n ni nyi u wan nan be npiinimin nbu. N sɔb le ki tenn nim ban ye iwanpɔlin, nan bu-n ni nyaŋ titoonbir daan nin na. N sɔb le ki tenn nim ban ye n buwaab, nan bu-n ni biɛ ti Baa-n nna.

eng: Little children, I write to you because you know the Father. Parents, I write to you because you have known the one who has existed from the beginning. Young people, I write to you because you are strong, the word of God remains in you, and you have conquered the evil one.
local: N sɔb le ki tenn nim ban ye baam, nan bu-n ni nyi wan nan be npiinimin. N sɔb le ki tenn nim ban ye iwanpɔlin, nan bu-n ni jɔɔ npɔɔn, le Uwonbɔr a mɔleen be nin ni, le ni nyaŋ tibirdaan nin na.

eng: Dont love the world or the things in the world. If anyone loves the world, the love of the Father is not in them.
local: Ni laa jiɛ dulinya bee nan ye dulinya nan a wann ni. Ni ye uba jiɛ dulinya ke, ti Baa a jiɛmin kaa be udaan ban ni.

eng: Everything that is in the world—the craving for whatever the body feels, the craving for whatever the eyes see and the arrogant pride in ones possessions—is not of the Father but is of the world.
local: Niwann nan biɛn be dulinya nan yaan nan, uninfosaal a toonbirin a bam, inunbil a kɔlisa nin ligbingbanfaal waah jɔɔ nan nin waah li fir tun nan, naa nyan ti Baa ban ni, amaa ni nyan dulinya nan yaan le.

eng: And the world and its cravings are passing away, but the person who does the will of God remains forever.
local: Dulinya nin ki kɔlisa li jo, amaa wan tun Uwonbɔr kaah ban man ke, udaan yin gbaa be le ki chaa.

eng: Little children, it is the last hour. Just as you have heard that the antichrist is coming, so now many antichrists have appeared. This is how we know it is the last hour.
local: N bijiɛkaam, iyoo yan joor sɔ, ke naah pii gbir ke Masiya a dataag chaan nin, hali daandaan nan gbaa Yisa a dataam takpem dan na. Mambu le ti biɛ ke ni ye iyoo joor kaa le.

eng: They went out from us, but they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But by going out from us, they showed they all are not part of us.
local: Bi nyan ti ban na, amaa baa sin ye ti yaabi. Bi bi ye ti yaab ke, bi bi li paar ti ban; amaa baah nyan ti ban nin nmɔn le wɔɔn ke bi ni uba kaa ye ti yaa wi.

eng: But you have an anointing from the holy one, and all of you know the truth.
local: Amaa Kasi daan nin kpaar nkpam ki wur ni buu, le ni biɛn nyi ibamɔn nin.

eng: I dont write to you because you dont know the truth but because you know it. You know that no lie comes from the truth.
local: Naa ye naah kaa nyi ibamɔn nin bu le n sɔb kugbɔŋ nan ki tenn ni, amaa naah nyi ibamɔn nin nbu, nan bu-n tibɔkar kaa nya ibamɔn nin ni.

eng: Who is the liar? Isnt it the person who denies that Jesus is the Christ? This person is the antichrist: the one who denies the Father and the Son.
local: Ŋma ye tibɔkardaan naa? Wan kaa chee ke Yisa le ye Masiya-n. Udaan ye Masiya a dataag le. U yii Baa-n nin U bigin le.

eng: Everyone who denies the Son does not have the Father, but the one who confesses the Son has the Father also.
local: Wan yii Bija-n ke udaan kaa jɔɔ Baa-n ni; wan gbir sei Bija-n ke, udaan jɔɔ Baa-n mu.

eng: As for you, what you heard from the beginning must remain in you. If what you heard from the beginning remains in you, you will also remain in relationship to the Son and in the Father.
local: Ni che naah nan gbir nan npiinimin nin li be ni sufu ni na. Ni ye ni tun man ke ni mu li be Bija-n nin Baa-n ban.

eng: This is the promise that he himself gave us: eternal life.
local: Waah siin ti limɔsiinl lan ye le ke, U li sei ti limiɛfol lan kaa jɔɔ diɛm.

eng: I write these things to you about those who are attempting to deceive you.
local: N sɔb ni tiwann nan le ki tenn ni ki jiin ban ban bin lar ni ki kɔɔn kulɔŋ nbu.

eng: As for you, the anointing that you received from him remains on you, and you dont need anyone to teach you the truth. But since his anointing teaches you about all things , remain in relationship to him just as he taught you.
local: Nim bu ke naah nan gaa likpanwuril lan nin be ni ban, ni bu naa ji ban uba nwɔɔn ni. Amaa a li ke likpanwuril nmɔn kaah wɔɔn ni niwann biɛn nin, wee likpanwuril nmɔn ye ibamɔn nin, kaa ye kularugin, a li ke likpanwuril nmɔn kaah wɔɔn ni man nin, ni li be u ban na.

eng: And now, little children, remain in relationship to Jesus, so that when he appears we can have confidence and not be ashamed in front of him when he comes.
local: Tɔ daandaan nan n bijiɛkaam ni li be u ban na, wee u nan degirin ke ti li jɔɔ tidindann ki laa san ifa u jirimin daali.

eng: If you know that he is righteous, you also know that every person who practices righteousness is born from him.
local: Ni nyi ke u ye ubuchin ke, ni ŋan nin ni li nyi ke wan biɛn tun nan ŋan ke, Yisa le ma udaan.

eng: See what kind of love the Father has given to us in that we should be called Gods children, and that is what we are! Because the world didnt recognize him, it doesnt recognize us.
local: Ni lig ti Baa Uwonbɔr kaah pu ki jiɛ ti tan lagir man, ke bi li yi ti ke Uwonbɔr a buwaab! Man mu le ti sin ye! Nan bu wee dulinya yaab kaa nyi ti-n ye baah kaa nyi Uwonbɔr nle.

eng: Dear friends, now we are Gods children, and it hasnt yet appeared what we will be. We know that when he appears we will be like him because well see him as he is.
local: N jɔtiib, daandaan nan ti ye Uwonbɔr a buwaab le, le taah na yin be man kaa la kpiir wɔɔn ti. Amaa ti nyi ke u nan degirin ke, ti yin be le ke uma-n, nan bu-n ti na yin kan u le ke waah be man nin.

eng: And all who have this hope in him purify themselves even as he is pure.
local: Uninfo wan biɛn jɔɔ tama Uwonbɔr ni ke, udaan ŋa uba le kasi ke Yisa kaah be man ni.

eng: Every person who practices sin commits an act of rebellion, and sin is rebellion.
local: Wan tun tibir ke u bii nsiima; ibamɔn bu, tibir kaa ŋmag nsiimi.

eng: You know that he appeared to take away sins, and there is no sin in him.
local: Amaa ni nyi ke u nan degirin un nan ta ti yaa bir le. Le u ni tibir kaa be.

eng: Every person who remains in relationship to him does not sin. Any person who sins has not seen him or known him.
local: Wan biɛn be nin Yisa kaa gbaa tun tibiri. Le wan gbaa tun tibir mu kaa la kan u bee ki nyi wi.

eng: Little children, make sure no one deceives you. The person who practices righteousness is righteous, in the same way that Jesus is righteous.
local: N bibankaam, ni laa che uba nlar ni ki kɔɔn kulɔŋi. Wan tun nan ŋan nin uma ye ubuchin, a li ke Yisa kaah ye ubuchin man nin.

eng: The person who practices sin belongs to the devil, because the devil has been sinning since the beginning. Gods Son appeared for this purpose: to destroy the works of the devil.
local: Wan tun nan bir ke u ye ulinlaril a ninfou le, nan bu-n ulinlaril pii ye wan tun tibir le npiinimin na. Nan bu wee Uwonbɔr a Bija nan degirin ni, nan ye un bii ulinlaril a toon le.

eng: Those born from God dont practice sin because Gods DNA remains in them. They cant sin because they are born from God.
local: Uwonbɔr kaah ma wan biɛn kaa yin gbaa tun tibiri, nan bu-n Uwonbɔr a nunaŋ be u ni, ni bu waa li fir gbaa tun tibiri, Uwonbɔr kaah ma win bu.

eng: This is how Gods children and the devils children are apparent: everyone who doesnt practice righteousness is not from God, including the person who doesnt love a brother or sister.
local: Ni niɛ le che ti biɛr ban ye Uwonbɔr a buwaab nin ban ye ulinlaril a buwaab: Ban kaa tun nan ŋan bee kaa jiɛ bi nabumin kaa ye Uwonbɔr a buwaabi.

eng: This is the message that you heard from the beginning: love each other.
local: Tibɔr tan wee ni gbir npiinimin nin sɔ: Ke ti li jiɛ taba.

eng: Dont behave like Cain, who belonged to the evil one and murdered his brother. And why did he kill him? He killed him because his own works were evil, but the works of his brother were righteous.
local: Ni laa be ke Keenn ni, wan nan ye ulinlaril a ninfou wee ki nan ku u waalin nni. Babu wee u nan ku u waalaa? Nan bu-n u toon yin nan ye tibir le, le u waal mu a toon nan ye tibuchinn.

eng: Dont be surprised, brothers and sisters, if the world hates you.
local: Ni laa che nin gar ni, n nabum, ni ye dulinya yaab nan ni ke.

eng: We know that we have transferred from death to life, because we love the brothers and sisters. The person who does not love remains in death.
local: Ti nyi ke ti pii nyan nkumin ki kɔɔ limiɛfolin na, nan bu-n taah jiɛ ti nabumin bu. Uninfo wan kaa jiɛ ke udaan la be nkumin le.

eng: Everyone who hates a brother or sister is a murderer, and you know that murderers dont have eternal life residing in them.
local: Wan nan u nabig ke u ye uninfokur le, le ni nyi uninfokur kaa jɔɔ limiɛfol lan kaa jɔɔ ndiɛmin ni.

eng: This is how we know love: Jesus laid down his life for us, and we ought to lay down our lives for our brothers and sisters.
local: Ni niɛ nan le che ti biɛr njiɛm kaah ye nan: Yisa Masiya kaah nan gaa ti kum ki kpe-n. Ni ŋan nin ti mu nkpo ti nabum bu.

eng: But if someone has material possessions and sees a brother or sister in need but refuses to help—how can the love of God dwell in a person like that?.
local: Ni ye uba jɔɔ dulinya nan a faal wee ki kan u nabig wan ban literil, amaa wee kaa jogir u ke, Uwonbɔr a jiɛm yin ŋa nii ki be udaan ban naa?.

eng: Little children, lets not love with words or speech but with action and truth.
local: N buwaab, ni laa che ti jiɛm ye imɔleen bee lilanbil a binba, amaa ni li nɔɔ nin itoon nin ibamɔn.

eng: This is how we will know that we belong to the truth and reassure our hearts in Gods presence.
local: Ni niɛ nan bu le ti biɛr ke ti nɔɔ ibamɔn, le ni che ti jɔɔ lipoobil Uwonbɔr ban.

eng: Even if our hearts condemn us, God is greater than our hearts and knows all things.
local: iyoo yan wee ti sufu bii ti ke ti jɔɔ igalin ke, ti li nyi ke Uwonbɔr jon ti sufu nmɔn na, ki ye wan nyi niwann biɛn.

eng: Dear friends, if our hearts dont condemn us, we have confidence in relationship to God.
local: N jɔtiib, ni ye ti sufu kaa bii ti ke, ti jɔɔ tidindann Uwonbɔr ban.

eng: We receive whatever we ask from him because we keep his commandments and do what pleases him.
local: ki li kan nan biɛn wee ti miɛ U, nan bu-n ti chee U siima, ki tun nan li gbee U num.

eng: This is his commandment, that we believe in the name of his Son, Jesus Christ, and love each other as he commanded us.
local: U siim sɔ: Ke ti ŋaam U bija Yisa Masiya a yinl yada, wee ki li jiɛ tab ke waah siin ti man nin.

eng: Those who keep his commandments dwell in God and God dwells in them. This is how we know that he dwells in us, because of the Spirit he has given us.
local: Ban chee U siimin be U ban le, le U mu be nin bi. Ni nan le che ti biɛr ke U be nin ti: Kinaaŋ kan wee U sei ti nbu le che ti nyi.

eng: Dear friends, dont believe every spirit. Test the spirits to see if they are from God because many false prophets have gone into the world.
local: N jɔtiib ni laa ŋa kinaaŋ biɛn yada, amaa ni mag kinaaŋ biɛn njee ki nyan Uwonbɔr ban na, nan bu-n tibɔkar a linlem takpem dan dulinya nan yaan na.

eng: This is how you know if a spirit comes from God: every spirit that confesses that Jesus Christ has come as a human is from God.
local: Naah li ŋa man ki biɛ Uwonbɔr a Naaŋ sɔ: Kinaaŋ kan biɛn len ke Yisa Masiya nan dan nin uninfosaal a gbanann le ke, u nyan Uwonbɔr ban le.

eng: and every spirit that doesnt confess Jesus is not from God. This is the spirit of the antichrist, which you have heard is coming and is now already in the world.
local: amaa kinaaŋ kan biɛn kaa chee Yisa ke kaa nyann Uwonbɔr ban ni. Kinaaŋ nmɔn ye Yisa a dataag le, kan wee ni pii gbir ki bu ke ki chaan nin, hali daandaan nan gbaa ki pii be dulinya nan yaan.

eng: You are from God, little children, and you have defeated these people because the one who is in you is greater than the one who is in the world.
local: Nim, n bijiɛkaam, ni nyan Uwonbɔr ban le ki nyaŋ ba, nan bu-n wan be ni ban nin yab ki jon wan be dulinya nan yaan nna.

eng: They are from the world. So they speak from the worlds point of view and the world listens to them.
local: Bi nyan dulinya nan yaan le, ni bu le bi pag dulinya a bɔr, le dulinya yaab pelig bi bɔr nmɔn.

eng: We are from God. The person who knows God listens to us. Whoever is not from God doesnt listen to us. This is how we recognize the Spirit of truth and the spirit of error.
local: Tim nyan Uwonbɔr ban le, le uninfo wan biɛn nyi Uwonbɔr pelig ti bɔr, amaa wan kaa nyan Uwonbɔr ban kaa pelig ti bɔri. Taah ŋaan man ki biɛr ibamɔn a Naaŋ nin tibɔkar a naaŋ le yen.

eng: Dear friends, lets love each other, because love is from God, and everyone who loves is born from God and knows God.
local: N jɔtiib, ni che ti li jiɛ taba, nan bu-n njiɛm nyan Uwonbɔr ban le. Uninfo wan biɛn jɔɔ njiɛm ke Uwonbɔr le ma u, le u nyi Uwonbɔr.

eng: The person who doesnt love does not know God, because God is love.
local: Uninfo wan kaa jiɛ u tab ke waa nyi Uwonbɔr i, nan bu-n Uwonbɔr ye wan jiɛ le.

eng: This is how the love of God is revealed to us: God has sent his only Son into the world so that we can live through him.
local: Uwonbɔr kaah wɔɔn ti waah jiɛ ti man sɔ: U nan tunn U bija gaŋin dulinya nan yaan ke nin che ti kan limiɛfol kibig nmɔn bu.

eng: This is love: it is not that we loved God but that he loved us and sent his Son as the sacrifice that deals with our sins.
local: Njiɛm sɔ: Naa ye ti jiɛ Uwonbɔr le, amaa Uma jiɛ ti, le ki tunn U bija le u nan mann tibir a manug ti yaa bir bu.

eng: Dear friends, if God loved us this way, we also ought to love each other.
local: N jɔtiib, Uwonbɔr kaah jiɛ ti kagin, ni ye ti mu li jiɛ tab le.

eng: No one has ever seen God. If we love each other, God remains in us and his love is made perfect in us.
local: Uba kaa la nyi kan Uwonbɔr i; amaa ni ye ti jiɛ tab ke, Uwonbɔr li be nin ti, le U jiɛm n ŋa dede ti ban.

eng: This is how we know we remain in him and he remains in us, because he has given us a measure of his Spirit.
local: Ti nyi taah be nin Uwonbɔr le U mu be nin ti, nan bu-n U sei ti U naaŋin na.

eng: We have seen and testify that the Father has sent the Son to be the savior of the world.
local: Le ti kan ki jin siɛra ke ti Baa-n le nan tunn U Bija ke un nan ŋa dulinya nan a feeru.

eng: If any of us confess that Jesus is Gods Son, God remains in us and we remain in God.
local: Uninfo wan chee ke Yisa ye Uwonbɔr a Bija ke, Uwonbɔr be udaan ban, le udaan mu be nin Uwonbɔr.

eng: We have known and have believed the love that God has for us. God is love, and those who remain in love remain in God and God remains in them.
local: Ni bu ti pii nyi le ki ŋa yada nin Uwonbɔr a jiɛm man wee U jɔɔ nin ti-n. Uwonbɔr ye wan jiɛ le. Wan jiɛ ke, udaan be nin Uwonbɔr le, le Uwonbɔr mu be nin udaan.

eng: This is how love has been perfected in us, so that we can have confidence on the Judgment Day, because we are exactly the same as God is in this world.
local: Ni niɛ nan bu, njiɛm ŋa dede ti ban na le ti li fir jɔɔ tidindann tibɔr a jidaal, nan bu-n ti nann U le dulinya nan yaan.

eng: There is no fear in love, but perfect love drives out fear, because fear expects punishment. The person who is afraid has not been made perfect in love.
local: Njiɛm kaa jɔɔ bijawaami. Amaa chasi a jiɛm ŋɔɔ bijawaam le ki nyann, nan bu-n bijawaam ye litudaril le. Uninfo wan san bijawaam kaa be chasi njiɛmin yaan ni.

eng: We love because God first loved us.
local: Ti jiɛ U nan bu-n Uma nan chinn jiɛ ti.

eng: Those who say, I love God and hate their brothers or sisters are liars. After all, those who dont love their brothers or sisters whom they have seen can hardly love God whom they have not seen!.
local: Ni ye uba len ke, N jiɛ Uwonbɔr, amaa wee ki nan u nabig ke, udaan ye tibɔkardaan le. Nan bu-n wan kaa jiɛ u nabig kan wee u ga win ke, waa li fir jiɛ Uwonbɔr wan wee waa ga win ni.

eng: This commandment we have from him: Those who claim to love God ought to love their brother and sister also.
local: Le U sei ti nsiim nan: Uninfo wan biɛn jiɛ Uwonbɔr ke, ni kpaa le nin u li jiɛ u nabig mu.

eng: Everyone who believes that Jesus is the Christ has been born from God. Whoever loves someone who is a parent loves the child born to the parent.
local: Uninfo wan biɛn ŋa yada ke Yisa le ye Masiya ke, Uwonbɔr le ma u, le uninfo wan biɛn jiɛ Baa-n jiɛ U bigin tɔɔl.

eng: This is how we know that we love the children of God: when we love God and keep Gods commandments.
local: Ni niɛ nan le ye taah biɛr ke ti jiɛ Uwonbɔr a buwaab man: Ti li jiɛ Uwonbɔr wee ki li nɔɔ U siim.

eng: This is the love of God: we keep Gods commandments. Gods commandments are not difficult.
local: Taah li jiɛ Uwonbɔr man sɔ: Ti chee U siimin na. Le U siim nmɔn kaa ye litugili.

eng: because everyone who is born from God defeats the world. And this is the victory that has defeated the world: our faith.
local: Uwonbɔr kaah ma nan biɛn nyaŋ dulinyau. Nnyaŋim man nyaŋ dulinya sɔ: Hali ti yada-n.

eng: Who defeats the world? Isnt it the one who believes that Jesus is Gods Son?.
local: Ŋma ye u ki nyaŋir dulinyaa? Wan le ŋa yada ke Yisa ye Uwonbɔr a bija-n.

eng: This is the one who came by water and blood: Jesus Christ. Not by water only but by water and blood. And the Spirit is the one who testifies, because the Spirit is the truth.
local: Yisa Masiya le ye wan nan dan nin nnyum nin ncham. Naa ye nnyum a binba bu le u nan dan ni, amaa nnyum nin ncham bu. Le Kasi a Naaŋ jin ni siɛra, nan bu-n Kinaaŋin ye ibamɔn le.

eng: The three are testifying.
local: Nan bu-n tiwann titaa le jin ni siɛra:.

eng: the Spirit, the water, and the blood—and the three are united in agreement.
local: Kinaaŋin, nin nnyum nin ncham; le tiwann titaa nmɔn jɔɔ limɔcheel nin tab.

eng: If we receive human testimony, Gods testimony is greater, because this is what God testified: he has testified about his Son.
local: Ti cheel uninfosaal a siɛra le, amaa Uwonbɔr a siɛra le polig jon man, nan bu-n ni ye Uwonbɔr a siɛra kan wee U jin U bija-n bu le.

eng: The one who believes in Gods Son has the testimony within; the one who doesnt believe God has made God a liar, because that one has not believed the testimony that God gave about his Son.
local: Wan biɛn ŋa Uwonbɔr a bija nan yada jɔɔ siɛra nan u sufu ni. Wan kaa ŋa Uwonbɔr yada ta U ki labir tibɔkardaan na, nan bu-n waa ŋa yada Uwonbɔr a siɛra kan wee U jin U bija-n bu.

eng: And this is the testimony: God gave eternal life to us, and this life is in his Son.
local: Siɛra nmɔn sɔ: Uwonbɔr sei ti limiɛfol lan kaa jɔɔ diɛma, le limiɛfol nmɔn be U Bija-n ban le.

eng: The one who has the Son has life. The one who doesnt have Gods Son does not have life.
local: Wan jɔɔ Bija-n jɔɔ limiɛfol; wan kaa jɔɔ Uwonbɔr a Bija-n ke waa jɔɔ limiɛfoli.

eng: I write these things to you who believe in the name of Gods Son so that you can know that you have eternal life.
local: N sɔb tiwann nan ki tenn nim ban ŋa Uwonbɔr a Bija a yinlin yada ke nin che ni biɛ ke ni jɔɔ limiɛfol lan kaa jɔɔ ndiɛm.

eng: This is the confidence that we have in our relationship with God: If we ask for anything in agreement with his will, he listens to us.
local: Nan bu wee ti jɔɔ tidindann Uwonbɔr ban sɔ: Ni ye ti miɛ U nan nɔɔ nin U sufu a bam ke, U gbir ti miɛm le.

eng: If we know that he listens to whatever we ask, we know that we have received what we asked from him.
local: Le ni ye ti nyi ke U gbir ti miɛm ke, ti nyi ke taah miɛ U nan bu biɛn ti li kan.

eng: If anyone sees a brother or sister committing a sin that does not result in death, they should pray, and God will give life to them—that is, to those who commit sins that dont result in death. There is a sin that results in death—Im not saying that you should pray about that.
local: Ni ye uba kan u nabig tun tibir tan kaa joor nin nkum ke, un miɛm wee Uwonbɔr n sei udaan limiɛfol. N pag jiin ban a bir kaa ye bin kpo nle. Tibir tiba be ki ye nkum. Naa ye ti a bir le n ke un miɛ.

eng: Every unrighteous action is sin, but there is a sin that does not result in death.
local: Itoon yan a tum kaa kpaan biɛn ye tibir le, amaa tibir tiba be kaa joor nin nkumi.

eng: We know that everyone born from God does not sin, but the ones born from God guard themselves, and the evil one cannot touch them.
local: Ti nyi uninfo wan biɛn wee Uwonbɔr ma win kaa gbaa tun tibiri. Wan wee Uwonbɔr nan ma-n le guu u, le ulinlaril kaa li fir sei u kidaŋi.

eng: We know we are from God, and the whole world lies in the power of the evil one.
local: Ti nyi taah ye Uwonbɔr a buwaab, le dulinya munl nan be ulinlaril a nɔɔn.

eng: We know that Gods Son has come and has given us understanding to know the one who is true. We are in the one who is true by being in his Son, Jesus Christ. This is the true God and eternal life.
local: Le ti ji nyi Uwonbɔr a big kaah dan ki nan sei ti nbiɛm, ke nin che ti biɛ Uma wan ye ibamɔndaan nin. Le ti mu be nin Uma wan ye ibamɔndaan nmɔn, hali nin U big Yisa Masiya. U ye ibamɔn a Wonbɔru le nin limiɛfol lan kaa jɔɔ ndiɛm.

eng: Little children, guard yourselves from idols!.
local: N buwaab, ni nyam niba ibawolin.

eng: My dear friends, this is now my second letter to you. I have written both letters to stir up your sincere understanding with a reminder.
local: N jɔtiib, n gbɔŋ ku niɛ nan le nin kpiɛ milee. Tigbann nmɔn a poolin, n sɔb le ti ye literil ke n ligir ni sufu wee ni tiɛr nan ŋan.

eng: I want you to recall what the holy prophets foretold as well as what the Lord and savior commanded through your apostles.
local: N ban ni li tiɛr imɔleen yan wee kasi a linlem nan pag isaŋ yan nan jon nin, nin nsiim man wee ti Yudaau nin ufeerin nan che u tooi yin ta sei nin.

eng: Most important, know this: in the last days scoffers will come, jeering, living by their own cravings.
local: Chinchinn, ni kpaa le nin ni li nyi ke idajoorikaa-n bininfob ban yɔɔlin na li dan, ki ta bi yɔɔlim nmɔn ki nɔɔ bitɔɔl a gbanann a kɔlisa birugin.

eng: and saying, Where is the promise of his coming? After all, nothing has changed—not since the beginning of creation, nor even since the ancestors died.
local: Bi na li len ke, Waah nan siin limɔsiinl ke u li dan nin, u dam nmɔn be laa? Hali ti baam a kum a bɔɔn ki nan kpaa daandaan nan, niwann biɛn le la be le ke dulinya a naan yonn nin.

eng: But they fail to notice that, by Gods word, heaven and earth were formed long ago out of water and by means of water.
local: Amaa bi yii le kaa tiɛr ke isaŋ yan nan jon nin Uwonbɔr nan pag imɔleen le i naan paab nin tum, nnyum le u nan ta naan dulinya a tingbɔŋ, ki che kutingbɔŋ nmɔn nyan nnyumin.

eng: And it was through these that the world of that time was flooded and destroyed.
local: Nnyum nmɔn le nan jin bi ki bii dulinya iyaayoo nmɔn.

eng: But by the same word, heaven and earth are now held in reserve for fire, kept for the Judgment Day and destruction of ungodly people.
local: Uwonbɔr a mɔleen iba nmɔn le U ji ta guu papaab nin tum kan be daandaan nan ke nŋmi n nan gaa, ni si le ki guu tibɔr a ji daal nin ban kaa ye biwonjiɛmin a biim.

eng: Dont let it escape your notice, dear friends, that with the Lord a single day is like a thousand years and a thousand years are like a single day.
local: Amaa ni laa tam ni niɛ nan bu, n jɔtiib: Ti Yudaau ban, lidaal liba nann ibin turil le, ibin turil mu nann weemba le.

eng: The Lord isnt slow to keep his promise, as some think of slowness, but he is patient toward you, not wanting anyone to perish but all to change their hearts and lives.
local: Ti Yudaau kaa ye wan sɔɔn wee kaa ŋmag u mɔsiinlin ni, a li ke biba kaah tiɛr nsusɔɔn bu man nin. U jɔɔ limɔril le nin ni, kaa ban uba n nan kpo, amaa u ban uninfo biɛn nkpenn u binbem le.

eng: But the day of the Lord will come like a thief. On that day the heavens will pass away with a dreadful noise, the elements will be consumed by fire, and the earth and all the works done on it will be exposed.
local: Amaa ti Yudaan a dam nmɔn na yin nann unaayig a dann le. Papaab na li fɔɔr nin tifur takpenn; le nŋmi na li gaa tiwann tan be papaabin, le tum nin tiwann tan be tum nmɔn na li dɔɔn yɔli.

eng: Since everything will be destroyed in this way, what sort of people ought you to be? You must live holy and godly lives.
local: Tɔ, ni niɛ biɛn kaah na li gab yɔli nan, ni kpaan ni li ye ŋmam maa? Ni kpaan ni li be nbinben man ye kasi le nin nwonjiɛn binben.

eng: waiting for and hastening the coming day of God. Because of that day, the heavens will be destroyed by fire and the elements will melt away in the flames.
local: a li ke naah lig Uwonbɔr a daal wee ki ban ke li pii bi foon nin. Lidaal nmɔn le nŋmi na yin gaa ki bii papaab, le nŋmi nmɔn a tuntom na li che tiwann tan be paab ndenn.

eng: But according to his promise we are waiting for a new heaven and a new earth, where righteousness is at home.
local: Amaa taah ŋmag U mɔsiinlin, tim le guu papaab pɔŋ nin tum pɔŋin le, bibuchim a niin yin.

eng: Therefore, dear friends, while you are waiting for these things to happen, make every effort to be found by him in peace—pure and faultless.
local: Ni ma bu n jɔtiib, naah guu ni niɛ nan bu, ni pɔɔn niba ki li jɔɔ kasi a binbem wee ki laa jɔɔ igalin Uwonbɔr ban ni, wee ki li jɔɔ nposɔɔn nin Uwonbɔr.

eng: Consider the patience of our Lord to be salvation, just as our dear friend and brother Paul wrote to you according to the wisdom given to him.
local: Ni li nyi ni sufu ni ke ti Yudaau a mɔrilin ye nan sei ni nŋmarim le, a li ke ti nabig jiɛkaag Pɔɔl kaah sɔb sei ni Uwonbɔr kaah sei u nlam man ni.

eng: speaking of these things in all his letters. Some of his remarks are hard to understand, and people who are ignorant and whose faith is weak twist them to their own destruction, just as they do the other scriptures.
local: U le sɔb man le u gbann biɛn nin, ki pag jɔɔ jiin tibɔr nan paam. U gbann nmɔn jɔɔ tiwann tiba tan pɔɔ nin uninfo nbiɛ ni taai, nan wee bininfob ban kaa nyi niba, kaa si bogil liba-n, taar ti ki labir ti tibɔkar, ke baah pii ŋaan Uwonbɔr a mɔleen iba man ni, wee i bii bitɔɔlin.

eng: Therefore, dear friends, since you have been warned in advance, be on guard so that you arent led off course into the error of sinful people, and lose your own safe position.
local: Mambu, n jɔtiib, naah pii nyi ni niɛ nan bu nan, ni li guu niba wee ki laa che ban kaa jɔɔ nsiim nan nlar ni ki kɔɔn kulɔŋ wee ni lu ni sisibol ŋanlin ni.

eng: Instead, grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ. To him belongs glory now and forever. Amen.
local: Amaa ni li yabirig nin ti Yudaau nin ti feeru Yisa Masiya a nyunyunbasanl nin u nyinyimin na. Uma kpaan kupag daandaan nan nin isaŋ yan kaa jɔɔ diɛmi! Ibamɔn.

eng: Jude, a slave of Jesus Christ and brother of James. To those who are called, loved by God the Father and kept safe by Jesus Christ.
local: Min Juud wan ye Yisa Masiya a toontunnu ki ye Jemisi a nabigin, Le sɔb kugbɔŋ nan tenn bininfob ban wee Uwonbɔr yin bin, wee bi ye Uwonbɔr a ninfob jiɛkaab wee Yisa Masiya ŋmag bin:.

eng: May you have more and more mercy, peace, and love.
local: Uwonbɔr a nyunyunbaag nin nposɔɔn nin njiɛm li be nin ni takpem.

eng: Dear friends, I wanted very much to write to you concerning the salvation we share. Instead, I must write to urge you to fight for the faith delivered once and for all to Gods holy people.
local: N jɔtiib, hali maah nan jɔɔ inunman ke n sɔb kugbɔŋ ki sei ni ki ta jiin nŋmarim man wee ti nan por nin tabin paami, n lig ki miin ni kpaa le nin n sɔb ki balin ni wee ni li kɔn yada kan wee Uwonbɔr nan ta ŋubin u ninfogannkaabin a nɔɔn nin buu.

eng: Godless people have slipped in among you. They turn the grace of our God into unrestrained immorality and deny our only master and Lord, Jesus Christ. Judgment was passed against them a long time ago.
local: Ni ma bu bininfob bibam woon ki kɔɔ ni sisiigin na, ban wee bi nan sɔb bi bɔr ke bi li bii bin. Bi ye ban kaa jiɛn Nween le, bi ye ban labir ti Wonbɔru a nyunyunbasanl a bɔrin le, ki nɔɔ iwanchɔgin toon, ki yii Yisa Masiya wan ye ti bɔru nin ti yudaau win.

eng: I want to remind you of something you already know very well. The Lord, who once saved a people out of Egypt, later destroyed those who didnt maintain their faith.
local: Hali naah le pii nyi ni niɛ nan biɛn bu-n, n ban n tiɛr ni le ke Uyudaan nan nyan U ninfob Ijibir a tiŋin na, amaa ni bɔɔn bu U nan bii ban kaa nan ŋa U yada-n na.

eng: I remind you too of the angels who didnt keep their position of authority but deserted their own home. The Lord has kept them in eternal chains in the underworld until the judgment of the great day.
local: Le malakam ban kaa nan ŋmag bi ninkper a pɔɔm a sisibol amaa wee ki fɔɔr bi baantɔɔl a niin yin nin, Uwonbɔr ta ni niɛ le ŋa libunbɔnlin, ki lol bi tikulor tan kaa jɔɔ chiim ki guu tibɔr a jim lidaal takpenlin daal.

eng: In the same way, Sodom and Gomorrah and neighboring towns practiced immoral sexual relations and pursued other sexual urges. By undergoing the punishment of eternal fire, they serve as a warning.
local: Ni ye man le a li ke, Sodom nin Gomoriya nin ntim man nan mal bin a ninfob kaah nan tun iwanchɔgin toon bi piibanlin nin bi jabanlin nin ichɔgin. Bi ma ye limagil ki wɔɔn ban nan yin kɔɔ nŋmi-n a fala a jim kaah na li ye man.

eng: Yet, even knowing this, these dreamers in the same way pollute themselves, reject authority, and slander the angels.
local: Man mu jigin, ban dɔgin man nmɔn bii bi baantɔɔl a gbanann le, le ki yiin tininkper a pɔɔm, ki jɔɔ kutingbiig ki tenn paab a wann naan wann tan fo.

eng: The archangel Michael, when he argued with the devil about Moses body, did not dare charge him with slander. Instead, he said, The Lord rebuke you.
local: Amaa hali malakam a ninkpelu Maakil, nin Sintani kaah nan far limɔkpel nin tab ulinlenn Moziz a gbanann bu-n, waa nan chee ki jɔɔ kutingbiig a galin nin Sintani, amaa le ki len ke, Uyudaan li fuun a bu.

eng: But these people slander whatever they dont understand. They are destroyed by what they know instinctively, as though they were irrational animals.
local: Amaa bininfob nan ma sugir niwann nan biɛn wee baa biɛ le nin tiwann tan wee bi nyi wee kaa jɔɔ nlamgɔrikaami, ke tiwankor tan kaa jɔɔ potiɛlin, tiwann nmɔn le bii bi.

eng: They are damned, for they follow in the footsteps of Cain. For profit they give themselves over to Balaams error. They are destroyed in the uprising of Korah.
local: Bi woo tibɔbir be bi bu! Bi gaa Kenn a toon le, bi ban tinyɔɔr le weem weem le ki kɔɔ Balaam kaah kɔnn nin bininkpeeb; le ni bii bi Kɔra mɔyiilin bu.

eng: These people are like jagged rocks just below the surface of the water waiting to snag you when they join your love feasts. They feast with you without reverence. They care only for themselves. They are waterless clouds carried along by the winds; fruitless autumn trees, twice dead, uprooted.
local: Bininfob nan ŋaan ni mɔkpaam a jiirin le tijaginn, bi lagin ji nin ni le ke ifa kaa jɔɔ bi, bi ye bipeekpaab ban jinn biba le ki jiɛn tiwankor. Bi nann titalangbann tan kaa jɔɔ utaal wee ntafaam daar mi chaa-n le, ki nann lipiɛl a siigi yan a far soor wee yaa jɔɔ iloon nin ki ŋab lu, wee ki kpo nfim milee-n.

eng: wild waves of the sea foaming up their own shame; wandering stars for whom the darkness of the underworld is reserved forever.
local: Bi nann limɔgil a nyungbann tan fii takpemin le, le bi fai a toon nmɔn nann ke bichiib a puugin. Bi nann iŋmabil yan chon jin le. Uwonbɔr pii mann libunbɔnjal le li si guu bi.

eng: Enoch, who lived seven generations after Adam, prophesied about these people when he said, See, the Lord comes with his countless holy ones.
local: Enog wan ye Adam a yaabisagira bilile nan, nan pag ilinlen leen ki jiin bininfob nan paama: Lig, Uyudaan nin U kasidam tuturil a turil le chaan nin.

eng: to execute judgment on everyone and to convict everyone about every ungodly deed they have committed in their ungodliness as well as all the harsh things that sinful ungodly people have said against him.
local: ke un ji uninfo biɛn tibɔr, ki choo ban kaa ye biwonjiɛm biɛn baah nɔɔ nan kaa ye liwonjiɛnl a sam ki ŋaan tiŋaar tan kaa ye Liwonjiɛnl a ŋaarin bu, nin titintann a mɔleen yan wee tibirdam ban kaa ye biwonjiɛm pag ki galin Uwonbɔr nan.

eng: These are faultfinding grumblers, living according to their own desires. They speak arrogant words and they show partiality to people when they want a favor in return.
local: Bininfob nmɔn ŋulin le ki ban bitab a galin; bi nɔɔ bi baantɔɔl a gbanann a kɔlisa; ki far bi tɔɔl a gbingban ki jɔɔ nmɔmɔn nin bininfob bi tɔɔl a nyɔɔr bu.

eng: But you, dear friends, remember the words spoken beforehand by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Amaa, n jɔtiib, ni li tiɛr nan wee ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya a tooi pii nan pagin buu.

eng: They said to you, In the end time scoffers will come living according to their own ungodly desires.
local: Bi nan bei ni ke, Iyoo yan na yin joorin, ban yɔɔlin na li be, ki nɔɔ bitɔɔl a wonjiɛnl a kɔlisa birug.

eng: These people create divisions. Since they dont have the Spirit, they are worldly.
local: Bi ma ye bininfob ban bɔgir ni, ki nɔɔ bi gbanann kaah ban man wee kaa jɔɔ Kinaaŋin.

eng: But you, dear friends: build each other up on the foundation of your most holy faith, pray in the Holy Spirit.
local: Amaa nim, n jɔtiib, ni li kpiɛg ni ba ni kasi a yada wee ki li miɛ Kasi a Naaŋ.

eng: keep each other in the love of God, wait for the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ, who will give you eternal life.
local: Ni li ŋmag niba Uwonbɔr a jiɛmin yaan na, ki li guu Uyudaau Yisa Masiya a nyunyunbasanl lan na yin ta ni ki kɔɔ limiɛfol lan kaa jɔɔ ndiɛmin yaan.

eng: Have mercy on those who doubt.
local: Ni li san bininfob ban jɔɔ nbiɛnimin kunyunyunbaaga;.

eng: Save some by snatching them from the fire. Fearing God, have mercy on some, hating even the clothing contaminated by their sinful urges.
local: ni yug ni tab nŋmi ni ki fee bi gaba, le bitab mu ni li san bi kunyunyunbaaga ki ŋmarin bijawaam, wee ki li nan bi wanyeewann tan wee kuŋmaruŋ a gbanann ngbarin.

eng: To the one who is able to protect you from falling, and to present you blameless and rejoicing before his glorious presence.
local: Uwonbɔr wan li fir ŋmag ni wee ni laa lu-n, U li ta ni ki siin U nintogil U pag kan kaa jɔɔ igalin ki jɔɔ nmɔn takpen nin bu.

eng: to the only God our savior, through Jesus Christ our Lord, belong glory, majesty, power, and authority, before all time, now and forever. Amen.
local: Ti sei Uwonbɔr wan be U binba wan ye ti feeru ki jɔɔ kupag, nin jilima, nin npɔɔn, nin tininkper a pɔɔm, ti Yudaau Yisa Masiya a yinlin, iyoo yan nan jon nin, nin daandaan nan nin iyoo yan kaa jɔɔ diɛm! Ibamɔn.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Ephesus: These are the words of the one who holds the seven stars in his right hand and walks among the seven gold lampstands.
local: Le u beim ke, Sɔb sei Efesusi a wonjiɛm a malaka ke: Wan ŋmag iŋmabil ilile u nɔɔjiimin wee ki choon salima a filaam a tɔɔnbol ilile-n a mɔleen sɔ:.

eng: I know your works, your labor, and your endurance. I also know that you dont put up with those who are evil. You have tested those who say they are apostles but are not, and you have found them to be liars.
local: N nyi ni ŋaar, ni nunman nin ni mɔril man. Ki ji nyi naah kaa ban bininfob ban a pooi to, mambu le ni nan mag ban nan ke bi ye itoon wee kaa sin ye-n ki biɛ baah ye tibɔkardam man.

eng: You have shown endurance and put up with a lot for my names sake, and you havent gotten tired.
local: Ni jɔɔ limɔril le ki jin fala n yinl bu, amaa le naa bagi.

eng: But I have this against you: you have let go of the love you had at first.
local: Amaa nan bu wee n galin ni sɔ: Ni jiɛ-n ni chinchinn a jiɛmin nna.

eng: So remember the high point from which you have fallen. Change your hearts and lives and do the things you did at first. If you dont, Im coming to you. I will move your lampstand from its place if you dont change your hearts and lives.
local: Ni tiɛrim naah nan nyan nan fɔg man wee ki nan lunn! Ni kpenn ni binbema wee ki li tun ke naah nan tun man chinchinn nin na. Ni ye naa kpenn ke, n li dan ki nan yuur ni salima a filaam a tutɔɔnbolin kisisibol.

eng: But you have this in your favor: you hate what the Nicolaitans are doing, which I also hate.
local: Amaa naah ŋaan nan wee ni ŋan sɔ: Ni nan titoonbir tan wee Nikolatan yaab tun ni, ke n baantɔɔl kaah kaa nan ti man nin le.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches. I will allow those who emerge victorious to eat from the tree of life, which is in Gods paradise.
local: Wan jɔɔ litul ke, ni che un gbir Kinaaŋ kaah bei biwonjiɛm a laginn man. Wan fir nyaŋ ke, n li sei u npaan wee un ji limiɛfol a siig a looi, yan be Uwonbɔr a kpaabin.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Smyrna: These are the words of the one who is the first and the last, who died and came back to life.
local: Le u ji ke Sɔb sei Simarina a wonjiɛm a malaka ke: Wan ye Npiinim nin Njoorim, wan nan kpo wee ki ji fii nkumin nin a mɔleen sɔ.

eng: I know your hardship and poverty . I also know the hurtful things that have been spoken about you by those who say they are Jews .
local: N nyi ni fala a jim bu nin naah ye faladam, amaa ni ye bijɔɔndam le! Ki nyi biba kaah jɔɔ kutingbiig ki bei ni ke bi ye Juu yaab le amaa kaa sin ye; amaa bi ye Sintani a wonjiɛndiig a ninfob le.

eng: Dont be afraid of what you are going to suffer. Look! The devil is going to throw some of you into prison in order to test you. You will suffer hardship for ten days. Be faithful even to the point of death, and I will give you the crown of life.
local: Ni laa che bijawaam jɔɔ ni fala kan wee ni yin ji nbu. N bei ni le, Sintani li loon nim bibam tiloondirin ki mag ni, le nin che ni ji fala iweehn piig. Ni le li ŋmag ni yadau, hali ni le ye nkum ke ni, wee n nan sei ni limiɛfol a yuchigirig.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches. Those who emerge victorious wont be hurt by the second death.
local: Wan jɔɔ litul ke, ni che un gbir Kinaaŋ kaah bei biwonjiɛm a laginn man. Wan fir nyaŋ ke, waa li kan nkum man yin kpiɛ milee-n a daŋ kolibi.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Pergamum: These are the words of the one who has the sharp, two-edged sword.
local: Ki ji ke Sɔb ki sei Pagamum a wonjiɛm a malaka ke: Wan jɔɔ takoobi kaaŋ imɔɔŋ ilee-n a mɔleen sɔ.

eng: I know that you are living right where Satans throne is. You are holding on to my name, and you didnt break faith with me even at the time that Antipas, my faithful witness, was killed among you, where Satan lives.
local: N nyi naah be nan yaan, nan yaan wee Sintani a naam a gbɔŋ be-n. Amaa le ni sin ŋmag n yinl nbamɔm. Naa ta naah ŋaam yada-n ki jaa, hali nin Antipasi a yonn nin wan nan ye n yada a siɛradaau ibamɔn nin, wee bi nan ku u ni tiŋin ni, Sintani a binbebolin.

eng: But I have a few things against you, because you have some there who follow Balaams teaching. Balaam had taught Balak to trip up the Israelites so that they would eat food sacrificed to idols and commit sexual immorality.
local: Ni biɛn yɔli, n jɔɔ tiwann wama nan che n galin ni: Ni jɔɔ bininfob biba be ni ban ki ŋmag Balaam a wɔɔmin, wan nan tinn Balag waah li ŋa man wee Iziral yaab n tun tibir ki ŋman tibawonann, ki li tun iwanchɔgin toon.

eng: From the elder. To the chosen gentlewoman and her children, whom I truly love.
local: Min uninkpel, Le sɔb kugbɔŋ nan ki tenn upii gannkaa nin u buwaabin , wan wee n jiɛ u nin ibamɔn nin, le naa ye n binba le jiɛ wi, amaa ban biɛn nyi ibamɔn ni mu jiɛ u le.

eng: In the same way, you have some who follow the Nicolaitans teaching.
local: Man le ni mu jɔɔ ban ŋmag Nikolatan yaab a wɔɔnim.

eng: because of the truth that remains with us and will be with us forever.
local: nan bu-n ibamɔn yan be ti ban ki yin gbaa be ti ban chaan bu.

eng: So change your hearts and lives. If you dont, I am coming to you soon, and I will make war on them with the sword that comes from my mouth.
local: Mambu ni kpenn ni binbem ma! Naa ye man ke, n li dan daandaan nan ki nan ta takoobi kan nyan n mɔbin nin ki kɔnn bi.

eng: Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and from Jesus Christ, the Son of the Father, will be ours who live in truth and love.
local: Ti Baa Uwonbɔr nin Yisa Masiya wan ye Baa-n a Bija-n a nyunyunbasanl, nin nposɔɔn li be ti ban ibamɔn nin njiɛm.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches. I will give those who emerge victorious some of the hidden manna to eat. I will also give to each of them a white stone with a new name written on it, which no one knows except the one who receives it.
local: Wan jɔɔ litul ke, ni che un gbir Kinaaŋ kaah bei biwonjiɛm a laginn man. Wan fir nyaŋ ke, n li sei u kulɔŋ a boroboro kan woo-n, wee bi yi ke maana-n. N mu ji li sei u litangbag penl lan wee liyinl pɔnl sɔb paan li bu, le wan gaa litangbagil nmɔn a binba le li nyi liyinl nmɔn a taai.

eng: I was overjoyed to find some of your children living in the truth, just as we had been commanded by the Father.
local: Ni seim nmɔn takpen le maah kan ke a buwaab biba nɔɔ ibamɔn a samin, ke ti Baa kaah siin ti man nin.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Thyatira: These are the words of Gods Son, whose eyes are like a fiery flame, and whose feet are like fine brass.
local: Ki ji ke Sɔb sei Tayatira yaab a wonjiɛm a malaka ke: Uwonbɔr a bija wan a numbili nann nŋmipeen wee u taafar nyagin ke kukurug kan nyagin nin a mɔleen sɔ.

eng: Now, dear friends, I am requesting that we love each other. Its not as though Im writing a new command to you, but its one we have had from the beginning.
local: Daandaan nan upii jiɛkaa, maa sɔb n siinpɔm le ki tenn niŋi, amaa nsiim man wee ti pii nan gbir npiinimin nin. N beiŋ le ke ti li jiɛ taba.

eng: I know your works, your love and faithfulness, your service and endurance. I also know that the works you have done most recently are even greater than those you did at first.
local: N nyi ni ŋaar, ni jiɛm ni yada, ni toon nin ni nnyiginim, le ni nin tun ki jon naah nan chinn ki tun man nin na.

eng: This is love: that we live according to his commands. This is the command that you heard from the beginning: live in love.
local: Njiɛm sɔ: Ke ti li nɔɔ U siimin. A li ke naah nan gbir man npiinimin nin, U siim ye le ke ti li choon nin njiɛm.

eng: But I have this against you: you put up with that woman, Jezebel, who calls herself a prophet. You allow her to teach and to mislead my servants into committing sexual immorality and eating food sacrificed to idols.
local: Ni biɛn yɔli, Nan wee n jɔɔ ki galin ni sɔ: Ni cheel tenn upii wan wee bi yi u ke Jezebiɛl, wee u yi uba ke ulinlenn nin. Upii nmɔn a wɔɔm che n toontum kɔɔ iwanchɔgin toon nin lipiibanlin nin lijabanlin nin tibawojiir a jimin.

eng: Many deceivers have gone into the world who do not confess that Jesus Christ came as a human being. This kind of person is the deceiver and the antichrist.
local: Bilinlarib takpem, ban kaa chee ke Yisa Masiya dan nin tigbanann le dulinya nan yaan nin, bi nyan le ki yal dulinya nan yaan. Bininfob nmɔn a bosu ye bilinlarib le nin Yisa a dataam.

eng: I gave her time to change her heart and life, but she refuses to change her life of prostitution.
local: N sei u isaŋ ke un kpenn u wanchɔgin toon nmɔn na, amaa le waa ban man ni.

eng: Watch yourselves so that you dont lose what weve worked for but instead receive a full reward.
local: Ni bu ni li lig niba nbamɔm ki laa che nan wee ni tun nin n lu yɔli, amaa wee ki li ye ban li kan tiyɔr biɛn.

eng: Look! Im throwing her onto a sickbed. I am casting those who have committed adultery with her into terrible hardship—if they dont change their hearts from following her practices.
local: Mambu n li che un dɔɔn nin iwiɛn, ki che ban dɔɔn nin win n ji fala takpem, man ke bi kpenn ki nyan upii nmɔn a binbemin.

eng: Anyone who goes too far and does not continue in the teaching about Christ does not have God. Whoever continues in this teaching has both the Father and the Son.
local: Uninfo wan paa lagir wee kaa gbaa be Masiya a wɔɔmin yaan ke, waa jɔɔ Uwonbɔr i; wan gbaa be nwɔɔmin yaan ke, u jɔɔ Baa nin Bija-n le.

eng: and I will even put her children to death with disease. Then all the churches will know that Im the one who examines minds and hearts, and that I will give to each of you what your actions deserve.
local: N li ku u buwaab. Le biwonjiɛm a laginn biɛn n biɛ ke min le ye wan dibir bininfob a sufu nin bi potiɛl, le n li yɔ ni biɛn ni ŋaar bu.

eng: Whoever comes to you who does not affirm this teaching should neither be received nor welcomed into your home.
local: Ni ye uba dan a ban wee kaa ŋmag Yisa a wɔɔmin ke, laa che un kɔɔ a niin bee a poor wi.

eng: As for the rest of you in Thyatira—those of you who dont follow this teaching and havent learned the so-called deep secrets of Satan—I wont burden you with anything else.
local: Daandaan nan n bei nim ban gur be Tayatira, wee kaa nɔɔ upii nmɔn a wɔɔm wee kaa ji tinn Sintani kaah yi nan ke tibɔwoonkaarin :.

eng: because welcoming people like that is the same thing as sharing in their evil actions.
local: Wan poor u ke, udaan ye wan kpiɛ u bu le bi tun npooton a toon.

eng: Just hold on to what you have until I come.
local: Ni le li ŋmag nan wee ni jɔɔ-n hali nin maah na li dan.

eng: I have a lot to tell you. I dont want to use paper and ink, but I hope to visit you and talk with you face-to-face, so that our joy can be complete.
local: N jɔɔ tibɔr takpem n sɔb sei ni, amaa maa ban n ta kugbɔŋ nin ngbansɔbmɔɔn ki sɔbi. Amaa n jɔɔ tama ke n li gɔnn ni wee ti num n kan tab wee n pag sei ni, wee ti mɔm nmɔn ngbeen.

eng: To those who emerge victorious, keeping my practices until the end, I will give authority over the nations.
local: Wan fir nyaŋ ki tun maah ban man hali ki nan kpaa ndiɛm ke, n li sei u tininkper a pɔɔm wee un ŋmag ibol biɛn.

eng: Your chosen sisters children greet you.
local: A ninsa gannkaa win a buwaab poorin.

eng: to rule the nations with an iron rod and smash them like pottery.
local: U na li ta kukurug a jaangbiɛg le ki ŋmag dulinya yaab; u li burbur bi ke tiyɔgirin a li ke maah gaa tininkper a pɔɔm n Baa ban man nin.

eng: just as I received authority from my Father. I will also give them the morning star.
local: N ji li sei u njakpanyiɛn a ŋmabil.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches.
local: Wan jɔɔ litul ke, ni che un gbir Kinaaŋ kaah bei biwonjiɛm a laginn man.

eng: From the elder. To my dear friend Gaius, whom I truly love.
local: Min uninkpelin, Le sɔb kugbɔŋ nan ki tenn n jɔ Gayɔsi, wan wee n jiɛ u nin ibamɔn ni.

eng: Dear friend, Im praying that all is well with you and that you enjoy good health in the same way that you prosper spiritually.
local: N jɔ, n miɛ Uwonbɔr le a li jiɛn nbamɔm wee niwann biɛn li ŋan ki seiŋ, ke a naaŋ kaah be ni ŋan man nin.

eng: I was overjoyed when the brothers and sisters arrived and spoke highly of your faithfulness to the truth, shown by how you live according to the truth.
local: Ni ŋaam nmɔn pam, nin nnabum biba kaah nan dan ki nan beim ŋaah ŋa yada nin ibamɔn man nin ŋaah gbaa choo nin ibamɔn man.

eng: I have no greater joy than this: to hear that my children are living according to the truth.
local: Maa jɔɔ npopeen niba bu ki lagir nin maah gbir ke n buwaab nɔɔ ibamɔn a samin ni.

eng: Dear friend, you act faithfully in whatever you do for our brothers and sisters, even though they are strangers.
local: N nabig, a jɔɔ yada nin ŋaah tun nan ki tenn nnabumin, hali nin baah le ye bicham a ban nin na.

eng: They spoke highly of your love in front of the church. You all would do well to provide for their journey in a way that honors God.
local: Bi bei biwonjiɛm a laguŋ ŋaah jiɛ bi man na. Pɔɔn a ba ki ter bi wee bin chonn bi sanchonl, nan li gbee Uwonbɔr a num.

eng: because they left on their journey for the sake of Jesus Christ without accepting any support from the Gentiles.
local: Masiya a yinl bu le bi nan nyan, amaa kaa kan niba a teril ban kaa ye biwonjiɛmin ban ni.

eng: Therefore, we ought to help people like this so that we can be coworkers with the truth.
local: Mambu ni kpaa le nin ti gaa bininfob nmɔn kuchɔŋ wee ti lagin tun nin ibamɔn.

eng: I wrote something to the church, but Diotrephes, who likes to put himself first, doesnt welcome us.
local: N nan sɔb sei biwonjiɛm a laguŋin na, amaa Diyotirifisi, wan ban u li ye usanliirin, kaa chee un gbir sei ti.

eng: Because of this, if I come, I will bring up what he has done—making unjustified and wicked accusations against us. And as if that were not enough, he not only refuses to welcome the brothers and sisters but stops those who want to do so and even throws them out of the church!.
local: Ni bu ni ye n dan ke, n li wɔɔn waah tun nan, u su ti bɔɔn le ki gbii ti bu. U num kaah kaa la gbee waah tun nan nin, le u nan yii kaa poor nnabumin ni, le ki ji gɔɔ ban ban bin poor bin ki ŋɔɔr bi nyan biwonjiɛm a laguŋin.

eng: Dear friend, dont imitate what is bad but what is good. Whoever practices what is good belongs to God. Whoever practices what is bad has not seen God.
local: N jɔ laa toog nan biri, amaa li toog nan ŋan na. Uninfo wan tun nan ŋan nyan Uwonbɔr ban le. Le wan tun nan bir kaa kan Uwonbɔr i.

eng: Everyone speaks highly of Demetrius, even the truth itself. We also speak highly of him, and you know that what we say is true.
local: Bininfob biɛn pag Dimitirusi u, hali nin ibamɔn nin tɔɔla. Ti tɔɔl pag wa, le ni nyi ke ti siɛra nmɔn ye ibamɔn le.

eng: I have a lot to say to you, but I dont want to use pen and ink.
local: N jɔɔ tibɔr takpem n sɔb seiŋ, amaa maa ban n ta kugbɔŋ nin ngbansɔbmɔɔn ki sɔbi.

eng: I hope to see you soon, and we will speak face-to-face.
local: N jɔɔ tama ke naa li yuuri n li kaŋ nin binum wee ti pag sei tab. Nposɔɔn li be niŋ. Ti jɔtiib ban be do poorin. Poor ti jɔtiib ban be niin nin na nin bi yin.

eng: A revelation of Jesus Christ, which God gave him to show his servants what must soon take place. Christ made it known by sending it through his angel to his servant John.
local: Tibɔkpiirikaar tan wee Uwonbɔr nan ta sei Yisa Masiya ke, un ta wɔɔn u toontum nan yin tun daandaan nan. U nan che U malaka le wɔɔn U toontunnu Jɔnn.

eng: who bore witness to the word of God and to the witness of Jesus Christ, including all that John saw.
local: le Jɔnn nan jin siɛra waah kan nan biɛn nin bu, ti ma ye, Uwonbɔr a mɔleen nin Yisa Masiya a siɛra.

eng: Favored is the one who reads the words of this prophecy out loud, and favored are those who listen to it being read, and keep what is written in it, for the time is near.
local: Wan karin ilinlen leen yan be kugbɔŋ nan a poolin ke tikaar be udaan bu, le ban mu gbir tibɔr nmɔn ki ta ŋa bi sufu ni ke tikaar be bi bu, nan bu-n iyoo mala.

eng: John, to the seven churches that are in Asia: Grace and peace to you from the one who is and was and is coming, and from the seven spirits that are before Gods throne.
local: Min Jɔnn, le sɔb kugbɔŋ nan ki tenn biwonjiɛm a laginn tilile tan be Asiya a yerin ni: Linyunyunbasanl nin nposɔɔn lan nyan Uwonbɔr ban li be nin ni, Uma wan be, nin wan nan be, nin wan yin dan, ki ji nyan ntinaam milile man be u naangbɔŋin u nintogilin li be ni ban.

eng: and from Jesus Christ—the faithful witness, the firstborn from among the dead, and the ruler of the kings of the earth. To the one who loves us and freed us from our sins by his blood.
local: Linyunyunbasanl nin nposɔɔn lan ji nyan Yisa Masiya, wan ye ibamɔn a siɛradaau win, kibininkpeeg kan chinn fii nkumin, nin wan ye dulinya nan a bɔrtiib biɛn a bɔru win li be ni ban. Wan jiɛ ti wee ki ta u cham ki nyan ti tibirin nin.

eng: who made us a kingdom, priests to his God and Father—to him be glory and power forever and always. Amen.
local: le ki che ti ŋa u naam a ninfob nin biminmanib ke ti li jiɛn Uwonbɔr wan ye u Baa-n, u binba le kpaan nin kupag nin npɔɔn iyoo nin iyoo! Ibamɔn.

eng: Look, he is coming with the clouds! Every eye will see him, including those who pierced him, and all the tribes of the earth will mourn because of him. This is so. Amen.
local: Lig, u be titalangbann nin ki chaan, le nnumbim biɛn na li kan u; hali nin ban nan ŋu win li kan u; le dulinya yaab biɛn na li mɔɔ u bu. Ni sin li ŋa man! Ibamɔn.

eng: I am the Alpha and the Omega, says the Lord God, the one who is and was and is coming, the Almighty.
local: Min le ye Npiinim nin Njoorim , Uyudaan Uwonbɔr le len man, Min wan be, nin wan nan be, nin wan yin dan, npɔɔn biɛn daan.

eng: I, John, your brother who shares with you in the hardship, kingdom, and endurance that we have in Jesus, was on the island called Patmos because of the word of God and my witness about Jesus.
local: Min, Jɔnn wan ye ni nabig, wee ki ye ni kpiɛg ti fala-n nin ti naamin nin ti mɔril a nyiginimin nan ye ti yaan Yisa bu-n, wee ki nan be ligungonl lan be nnyum a sisiigin Patmosi-n Uwonbɔr a mɔleen bu nin maah ye Yisa a siɛra bu-n.

eng: I was in a Spirit-inspired trance on the Lords day, and I heard behind me a loud voice that sounded like a trumpet.
local: Uyudaan a kpakɔɔl daal, n nan be nin Kinaaŋ le, le ki gbir likukɔl kaah tiɛn paab n bɔɔn ki nann kunaatuŋ.

eng: It said, Write down on a scroll whatever you see, and send it to the seven churches: to Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thyatira, Sardis, Philadelphia, and Laodicea.
local: ki len ke, Sɔb nan wee a kan nan ki ŋa kugbɔŋ kpabkaagin ki ta tan sei biwonjiɛm a laginn a kerim milile-n na: Ti ma ye Efesusi, nin Simarina, nin Pagamum, nin Tayatira, nin Sadusi, nin Filadelifiya nin Laodisiya.

eng: I turned to see who was speaking to me, and when I turned, I saw seven oil lamps burning on top of seven gold stands.
local: Le n gbiɛ lig n bɔɔn ke n kan likukɔl lan pag ki tenn nim nmɔn. N-yonn man wee n labir n bɔɔn paamin, le n kan salima a filaam a tutɔɔnbol ilile kaah si.

eng: In the middle of the lampstands I saw someone who looked like the Human One. He wore a robe that stretched down to his feet, and he had a gold sash around his chest.
local: le filaam a tutɔɔnbol nmɔn uba nan be niin ki nann uninfosaal a big , ki yee daala kan fɔg ki tan piin u taabili bu le salima a changbam lol paan u gbingbanl bu.

eng: His head and hair were white as white wool—like snow—and his eyes were like a fiery flame.
local: Le u yul nin u yukper peen ke tigunn nin, bee liŋunlin, le u num paam be ke nŋmipeen nin.

eng: His feet were like fine brass that has been purified in a furnace, and his voice sounded like rushing water.
local: U taai nan nann tukur tan wee bi ta pul nŋmi-n ke ti nyagin man nin le, le u kukɔl a fur nann nnyum puukaam.

eng: He held seven stars in his right hand, and from his mouth came a sharp, two-edged sword. His appearance was like the sun shining with all its power.
local: U nan ŋmag iŋmabil ilile le u nɔɔjiim, le takoobi kaaŋ kan jɔɔ imɔɔŋ ilee nyan u mɔnn. Le u num paam nyagin ke nwosisiigin nin.

eng: When I saw him, I fell at his feet like a dead man. But he put his right hand on me and said, Dont be afraid. Im the first and the last.
local: Maah nan kan u n-yonn man nin le n lu u ta tum ke utakpiirin. Le u ta u nɔɔjiim ki paan nbu ki len ke, Laa san bijawaami. Min le ye Npiinim nin Njoorim.

eng: and the living one. I was dead, but look! Now Im alive forever and always. I have the keys of Death and the Grave.
local: N ye Wan Fo-n le; N nan kpou, liga n fii nkumin na ki ye wan fo-n le hali nin iyoo yan kaa jɔɔ diɛm! Le ki ŋmag Nkum nin Kitakpiin tiŋ a naanganl a piin.

eng: So write down what you have seen, both the scene now before you and the things that are about to unfold after this.
local: Mambu, sɔbim ŋaah kan nan na, nan be daandaan nan nin nan na yin ŋa ni bɔɔn.

eng: As for the mystery of the seven stars that you saw in my right hand and the seven gold lampstands, here is what they mean: the seven stars are the angels of the seven churches, and the seven lampstands are the seven churches.
local: Ŋaah kan iŋmabil ilile yan n nɔɔjiim paamin nin salima a filaam a tutɔɔnbol ilile liwoolin nin a taai ye nan le: Iŋmabil ilile-n ye biwonjiɛm a laginn tilile-n a malakam le, le salima a filaam a tutɔɔnbol ilile-n mu ye biwonjiɛm a laginn tilile-n.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Sardis: These are the words of the one who holds Gods seven spirits and the seven stars: I know your works. You have the reputation of being alive, and you are in fact dead.
local: Ki ji ke, Sɔb sei Sadisi yaab a wonjiɛm a lagim a malaka ke: Wan ŋmag Uwonbɔr a naam milile nin iŋmabil ilile-n a mɔleen sɔ. N nyi ni ŋaar kaah ye man; bininfob nyi ke ni fo le amaa ni kpou.

eng: Wake up and strengthen whatever you have left, teetering on the brink of death, for Ive found that your works are far from complete in the eyes of my God.
local: Ni fii paaba! Wee ki pɔɔg nan gur ki ban nin kpe-n, nan bu-n maa kan ni ŋaar tan ŋan ki gbee Uwonbɔr a numi.

eng: So remember what you received and heard. Hold on to it and change your hearts and lives. If you dont wake up, I will come like a thief, and you wont know what time I will come upon you.
local: Mambu, ni li tiɛr, nan wee ni gaa ki gbirin; ni chee sei tibɔr nmɔn na, wee ki kpenn ni binbema. Amaa ni ye naa fii paab ke, n li dan ke unaayig a dann nin, le naa yin nyi n-yonn man wee n yin dan ni.

eng: But you do have a few people in Sardis who havent stained their clothing. They will walk with me clothed in white because they are worthy.
local: Amaa ni jɔɔ bininfob wama Sadisi ban kaa che bi wan yɔɔr gbarin niba. Min nin bi ma na yin lagin chonn ki yee tiwanpenn, nan bu-n bi kpaan nin man le.

eng: Those who emerge victorious will wear white clothing like this. I wont scratch out their names from the scroll of life, but will declare their names in the presence of my Father and his angels.
local: Wan fir nyaŋ ke u li yee tiwanpenn ke baah yee man nin. Maa li nyan udaan a yinl limiɛfol a gbɔŋin yaan ni, amaa le ki na li tiɛr u yinl n Baa nin U malakam a nintogil.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches.
local: Wan jɔɔ litul ke, ni che un gbir Kinaaŋ kaah bei biwonjiɛm a laginn man.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Philadelphia: These are the words of the one who is holy and true, who has the key of David. Whatever he opens, no one will shut; and whatever he shuts, no one opens.
local: Ki ji ke, Sɔb sei Filadelifiya a wonjiɛm a laguŋ a malaka: Wan be kasi ki ye ubamɔndaan ki ŋmag Defid a naanganl a piimin a mɔleen sɔ. U loor nan ke uba kaa li fir loon ni, le nan mu wee u loon ke uba kaa be ki li fir loor ni.

eng: I know your works. Look! I have set in front of you an open door that no one can shut. You have so little power, and yet you have kept my word and havent denied my name.
local: N nyi ni ŋaar kaah ye man. Ni lig, n loor ntisamɔn le ki sei ni le uba kaa li fir loon ntisamɔn nmɔn ni. N nyi naah jɔɔ npɔɔn wama, amaa ni biɛn yɔli ni ŋmag n mɔleen le kaa yii n yinli.

eng: Because of this I will make the people from Satans synagogue —I will make them come and bow down at your feet and realize that I have loved you.
local: N li ŋa ban be Sintani a jiɛndiigin, wee ki ke bi ye Juu yaab amaa wee kaa sin ye Juu yaabin, ki ye bilinlaribin, n li che bin dan ki nan gbaan ni taatum ki tiɛr ke n jiɛ ni.

eng: Because you kept my command to endure, I will keep you safe through the time of testing that is about to come over the whole world, to test those who live on earth.
local: Naah nyigin wee ki jɔɔ limɔril ki ŋmag n siimin bu, n na li nyan ni limugil lan yin foon ki nan mag ban be dulinya nan yaan biɛn nin.

eng: Im coming soon. Hold on to what you have so that no one takes your crown.
local: N chaan le daandaan nan. Ni li ŋmag nan wee ni jɔɔ nna, wee uba laa nan fee ni naam a yuchigirigi.

eng: As for those who emerge victorious, I will make them pillars in the temple of my God, and they will never leave it. I will write on them the name of my God and the name of the city of my God, the New Jerusalem that comes down out of heaven from my God. I will also write on them my own new name.
local: Wan nyaŋ ke, n li ŋa udaan Uwonbɔr a diig a jaantelig. Le waa ji li nya niin ni. N li sɔb n Wonbɔru a yinl nin n Wonbɔru a tiŋ kan ye Jerusalam pɔŋin ki paan u bu, kan yin nyan paab n Wonbɔru ban wee ki jiirin nin; le ki ji sɔb n mu a yin pɔnl ki paan u bu.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches.
local: Wan jɔɔ litul ke, ni che un gbir Kinaaŋ kaah bei biwonjiɛm a laginn man.

eng: Write this to the angel of the church in Laodicea: These are the words of the Amen, the faithful and true witness, the ruler of Gods creation.
local: Le ki ji ke, Sɔb ki sei Laodisiya a wonjiɛm a malaka ke: Wan a yinl ye Ibamɔn nin, nin ibamɔn a yada a siɛradaan wee ki ŋmag nan biɛn wee Uwonbɔr naan nin a mɔleen sɔ.

eng: I know your works. You are neither cold nor hot. I wish that you were either cold or hot.
local: N nyi ni ŋaar kaah ye man, naa ton ni kaa ji sɔɔn ni. N bi ban ke ni li ye ban ton le bee ban sɔɔn!.

eng: So because you are lukewarm, and neither hot nor cold, Im about to spit you out of my mouth.
local: Ni bu, naah ton mala mala wee kaa ton kaa ji sɔɔn nin, n yin sii ni le n mɔn ki gab.

eng: After all, you say, Im rich, and Ive grown wealthy, and I dont need a thing. You dont realize that you are miserable, pathetic, poor, blind, and naked.
local: Nim len le ke, N ye uwandaan le; N ye wan jɔɔ le kaa ji ban niba. Amaa le kaa biɛ ke ni ye tikpachar le, ki jɔɔ kunyunyunbaag nin faladam ki ye bijɔɔm ban gaan nin ijakpalon.

eng: My advice is that you buy gold from me that has been purified by fire so that you may be rich, and white clothing to wear so that your nakedness wont be shamefully exposed, and ointment to put on your eyes so that you may see.
local: Mambu n kpaan ni le ke ni daam salima kan pul nŋmi-n wee ki mann nin n ban, wee ni ŋa biwandam; ki ji daa tiwann yɔɔr penn tan wee ni li yee, ki fir degin ni fai naah gaan nin bu; wee ki daa nnunkpam n ban ki li balig wee ki ga.

eng: I correct and discipline those whom I love. So be earnest and change your hearts and lives.
local: Ban wee n jiɛ-n, bi ma le n fu bi bu ki dar bi tuli. Mambu ni ŋaam kinunmaŋ ki kpenn ni binbema.

eng: Look! Im standing at the door and knocking. If any hear my voice and open the door, I will come in to be with them, and will have dinner with them, and they will have dinner with me.
local: Min sɔ! N si ntisamɔn ki kpaar linaanganl. Ni ye wan gbir n kukɔl wee ki loor linaanganl ke, n li kɔɔ wee ki nan ji nin u, wee u mu nji nim.

eng: As for those who emerge victorious, I will allow them to sit with me on my throne, just as I emerged victorious and sat down with my Father on his throne.
local: Wan fir ki nyaŋ ke, n li sei udaan nsan wee min nin uma n nan lagin ki kal n naangbɔŋin bu. A li ke maah nan nyaŋ wee min nin n Baa lagin ki kal U naangbɔŋ bu man nin.

eng: If you can hear, listen to what the Spirit is saying to the churches.
local: Wan jɔɔ litul ke, ni che un gbir, Kinaaŋ kaah bei biwonjiɛm a laginn man.

eng: Then I saw a scroll in the right hand of the one seated on the throne. It had writing on the front and the back, and it was sealed with seven seals.
local: Le n kan wan ka kunaangbɔŋin bu kaah ŋmag kugbɔŋ kpabkaag u nɔɔjiim, le kugbɔŋ nmɔn jɔɔ nsɔbim ku bɔɔn nin ku nintogil, le bi ta tiwann tan tabin tilile ki tabin piin ku bu.

eng: I saw a powerful angel, who proclaimed in a loud voice, Who is worthy to open the scroll and break its seals.
local: Le n kan malaka wan jɔɔ npɔɔn takpem kaah tann papaab takpem ki len ke, Ŋma kpaan ki li fir tabir tiwann tabin wan nan wee ki loor kugbɔŋ kpabkaag nmɔn naa.

eng: But no one in heaven or on earth or under the earth could open the scroll or look inside it.
local: Amaa uba kaa nan be paab a naamin bee dulinya nan yaan bee kitakpiin tiŋ ki na li fir loor kugbɔŋ kpabkaag nmɔn bee ki lig ku poolin ni.

eng: So I began to weep and weep, because no one was found worthy to open the scroll or to look inside it.
local: Le n mɔɔ ki mɔɔ nan bu-n uba kaa nan be ki kpaan un loor kugbɔŋ kpabkaag nmɔn bee ki lig ku poolin ni.

eng: Then one of the elders said to me, Dont weep. Look! The Lion of the tribe of Judah, the Root of David, has emerged victorious so that he can open the scroll and its seven seals.
